Team,
Can you believe it's been nine months since I started in this role as Executive Director? Time flies when you're elbow-deep fighting for our democracy! From the high highs of incredible, people-powered wins to the low lows of some seriously head-scratching court decisions, we've seen it all this past year.
In 2022, we saw an astronomical number of voter suppression bills dance around the nation -- almost 400 in total! The extreme bills were swiftly challenged and defeated, but here's the twist -- the most extreme bills were just setting the stage to make the less extreme ones seem reasonable and harder to defeat.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74646367/442201782/2018587344?refcode=20231204_AOTL_F_RealityCheck_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZiYTY5OTY3LWNhOTMtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=thDQVJs5xFhPWvZcGAf9yy85ttm9jdbgYPzT_CD9-1Y=)

clean_body: | Team, Can you believe it's been nine months since I started in this role as Executive Director? Time flies when you're elbow-deep fighting for our democracy! From the high highs of incredible, people-powered wins to the low lows of some seriously head-scratching court decisions, we've seen it all this past year. In 2022, we saw an astronomical number of voter suppression bills dance around the nation -- almost 400 in total! The extreme bills were swiftly challenged and defeated, but here's the twist -- the most extreme bills were just setting the stage to make the less extreme ones seem reasonable and harder to defeat. | = Here's the reality check: anti-voter forces are using every last tool at their disposal to suppress the vote and control outcomes. We know those anti-democratic actors will double down -- so guess what? We're gearing up to be twice as ready. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Organizing, fighting in court, and mobilizing efforts aren’t a walk in the park, especially when it can feel like a marathon just to access fair representation. But here's the thing -- when the going gets tough, we come together, work together, and fight back together. And we can win together. = = Let's stick it to those anti-democratic lawmakers and their extreme suppression tactics and show them what grassroots power is all about! \-- Marina Jenkins Executive Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. STAND WITH BERNIE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231205_PT_berniebombing_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1012&akid=4968%2E5885482%2E1Jfga6)

Peter Willis,

Last night, Bernie Sanders gave a powerful speech on the Senate floor calling on the United States to stop being complicit with Israel’s illegal bombing of Palestinian civilians.

As a Jewish Senator, Bernie’s voice is powerful and exposes AIPAC’s talking point that Jewish Americans stand behind Netanyahu’s government as unconnected from reality.

With thousands of innocent civilians dead, it’s time for Israel to stop violating international law. Add your name to stand with Bernie in calling for an end to Israel’s illegal bombing! (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231205_PT_berniebombing_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1013&akid=4968%2E5885482%2E1Jfga6)

As Bernie said on the floor, Hamas’ horrific attacks on October 7th were a threat to Israel’s security, and Israel has every right to defend itself against future attacks.

However, illegally bombing civilians in Gaza only makes the situation on ground worse, strengthens Hamas’ political position, and endangers the Israeli hostages who are still held captive.

As Americans painfully learned in the years after the September 11th attacks, the way to defeat terrorism is not through cruel violence and costly wars that only generate more support for terrorist causes.

Join Our Revolution founder Bernie Sanders by clicking here to call on Israel to stop violating international law by bombing civilians. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12984?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231205_PT_berniebombing_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_berniept&t=1015&akid=4968%2E5885482%2E1Jfga6)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Flip the Senate
subject: Golden opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
If Republicans win this seat, it’s GAME OVER.| | |
---
Friend, Opportunities like this don’t come often. We have the chance to flip the Senate, not just for two years, but for **SIX YEARS.** It all comes down to winning in Michigan, Friend. If Michigan goes red, it’s **GAME OVER** for the Democrats. And we know the right man for the job:
---
[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=51cad4a4a3724875917911e901afc24b&_e=bKng6aItvOCTwinIQys89BaSFbmQgWXam34h7azXoR0x2KC33psw1eOexuaPRJNw_d4IeKIQaBorbsG3VdzQ2932jz3yZryO4c9qFlh73koY6-ETW_w5j1MK9mHqNu95UR_et7GP7doSDqd3i-0PH_iVPGcV-CDwvvhb33kbDd8yTKDLY6ydEcs3XQBogU5CE2n6lENZgq-zlwGXpzfm_Ce-Kwwnb46lPUg7VhhLHk5LRIs3oTCJEgznPBRA-2VNlHOVpFmap76WqQPyyYpcgy8oGCaQSNfvlXHLYx8isrCIeG_EWkBGcBNBzj37zQ7mgZ4sQ_VyG1M0slpOhIACA_BJFnsyavkwVbYDNApcV7tfJpZtL5L75rdoi9SoKvV6UpDC_YzpTM7bjPF0nAjnKw%3D%3D)
---
Mike Rogers is a businessman, former FBI Special Agent, retired Army veteran, and former Chairman of the House Intelligence Committee. **[And now he’s running for the U.S. Senate to take a stand against Joe Biden’s failed left-wing agenda.](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=51cad4a4a3724875917911e901afc24b&_e=bKng6aItvOCTwinIQys89BaSFbmQgWXam34h7azXoR0x2KC33psw1eOexuaPRJNw_d4IeKIQaBorbsG3VdzQ2932jz3yZryO4c9qFlh73koY6-ETW_w5j1MK9mHqNu95UR_et7GP7doSDqd3i-0PH_iVPGcV-CDwvvhb33kbDd8yTKDLY6ydEcs3XQBogU5CE2n6lENZgq-zlwGXpzfm_Ce-Kwwnb46lPUg7VhhLHk5LRIs3oTCJEgznPBRA-2VNKYlMguM1dm2XEqqGj0f33wGo-NF3n_J3V7WPdQw21hCpM51Zx0yv9c7woK0ciRYjA_826i5Uf3EXhc63TVKuQnXWkoHrN6vfESyUlM7xqqzKR0tocTt_xXuCNIcheFvUzQ-PB_-4T0eCpnxd4j2PLw%3D%3D)** Friend, winning Michigan all but **ENSURES** that Republicans flip the Senate — not just for two years, but for the foreseeable future — and Mike Rogers is the **ONLY** candidate who can make that happen. **[Will you chip in any amount to lock the Democrats out of the Senate majority?](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=51cad4a4a3724875917911e901afc24b&_e=bKng6aItvOCTwinIQys89BaSFbmQgWXam34h7azXoR0x2KC33psw1eOexuaPRJNw_d4IeKIQaBorbsG3VdzQ2932jz3yZryO4c9qFlh73koY6-ETW_w5j1MK9mHqNu95UR_et7GP7doSDqd3i-0PH_iVPGcV-CDwvvhb33kbDd8yTKDLY6ydEcs3XQBogU5CE2n6lENZgq-zlwGXpzfm_Ce-Kwwnb46lPUg7VhhLHk5LRIs3oTCJEgznPBRA-2VNi6R-rrtkbC2e4HhanPv92qFlZKGUPf2DsCUaGfjmsI-H8SbWfTQy079TBMh7caTu0CaHdYVflP8Z-aLHezBGitK7XiGhoD9Jv75EOsnmvTSF3H1w8dkbXe8xru1gM4njP0fj70TJpI6XpYBrPEscig%3D%3D)** We hope we can count on you. Sincerely, Team Rogers

Almost three years ago, Siaka’s home was raided at 5 am by 20 armed FBI jack booted agents outfitted with black tactical gear.

Two children of Siaka’s roommate, ages 3 and 7, looked on in horror as jack-booted government thugs swarmed the home. He was prevented from speaking with a lawyer and they took, without probable cause, his cell phone, computer and other property that allows him to function and be employed as a Hollywood actor and comedian.

While Siaka wasn't arrested during the raid, he was placed on a secret government terrorist watch list before even being charged with a crime. Each time he flies with his wife, he gets the dreaded "SSSS" stamp on his ticket and is patted down multiple times, including humiliating him by touching his private parts, questioned, and escorted to the gate.

We know now that the Department of Homeland Security has been wasting the time and resources of the U.S. Air Marshals in requiring them to fly along with any peaceful protester who was in the Capitol area on January 6th.

This is pure harassment and intimidation, as the Biden regime fears Siaka as a spokesman and activist as a conservative black. If one is black, you are a threat to the left as the Democrats depend on black votes to fraudulently “win” elections. More and more blacks are seeing the light and turning to President Trump, as you know. The Biden Regime will not tolerate this!

In addition to being harassed each time he flew, Siaka was followed by creepy air marshals on each flight.

What the Gestapo of a Biden Justice Department is putting these people through is outrageous and criminal in and of itself.

After his arrest last week, Siaka was held overnight in a disgusting and dangerous L.A. County prison. We fought to have him released on signature bond, and so he could retain Siaka’s Second Amendment rights to bear arms for self-defense so as not to have to surrender his firearms. We succeeded.

That also proves he is no risk to the community – but we already knew that.

In the DC Swamp, it will be a different story altogether.

If the Gestapo Biden Justice Department succeeds in moving Siaka’s case to D.C., Siaka faces possible re- arrest and being held in the D.C. J-6 inmates there had even petitioned to be sent to Guantanamo, Cuba, the terrorist prison, where Al Quada terrorists are even treated better. Their request was predictably denied.

Siaka is a GOOD MAN, and I will fight for him until the end . . . but we have to do this together.

I've hired a co-counsel to assist in this critical case and have a team working on it around the clock. The costs are piling up, and I need to be able to cover these growing expenses.

I want to ensure Siaka is there when Charlotte gives birth in 16 weeks.

If they send him to D.C., the chances of being there for Charlotte and their child diminish significantly, and it will be heartbreaking for Siaka to miss the birth of his first child. And how can he support his lovely wife and newborn child in prison.

Two children of Siaka’s roommate, ages 3 and 7, looked on in horror as jack-booted government thugs swarmed the home. He was prevented from speaking with a lawyer and they took, without probable cause, his cell phone, computer and other property that allows him to function and be employed as a Hollywood actor and comedian. While Siaka wasn't arrested during the raid, he was placed on a secret government terrorist watch list before even being charged with a crime. Each time he flies with his wife, he gets the dreaded "SSSS" stamp on his ticket and is patted down multiple times, including humiliating him by touching his private parts, questioned, and escorted to the gate. We know now that the Department of Homeland Security has been wasting the time and resources of the U.S. Air Marshals in requiring them to fly along with any peaceful protester who was in the Capitol area on January 6th. This is pure harassment and intimidation, as the Biden regime fears Siaka as a spokesman and activist as a conservative black. If one is black, you are a threat to the left as the Democrats depend on black votes to fraudulently “win” elections. More and more blacks are seeing the light and turning to President Trump, as you know. The Biden Regime will not tolerate this! In addition to being harassed each time he flew, Siaka was followed by creepy air marshals on each flight. What the Gestapo of a Biden Justice Department is putting these people through is outrageous and criminal in and of itself. After his arrest last week, Siaka was held overnight in a disgusting and dangerous L.A. County prison. We fought to have him released on signature bond, and so he could retain Siaka’s Second Amendment rights to bear arms for self-defense so as not to have to surrender his firearms. We succeeded. That also proves he is no risk to the community – but we already knew that. In the DC Swamp, it will be a different story altogether. If the Gestapo Biden Justice Department succeeds in moving Siaka’s case to D.C., Siaka faces possible re- arrest and being held in the D.C. Gulag – a foul and dangerous jail with the hygienic conditions of a back alley in India! J-6 inmates there had even petitioned to be sent to Guantanamo, Cuba, the terrorist prison, where Al Quada terrorists are even treated better. Their request was predictably denied. Siaka is a GOOD MAN, and I will fight for him until the end . . . but we have to do this together. I've hired a co-counsel to assist in this critical case and have a team working on it around the clock. The costs are piling up, and I need to be able to cover these growing expenses. By Thursday, we need to raise over $23,500 to cover Thursday's costs at the preliminary hearing and to prepare and file a motion to keep Siaka’s case out of DC federal court, where the judges are vicious and dishonest partisans and hacks, and the juries are no better. That's a lot to ask, I want to ensure Siaka is there when Charlotte gives birth in 16 weeks. If they send him to D.C., the chances of being there for Charlotte and their child diminish significantly, and it will be heartbreaking for Siaka to miss the birth of his first child. And how can he support his lovely wife and newborn child in prison. Siaki tells me that he will not agree to make forced confessions and will fight to the victorious end. No surrender to these vile despots of the Gestapo of a Biden Justice Department. And, no plea agreement that will compromise his rights of free speech to speak out about the Biden dictatorship! In the words of our great Founding Father, Benjamin Franklin, either we all hang together with patriots like Siaka, or we will hang separately. In Justice, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. P.S. Remember, Siaka’s preliminary hearing is THIS THURSDAY, so we must move fast. I'm consulting with other J6 attorneys already operating in the D.C. with their J6 clients. They have issued stern warnings telling me, "Do whatever you can to try to have the case dismissed and keep the case away from the DC Swamp!"

name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Healthcare is still out of reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
This email is different from what we normally send, but I hope you’ll read it. | | Peter,

From the frontlines, I've seen firsthand what lack of access to routine preventative healthcare means for Americans, and I’m determined to find solutions. **[Before I share my plan, I’m asking for your help with a donation to my campaign>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74647042/442212641/1416552317?refcode=em23_231205_HCLFFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231205_HCLFFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=0a38fd9d-cd93-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGEzOGZkOWQtY2Q5My1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tm-uLDkzLGCEy9voBajClIzAdtRyvW6esqjNHcoALRQ=)**

It is tragic that healthcare is still out of reach for the millions of uninsured. In Texas, our healthcare outcomes are some of the worst in the nation. **In 2021, nearly 20% of Texans were uninsured, and Texas children were more than twice as likely as children in other states to be uninsured. Texas also ranks #49 in the nation for women’s healthcare.**

Texans deserve better. That's why in Congress, I will fight to:
* **Offer a public option for health insurance so Americans will have expanded access and more choices in the Marketplace.**
* **Lower prescription drug costs.** For those lucky enough to see a doctor, there is still the burden of prescription drug costs. We must cap the cost of insulin for all Americans at $35 per month, and hold drug companies accountable by putting patients over profits.
* **Incentivize research and development of Orphan Drugs. Far too many parents watch their children suffer with rare conditions for which treatments are unavailable or way too expensive.** There’s more we can do to ensure that pharmaceutical companies continue to research treatments and cures for rare conditions and that those treatments are fairly priced. I will fight for expanded resources for Orphan Drug research and work to increase awareness and support of this vital program in Washington.
* **Fight for expanding Medicaid and support legislation to encourage state legislators to change course in favor of helping millions of Texans to receive the coverage they need.**
* **Increase transparency for patients in the healthcare system.** Insurance companies and corporate hospital systems have made it virtually impossible to get straightforward answers on what patients might pay out of pocket — so they can make more money at Texans’ expense. We must pass reforms that get Texans the information they deserve when emergencies strike.
* **Ensure women have the right to make decisions about their health — without the interference of politicians.** In Congress, I will vote to re-establish and protect the right to an abortion nationwide. I will also defend the right to birth control and oppose medically unnecessary requirements on abortion providers.

**This isn't just a list to me — these are tangible, research-driven goals that will help us create a Texas that can thrive.** In 2022, I worked with Democratic leaders in Washington on legislation to allow Medicare to negotiate drug prices, improve diversity in clinical trials, and increase accessibility to affordable healthcare. I also worked on federal legislation related to mental health reform, reproductive rights, Medicare, Medicaid, and more. **I am more than ready to commit to this work as your Congressman for TX-32.**

**[But I can only do that if our campaign has the resources to win next November. This campaign is a team effort, and we need all of our supporters to chip in where they can. That’s why I hope today you’ll make a donation of $5 or whatever you can afford>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74647043/442212642/1416552317?refcode=em23_231205_HCLFFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_231205_HCLFFR_fnd_gq_act___DBW_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=&refcode2=0a38fd9d-cd93-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGEzOGZkOWQtY2Q5My1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tm-uLDkzLGCEy9voBajClIzAdtRyvW6esqjNHcoALRQ=)** name: Kirsten Engel
subject: Ciscomani is going to have to answer for this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
Peter,
My opponent has a lot he needs to answer for on the campaign trail.
The Inflation Reduction Act — which Democrats passed in 2022 — invests over $150 billion into clean energy and transportation projects. In Arizona, that money is lowering energy costs, boosting the economy, and creating thousands of good-paying jobs.
It is a win-win for Arizona. But on the campaign trail, Juan Ciscomani opposed the IRA, and in Congress, he voted to repeal these investments.
Reporters asked me about Ciscomani’s voting record, and I gave them my honest opinion. You can see what I said here >> [https://www.reuters.com/world/us/2024-republican-ev-attacks-may-fall-short-swing-states-reap-investment-2023-11-27/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_120523_CleanEnergy_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_120523_CleanEnergy_act]
Voting against clean energy is bad for AZ-06. Just like how voting for national abortion restrictions is bad for AZ-06. Just like how voting to slash Medicare and Social Security is bad for AZ-06. Just like how voting for election deniers to lead Congress is bad for AZ-06.
But my opponent doesn’t care about what’s bad for AZ-06 — he cares about keeping the approval of the MAGA wing of the Republican party.
He’ll need to answer for these votes — and on Election Day, we can hold him accountable at the ballot box.
This race is a toss-up. Every vote makes a difference, which means every person we reach with our message makes a difference. Will you help us flip AZ-06 blue by chipping in now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engel2024_foundingdonor?refcode=X_120523_CleanEnergy_act]

Before we go live for my town hall...

Friend,
Tonight, I will be doing a voter town hall with Sean Hannity in Iowa where the FIRST VOTE of 2024 will be cast in just 41 DAYS.
Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House.
**But there 's one other group that I guarantee will be tuning in... _the special interest "Republican" megadonors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who just hatched a NEW FINAL HOUR PLOT behind closed doors to spend a grand total of $400 MILLION to attack our movement instead of going after Crooked Joe. _**
And make no mistake, they know full well that their attacks against yours truly amount to the single largest in-kind contribution the Biden campaign has _EVER_ received!
These so-called "Republicans," and their Deep State-approved puppet candidates at tomorrow night's JV debate, simply can't stand to see the ONE candidate who actually puts YOU first back in the White House.
That's why they'll stab me - _and YOU_ - in the back as many times as they can to try and stop us before 2024 voting is officially underway.
**But tonight, with MILLIONS of eyes on us,_this_ __ is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' new $400 million plot completely BACKFIRED!**
**[Please make a contribution before I go LIVE with Hannity so that I can show the country no amount of RINO plotting will _EVER_ stop us from winning the nomination and WINNING BACK the White House.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=7aea369b88bd4999b7e38d8334dec5eb&_e=AspkOazFJT_JgUAR4r3sbb7ShZs49kAjI9cwp6g1HhptO1mYlmm3FB2p_dE1wxq6LROyNhxMVuZue2sJ4zqD-O1o9bughpPIClfQAst2vkSNK9QhW5qMakyVpkbaO8lZbH59BI2WW__KQYaZQ2tpBgHt4xBoFyplO4S6unSfCa4i4eCSqalFthLMfU7fCppayQafa2PcOMuYu3bCMlkTnzCYgEm2KOLXVdSG_iwB4vneHXL9CDJqQQ63dwytLH-4zGCwsgNd3w5HWGSQKtklYyUa6djLC1H1bGUFeiXjGGvodC5PQi5AEJpgFqhhWGOmoqMuC_yhJ0wwjqwbaXN7n5YscB-QpmSlkhudX7UGbvkKlaP-di_lDsI7WclBoegnc4fb81q5Wrxwzjb9gG4IUg-kX-oEWZmx91vxjfaECms%3D)**
_(But, of course, if you can 't donate right now due to the disastrous policies of the Crook in the White House, then please don't feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life GREAT AGAIN. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can't afford. And don't you worry - very soon, I'll be back in the White House and America will come ROARING BACK!)_

Before we go live for my town hall... | | | Friend, Tonight, I will be doing a voter town hall with Sean Hannity in Iowa where the FIRST VOTE of 2024 will be cast in just 41 DAYS. Millions of Republican primary voters will be tuning in tonight as I take questions from voters and outline our plans to SAVE AMERICA from the incompetent crook currently occupying the White House. But there 's one other group that I guarantee will be tuning in... the special interest "Republican" megadonors (RINOs, as we like to call them) who just hatched a NEW FINAL HOUR PLOT behind closed doors to spend a grand total of $400 MILLION to attack our movement instead of going after Crooked Joe. And make no mistake, they know full well that their attacks against yours truly amount to the single largest in-kind contribution the Biden campaign has EVER received! These so-called "Republicans," and their Deep State-approved puppet candidates at tomorrow night's JV debate, simply can't stand to see the ONE candidate who actually puts YOU first back in the White House. That's why they'll stab me - and YOU - in the back as many times as they can to try and stop us before 2024 voting is officially underway. But tonight, with MILLIONS of eyes on us,this is the moment we PROVE that the RINOs' new $400 million plot completely BACKFIRED! (But, of course, if you can 't donate right now due to the disastrous policies of the Crook in the White House, then please don't feel pressured to. My goal is to make your life GREAT AGAIN. I would never want you to incur a cost that you can't afford. And don't you worry - very soon, I'll be back in the White House and America will come ROARING BACK!) | | Thank you, | Donald J. Peter,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=73e7a45327a04179a2a5ac036b28c9fd&_e=9QqU76Ca30wKKKoj2aK4hjTNMmQZHIh7BWoDZbATswI7QNIpqDZplVakF1AlowOZmryTVVK0DT6rgcQEDxc8FfTfEAZCQE6jkHa3pYa34wDm-j2Ze6oIWM1OgRgVVQ4XAj6kbLMtDUyLu029hoULHCG3bU3zLPlm35drwnzQ0GoyA1fzMOWnDLEXkVtWmpKxp1uhi6m7orVBIiGuUGlFB0yD5QBS_Q0rY-VcZRshZbJJeYmAMP9n56vYyUeAxCCcDFYsvHg3x--NvhyVmllFzkWRWgT4NnHM5xIsx-VZlOY9AZ2bBYXXlTl0OwD4aRyhHiw3f222pHUAeOZqjgEtBHy_wcpeQADlUHrOkghHcYqwy4xfnKS_Ym4ol7azuc0vrfkjom74ijDibcuArP5mDBfx1RRLFh1Duwpp08i1Gp4%3D)

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRIANA SEWELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re doing a survey to find out what issues are most important to voters, what you wish Congress was focusing on, and how to make sure Democrats get to the polls.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74648369/442233208/-1514006159?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU0YjdiNS1kMzkzLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QrOshdxpXmllFdkZVEwSd2S2l2S641y2_NTqZdcqqg=) Hey, do you have a minute?

I just launched my campaign for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country. And today, I need your input.

We’re doing a survey to find out what issues are most important to voters, what you wish Congress was focusing on, and how to make sure Democrats get to the polls.

**[Will you do me a favor and fill out my quick survey now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74648370/442233209/-1185826315?refcode=email_120523_survey&source=email_120523_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU0YjdiNS1kMzkzLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QrOshdxpXmllFdkZVEwSd2S2l2S641y2_NTqZdcqqg=&emci=7c049eea-c393-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4ae4b7b5-d393-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=21796801)** | | [Begin Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74648371/442233210/-1185826315?refcode=email_120523_survey&source=email_120523_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzQ0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWU0YjdiNS1kMzkzLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_QrOshdxpXmllFdkZVEwSd2S2l2S641y2_NTqZdcqqg=&emci=7c049eea-c393-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4ae4b7b5-d393-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=21796801)
---
We have less than a year to build our campaign from the ground up and talk to as many voters as possible. Hearing directly from supporters like you today will help me hit the ground running, win this battleground seat, and help Democrats take back the House.

I’m looking forward to seeing your response!

Briana

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Here is where I stand
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
You might not know me very well – probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_t=fcdyHKT1AuXNOpuAYGtCk-xKhZgTyRn1B0TxkuNBdFCvXciyXizR1U5VnnxePd7SKzegka_udeDJyAk6d5xnJNf7Sdaj9XyKZhPpre6PAmw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_t=fcdyHKT1AuXNOpuAYGtCk-xKhZgTyRn1B0TxkuNBdFCvXciyXizR1U5VnnxePd7SKzegka_udeDJyAk6d5xnJNf7Sdaj9XyKZhPpre6PAmw%3D)
[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcuANH4ORWEu6EXmLJ1FVtwrV3yRmz0EwadBRQkV0HqPDUcg7MTanYi6kCZE0WZ6dBDglZ2qp3FlNKK36d6BqW3NUSPvyRARxztmAEMOLBU7OzeMhj0Qsbff4mwDOi5igqo_uYurQmzzpfxxzlx9uZHQ%3D)
---
Fellow American,

You might not know me very well – _probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress._

So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for.

**To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country.**

**_I believe that God is not done with America yet._**

**I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America.**

I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law.

**I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – _but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us._**

[**Last November, the American people put their faith in House Republicans and gave us a majority. We’ve been charged with holding Democrats accountable for their failure to get our country out of the malaise of their own making. To deliver on the promises we made, we need you on our team TODAY.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcplLoTZs9G_MwHIbBjc7EvLKdZtd4117unHTKCzoRvbiuK1R6HIpHUMfczFRYrwHGYrYLxG8KLRvGXTtNNExRhFt4XmEPk1ExuRQAr-oBpChHEXw1z9Vr30uGSJTY9xsQd0Lrc5cq6eVJQ7wRpyRWYs%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER MIKE > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcnpbx02vw9ERob3S89A7DLIUS-hzfzw9kyV2O_UbvV0aGGaOL71KvWwyyMaYd0ff0D1Y6NCO3ogR5cV2hMT3flGDwZ5l3oGH4msq3socgAMFeWS9uHug1iRxApumR54X4x5oqYiCQRX6f72CUXogXpo%3D)

Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,**otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation.**

[**So, I’m asking you today – please commit to a donation of any amount. We will use your gift to help defend our conservative way of life and lead the fight for freedom.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcuuuA-DYLUojrmg3cYaGhg17BOXREMgsQhfYfXm8EnGoxDSCEgRVpo8xWOwsYIV5-yn2i99e1_71c3DVQ9adT0L4R_zVR2TYP9DQpWnMLSnyLpL0jc90EtUCXez_hLC6cZZ6kQZCOiP9MiXprT0v8c0%3D)

**_-STEP FORWARD TODAY-_** [** DONATE > **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcrfy4-rmVZ1p6J07E12ZG8SX2jvevi0kCXLRacy4InbU6uIH-3504BywzMlwgfdCij3aLlhCJ9X10xpVDqSP8a1PwZUoKwaB6O9YRnPDASgnbgWYP_4R9pxvGAke3JrKCm4vMRuxJlV69k4Eg9r7x_0%3D)

I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. [**Stand with me today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcoiqmmkDq3EEPvg3JQnVDNnYtKg1hJyNpoNK8H8RMTKwpGZwODMa8VXjNDniLTsWNa_tYyIKmf6CYRMg5teZTyWPJia92jpHPoqn31VrXDWVQTTzvHm2P6-dGrMwW1QYjAD02M19lx0ADls-2QO6AfQ%3D)

God bless,

[ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5fed064191d94d2c959ac3785b90a557&_e=I70tzGj_JgH94q3YDZ4SGmnHND6IInNcmibMUrWgpt2nXBiQTm7A-zAH8NjMGcPKrtGzezhwVS-t6A6Hi8LbHpKNC0wnWJvFDMbI3hYrfQofnTrdEaH2sh_vfylUzdiQl2owhzICx5P-bCQYnVu3d9Hk5kQ4zJ3ePGsvGPC0p3_zk-x1dTzDETCgFbB511G3G4vt_weSaiVG7rTfqg66UWKytmH5ktUm-9jh0tQysVMAnIVYl96MOyevFdJsCocCegsTnuOlfOjV7vzF6tFYcr17BQs-zciJO3UWF8rhdH8b3MCEuRO5fbiSHDbTewUE7HHjoNivm9ww_TKVwUXIrP0CTQbGhT6-FxQ_CABWQ1lfB3E-760XIdTvEAuit96fJf2t-bZ7BLCW04EzlvObkaZppqYT6MSppT5sz1mVhcI%3D)

Mike Johnson

clean_body: You might not know me very well – probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress. | | Fellow American, You might not know me very well – probably because I have been heads down working for the past seven years in Congress. So, in my own words, I want to give you a chance to hear what I stand for. To my core, I believe the most important things are God, family, and country. I believe that God is not done with America yet. I believe we need to unite as a party and unite as a nation. The hour is late, and the crisis is great – but I am bullish about the future of America. I believe in the law – I’m a constitutional law attorney and I respect the law. I believe America is the freest, most powerful, most successful nation in the history of the world – but our days as the beacon of freedom for the world are numbered if we let the far-left force their anti-American agenda on the rest of us. Fellow American, I know it takes time to build trust; you’re getting to know me and I’m navigating this new role – but we must act – and quickly. We need a full course correction,otherwise, I’m not sure what version of America we’ll hand down to the next generation. -STEP FORWARD TODAY- I made a promise when I was first elected to do what is best for our country, and I intend to keep that promise. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Fellow American, We couldn't sit by and listen to Newsom say Gov. DeSantis "banned books" in school. Here's what he really banned: garbage. The facts:
* Ron DeSantis banned pornography from filling elementary school libraries

* Gavin Newsom banned "_To Kill a Mockingbird_ "

The Left wants to use schools to indoctrinate your kids with a radical agenda. Ron DeSantis will put that plan in the grave. We think we've said enough. This country's way off track. It's up to us to save it, and we're running out of time. Ron DeSantis needs your support in this fight, and he needs it now.

Team DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=0138515ff2e44aa9a4a4f5c7bb05b7ef&_e=khYzRC8rl9PKsB9tg_7L-CbxJVLzhMn5INtJrpHq23aGRwO431fNBp4_nghmF82aHR4Db8vm8_6xaoHz4uzB9diiEM_CjiK2EzAr1-aBh6SAsVCs3FWm4CQhNKmYLXND9QSoYLEJLWPAKksq564CD9xdxJz6eEsWdvV-PztXCP_3-VmcuGW9PGYjyX0Yh2C7WazzBB0Non6xuqYcWY8ePvz-2uR2DvzGtVweoAIK1md7D2bMWqfU-5YZbmiTF_cvR-zhfFjG_WocldHPr04hteEHb8r94IFXizAKGbSX9OgYHFkzxUC4KeUT1Ugvw7D-V8QK6xttccnEaYeySB3Wsq99w7EBw1gwzeflHaOqFdFbxwOYTjzIkjqnuTH00z5vad8fzkyy6Ea7BVx2K3uTzHUhseupxo8dVdvfJGUphCH4w5QEX3WDXX7p81WY_Qq5-6L2rD8KS-jeahVxudU87w%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

clean_body: No matter who the Republican presidential nominee is, they will work to turn back the clock on all of the progress you have made possible. | | | Tomorrow, the Republican presidential hopefuls are going to take the stage in Alabama for their fourth debate. And, after catching the highlights of the first three, I can tell you a few things for sure: this debate will be truly divisive and hit on the GOP’s extreme anti-choice agenda. But we do not need to tune in to know exactly what these candidates’ plans are for our country. We already know. No matter who the Republican presidential nominee is, they will work to turn back the clock on all of the progress you have made possible. We can’t let them do it, Peter. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | While Republicans are squabbling on the debate stage, I can promise you that Joe and I are focused on delivering results for you and your families. I know that November 2024 may seem far away now. But we’re relying on early investments in our reelection campaign to ensure we can continue fighting for the middle class, our rights, and our democracy. Joe and I are counting on you to step up now so we can finish the job. Thank you for standing with us. Kamala Kamala Harris

subject: Here’s my plan for tomorrow’s debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Tomorrow’s the last presidential primary debate of the cycle, and I am once again ready to deliver the honest and hard TRUTHs that are so obviously missing from today’s political discourse.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=302c628ac73c4c03b075b9539c782541&_t=iPR4l2tSt0nfh5CasC-sGRCCK-UYIGxALUOfcjKE9yIa98WdTpcTtQTBAD0Fgad53lzbODgcjH-TAuGSDIVEdJ0pniBAiWN4jewNEYlyUEk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=302c628ac73c4c03b075b9539c782541&_t=iPR4l2tSt0nfh5CasC-sGRCCK-UYIGxALUOfcjKE9yIa98WdTpcTtQTBAD0Fgad53lzbODgcjH-TAuGSDIVEdJ0pniBAiWN4jewNEYlyUEk%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=302c628ac73c4c03b075b9539c782541&_e=WgbUzi-TIdOX6sxI0g67sHsYdiTx9Sigo7j0Df-8SzUqJGDf855VGa8Nwqk1socvLheoR-4hZewfkQ_olz7NEuJfLsAZ-929OI8qpiZlRne6jpuyvtCEnkCSGS_aF5DBx5zz8xx9tnkxa0rT3H__EvyFzxC_j4t5jR3xgkR_ZuGzwObRBZVpAkO1iGDjrLiU8-2_e4vxUJBw8Sc-ce6jhDBEbxhB6CZ2kwymDGSJGVPqtrCHrA3muKOEFduPw5s_hft_oNrSdiwrMCne76Cycf2m4zFllhhW8UIJc2dF0iUaz9r8-NCBtxcC99DJHVLTBvjjUzVmKrmgMG6X-exlv5-vOTC8TcH0S_9kKwzZil85KJfyRa_zynqXFoRVZyYJ5-s2JQP10yDbeT4GFECYxWRn71CJSk-5dVRSELBHxK8uxMMyRM8UILhVQCURsDoh)

Fellow American,

Tomorrow’s the last presidential primary debate of the cycle, and I am once again ready to deliver the honest and hard **TRUTHs** that are so obviously missing from today’s political discourse.

At the last debate, you watched me bring the heat and hold the dishonest media, the crony establishment, and my hypocritical opponents accountable. At this debate, you can expect more of that fire, because I refuse to surrender an inch to those who want to maintain the status quo. The same Super PACs, the same backroom deals, the same blatant election interference, and the same erosion of trust in our government – it all ends on my watch.

I’m 38 years old; I’m the youngest Republican candidate to ever run for President of the United States. The reason why my generation has lost its sense of national pride is, in part, because people in my generation feel like the American Dream isn’t attainable anymore. Well, it’s going to take a CEO with a clear vision and deep understanding in the White House to correct course and restore our great nation.

_“Take a sledgehammer to Vivek.”
“You’re just scum.”
“Barack Obama amateur.”_
My political rivals can attack and insult me all they want – don’t worry, I can take it. But strip that away, and what’s left? Empty promises, war hawks, and billionaire Super PAC puppets.

Here’s what we need to do – and what we will do once I’m elected: unleash American energy, put people back to work and stop paying them more to stay home, and increase the supply of housing for ordinary Americans. Taking on Joe Biden (or whomever the managerial class decides to put up in his stead) and undoing his failed Bidenomics agenda is going to take a candidate with fresh legs and strong America First convictions. My campaign is built to win, and I am excited that you’re along with me on this ride.

[**This is the last day before the final debate, and 40 days until the Iowa caucuses. Please consider a contribution tonight and tune in tomorrow night!**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=302c628ac73c4c03b075b9539c782541&_e=WgbUzi-TIdOX6sxI0g67sHsYdiTx9Sigo7j0Df-8SzUqJGDf855VGa8Nwqk1socvLheoR-4hZewfkQ_olz7NEuJfLsAZ-929OI8qpiZlRne6jpuyvtCEnkCSGS_aF5DBx5zz8xx9tnkxa0rT3H__EvyFzxC_j4t5jR3xgkR_ZuGzwObRBZVpAkO1iGDjrLiU8-2_e4vxUJBw8Sc-ce6jhDBEbxhB6CZ2kwymDGSJGVPqtrCHrA3muKOEFduPw5s_hft_oNrSdiwrMCne76Cycf2m4zFllhhW8UIJc2dF0iXQ22kqTFbsmmSnd6I5P6u_gWNjLVYhovv4NJw-9G9Rs_FCqjf5tpWxcRL1oEc0KbGiDRb8cg55bKhykzEr2TJFcld31HNisB7icYKi7cKf8dS-MKNWr3uPkKDNfxtrJiI49CYyV78vrMrvayHQOMkg)

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=302c628ac73c4c03b075b9539c782541&_e=WgbUzi-TIdOX6sxI0g67sHsYdiTx9Sigo7j0Df-8SzUqJGDf855VGa8Nwqk1socvLheoR-4hZewfkQ_olz7NEuJfLsAZ-929OI8qpiZlRne6jpuyvtCEnkCSGS_aF5DBx5zz8xx9tnkxa0rT3H__EvyFzxC_j4t5jR3xgkR_ZuGzwObRBZVpAkO1iGDjrLiU8-2_e4vxUJBw8Sc-ce6jhDBEbxhB6CZ2kwymDGSJGVPqtrCHrA3muKOEFduPw5s_hft_oNrSdiwrMCne76Cycf2m4zFllhhW8UIJc2dF0iVJ5cRJknkQfopqvCLiLUYC3owdZmcyoIekKNDUdUsbBNUPH0gqCt_sk0DoTgSrYv0CtsB6xdD8B9qwu4HxGdbCRAVNImuItzEEydbzVSFRRQm-uuMMOlyloM4wOX7WI7Y8VnO-hcEpwn5K76uJLye3)
\- Vivek

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** | Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Kate Roberts, Powered By People
subject: Wow!!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Sorry for the late email. But we just got off of Zoom
with Beto and have some GREAT news to share with you:

Over 13 thousand volunteers joined our 2024 Volunteer Kickoff tonight!
Folks from every part of Texas and over a dozen other states signed up to
do the tough work that’s necessary to help Democrats win up and down the
ballot in Texas.

Beto will reach out soon with a more detailed recap, but we couldn’t wait
to share the news that with tonight’s showing, we are on track to lead the
LARGEST progressive voter registration campaign in Texas!

Since there is no online or automatic voter registration in our state, we
are going to mail, text, call, and — most importantly — meet eligible but
unregistered Democrats at their doors and in their communities to help
them register to vote before next year’s election.

We’re sorry you couldn’t join us tonight — but you can sign up for one of
our upcoming volunteer trainings below:

TEXTING TEAM TRAININGS
Help us text unregistered voters!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60373?t=1001&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Wednesday, December 6th at 6PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60374?t=1002&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Sunday, December 10th at 2:00PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60375?t=1003&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Tuesday, December 12th at 12:00PM CT

VOLUNTEER DEPUTY REGISTRAR (VDR) TRAININGS
If you live in Texas, become a VDR to register Texas voters!

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60376?t=1004&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Friday, December 8th at 12:00PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60377?t=1005&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Monday, December 11th at 12:00PM CT
[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60378?t=1006&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4 ]Thursday, December 14th at 5:30PM CT

We couldn’t be more grateful that so many people are signing up to spend
their time and energy on winning these elections and turning the tide of
extremism in Texas.

Thanks for being a part of this.

Kate Roberts
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=235919%2E444211%2ECec1R4

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

| | Peter,

Four days after the U.S. Supreme Court overruled Roe v. Wade, Governor Evers and I announced a lawsuit regarding Wis. Stat. § 940.04, the law that a number of people have regarded as a broad ban on abortion.

Today, a Dane County Circuit Court judge issued a decision declaring that “Wis. Stat. § 940.04 does not prohibit abortions.”

This decision can be appealed, and it’s highly unlikely that it will be the last decision from a court regarding Wis. Stat. § 940.04.

**But this is a big win.**

I’m proud to be standing up for reproductive freedom in Wisconsin.

Josh | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74648930/442240790/658397360?refcode=231205embttn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mjk3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDkzYzE5ZC1lMDkzLWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1UC2qYJdrjw_QwBMiTMTdAfCmE6BR7bLzw7p1aUuIWs=)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Four days after the U.S. Supreme Court overruled Roe v. Wade, Governor Evers and I announced a lawsuit regarding Wis. Stat. § 940.04, the law that a number of people have regarded as a broad ban on abortion. Today, a Dane County Circuit Court judge issued a decision declaring that “Wis. Stat. § 940.04 does not prohibit abortions.” This decision can be appealed, and it’s highly unlikely that it will be the last decision from a court regarding Wis. Stat. § 940.04. But this is a big win. I’m proud to be standing up for reproductive freedom in Wisconsin. Josh | = * | | Paid for by Kaul for Attorney General | Kaul for Attorney General PO Box 5522 Madison, WI 53705 United States | If you would like to no longer receive campaign updates, click here to .

| | Patriot - I just wrapped up my town hall in Iowa with Sean Hannity.

---
And what can I say, speaking directly with voters like _YOU_ is my favorite part of the job!

That’s why no matter how many schemes of Election Interference Crooked Joe and the Communist Democrats concoct, or however many courtrooms they force me into as an innocent man, I’ll ALWAYS be right back out on the campaign trail doing what I LOVE most.

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: it’s time to turn up the heat
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

Should abortionists be allowed to leave babies who survive abortion on cold hospital tables, kicking and screaming for their mothers, until their lifeless bodies are thrown in the garbage?

Without any federal laws protecting their lives, little boys and girls who survive botched abortions face a slow, excruciating, torturous death – until their little bodies are trashed like worthless medical waste.

And the Abortion Lobby, President Joe Biden, Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer (D-NY), and the rest of Planned Parenthood’s puppets in Congress are all _secretly_ battling to keep things this way!

And they’re scared stiff the American people will find out about it – **especially with 2024 right around the corner.**

That’s why I’m counting on you to click here and sign your **[_“END INFANTICIDE NOW!” Petition_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-y/)** right away!

And once you sign your petition, please consider making your most **[_generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even $10_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-j/)** to support _Students for Life Action’s_ critical work.

Your support will help us turn up the pressure on the U.S. Senate where pro-abortion Democrats hold the majority and are desperately trying to kill the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act_ (H.R. 26) without so much as a public vote.

As you’ll see, your petition INSISTS that every U.S. Senator agree to co-sponsor and seek roll-call votes on the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act._

### **## [< < SIGN YOUR “END INFANTICIDE NOW!” PETITION > > ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-i/)**
Pro-Life Friend, it's hard to believe that any human being – even a politician – could be so cold as to not support the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act,_ which would ensure that infants born alive after a botched abortion receive proper medical care.

Sadly, when the bill came up for a vote in the House earlier this year, all but one Democrat voted against it.

__This bill should have passed the House through a unanimous vote_._

This is nothing but pure evil, and it exposes the length pro-abortion Democrats will go to appease their Planned Parenthood puppet masters!

And that’s why we must send a message to every U.S. Senator that they either pass the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act_ or face defeat at the polls.

**Your IMMEDIATE action is critical!**

Click here to sign your **[“END INFANTICIDE NOW!” Petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-d/)** and let the U.S. Senate know they’ve been put on notice!

Pro-Life Friend, if pro-abortion Senators want to vote against this bill, let them.

Let them try to explain to the American people why they support infanticide in 2024!

Let them argue that it’s better for a baby who has been born alive to die alone than receive medical care.

**It’ll be political suicide!**

They’ll pay a BIG price at the polls – if we can force them on record.

### **## [< < SIGN YOUR “END INFANTICIDE NOW!” PETITION > > ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-h/)**
With pro-abortion forces holding a slim Senate majority, the only way you and I can force a vote on the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Act_ is by turning up the HEAT!

So, please sign your **[“END INFANTICIDE NOW!” petition](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-k/)** to the US Senate demanding that they pass this and save the lives of countless babies.

**[And if you could, please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ today to help us gather more signatures](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-u/)!**

Our elected officials need to be held accountable.

If they aren’t, then they’ll vote for the interests of whoever hands them the check with the most zeros on it – and right now, that’s the Abortion Lobby.

The good news is, if we can gather enough grassroots pressure, we can EXPOSE just how evil the pro-abortion radicals really are!

**But we have to act now!**

**[So, please sign your “END INFANTICIDE NOW” petition to the U.S. Senate demanding that they pass the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-o/).**

Thank you for everything you do for Life.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, Students for Life Action

P.S. – Since the House of Representatives passed the _Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act_ (H.R. 26) – which ensures infants born alive after a botched abortion receive proper medical care – the Abortion Lobby has become bolder than ever.

A bill like this shouldn’t draw a partisan split, but it proves how deep in the back pockets of the Abortion Lobby many members of Congress are.

With the fight now heading to the Senate, your action has never been more important.

**[So, please sign your “END INFANTICIDE NOW!” petition to your U.S. Senators, demanding they pass this life-saving legislation](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-b/).**

**[And if you could, please consider making your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_ today to help us put even more pressure on our Senators](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-n/)!**

### **## [< < SIGN YOUR “END INFANTICIDE NOW!” PETITION > > ](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-sthdyx-duchtdja-p/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Burning the midnight oil
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
It’s going to be a late night tonight, but this is what it takes to save America.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=d1eef0db9246485e97c96251c657810d&_e=Ep5fBLG0MdwP-c-ia7MNVPdddZ_Ql6IcmqbYVclJ3GaU9AKv0cIYPMNDX3Py9U69CUgdeOUIH_kBp_ur0JrkuCftXXkFpFuAd3GgAuMOQY9MKxvks_1ewox3tx9haFYn0b1ZTpe0ev_DkXVxBJfz7BIJ6-eDEe5DbhwLrUOKrxiGY_RAePuSunViJpH0m7WfTb_Ccms77-DWcicXiBEIt41fwoCdSsQywcjOQhujLoLx2YZWZ93FgZ-c1Z_cVkeK9rHF-T4nWU5MKOEnr9_BEbCgpnZz6y_Y59B2sTEwtXWrWXan9b2-j0Uvf_LIkUU9v_rLhzbcVQ7-3hmZ3v6RxdekDxtrqr3r1I6ryWRT4D5c90xni_gxGF6ZXTw5al2n-qu8qtCOvKNKFJRKzKNInZ6tIqaS8to2ZiiSTKYOlD4BZJd5E464b82ZkhKrpMzkq-TyaNmR6HKYXHXkPUk0eUgEdYbbk0ezgwSj9v3U0wvIkvlR9NU4FDu4OxAwnBKB)
---
| | Patriot,

---
I apologize for writing to you so late, but your favorite President is ALWAYS working!
---
Wouldn’t you like to hear that I was up late working on an incredible policy plan to fix our country or a plan to beat Crooked Joe in the most important battleground states?
---

Wouldn’t you like to hear that I was up late working on an incredible policy plan to fix our country or a plan to beat Crooked Joe in the most important battleground states? But sadly, I am burning the midnight oil because tomorrow a Soros-funded network will appear before a State Supreme Court to try and REMOVE my name from the 2024 ballot. If that happens, George Soros will immediately order his left-wing minions to use the Colorado ruling to challenge us in the remaining 49 states. It would end with a Supreme Court showdown. But I vow to fight back, just as I always have. The Democrats still don’t understand who they’re up against. I’ve been (wrongfully) arrested FOUR TIMES – and I have never been more determined to win this final battle to save America. There is NOTHING the Left can do to stop me from finishing our mission to Make America Great Again! Of course, as I so often say, and will never stop saying, if you are doing poorly during these uncertain times in Crooked Joe’s America, please don’t donate. | | Thank you, Donald J. * * *

## **Experts Say THIS Devastating "Crisis" Will Cause World War III**
Although the mainstream media seems afraid to say it, WW3 could be around the corner..._but the cause may not be what you think._ Unlike our recent wars which were fought mostly over oil, this next war will be fought over a much more precious commodity...**DRINKING WATER!** NASA recently warned that we're facing a "once in 1,000 year" megadrought that could **last up to 100 years**. Unfortunately, the drought is already underway and most Americans will be BLINDSIDED by the coming impacts to their way of life. As you know, we need water for hydration, but we also need it for growing crops and for generating electricity. Once this megadrough hits its peak..._which could happen in the next year_...countries will go to war over it! But it may not just be countries going to war. We could even see a **second civil war** over this! _In the very near future, water could become more precious than GOLD!_ The government, the rich and even your neighbors will **FIGHT** over access to it. name: Your America
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37559%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rXvRB6ViJcjM0d659HTN1g&sysid=1) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration’s weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That’s why I’m asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xmoYbu5I4Y0%2fGm2Yzi6Xmg&sysid=1)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today’s ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America’s great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America’s leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include “The Politicization of the Department of Justice” by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we’ve seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37550%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xmoYbu5I4Y0%2fGm2Yzi6Xmg&sysid=1)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9678%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=NwZ8LRZXPRokh0Qs1zqT9A&sysid=1)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Survey on the Department of Justice
body:
The survey will only take a few moments of your time

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9aus41jc1r8t24khtkdr2nion3adjod9na61gn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3hm2o32c5h2bs) Dear Friend, Before you move on to your next email--I would appreciate it if you would take a few moments to participate in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the Department of Justice.** The survey will only take a few moments of your time, and its subject affects your liberty and the very survival of the rule of law in America. **The current administration 's weaponization of the Department of Justice is unprecedented in American history.** Instead of protecting your God-given constitutional rights, the administration uses the Department of Justice to attack its political opponents... ...as well as Christians, parents, and anyone who dares to stand up for our constitutional liberties. At the same time, with the help of the media it...
* Covers up a two-tiered justice system that violates your constitutional rights

* Hides the corruption of the ruling class

* Attacks those with traditional viewpoints

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Survey on the Department of Justice.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans like you on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including the importance of the rule of law and checks and balances, which the American Founders saw as essential safeguards against corruption. Friend, you can complete the National Survey on the Department of Justice by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjv1f4kd1p8728tek489v1iug6dh5018dtkhr530_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3hm2o32c5h2bs)** The **Declaration of Independence** argues that **the purpose of just government is to secure our natural rights** and that **just government is founded on the consent of the governed.** Yet today's ruling class regularly disregards the will of the American people, and our rights--to the freedoms of speech, assembly, and religion, to due process, to gun ownership, and more--are under constant attack. **You and I know that liberty in America is under serious threat. But as I travel around the country, I tell the audiences I speak to how we are engaging in the fight against this threat.** A vital part of our efforts in this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens, with the TRUTH about America's great heritage of liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching bright and principled students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who receive a rigorous, **classical liberal arts education, including** a required course on the Constitution

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.4 million homes and businesses ten times per year; previous issues include "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn, on topics such as the Constitution, American history, and free market economics

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide

After everything we've seen over the past few years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing our **National Survey on the Department of Justice** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. Your completed survey will help us form the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College is almost unique in American higher education in its refusal to accept EVEN ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. But it also means that our work depends entirely on the generous support of private citizens, like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.** If you agree that we are now seeing an unprecedented assault on the American way of life, I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the attached **National Survey on the Department of Justice** , which you can access at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/department-of-justice-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zerg89ptb30d5cv30rnvp5dfvca1rvq0370dqi18_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3hm2o32c5h2bs)** Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed survey, and I sincerely appreciate your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: Paris 'Under Threat from Islamist Terrorism', French Minister Says After Terrorist Stabbing Attack
body:
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2VnbWVudD0zNDEyOTIifQ/WBW8Gpq-ez5XReqMtjS8hg)
---
# **[Paris 'Under Threat from Islamist Terrorism', French Minister Says After Terrorist Stabbing Attack](http://trk.libertyledger.-A2Rumf4i1Nw)**
---
French Interior Minister Gérald Darmanin has declared that France is “durably under threat from Islamist terrorism” following a stabbing incident near the Eiffel Tower. The attacker, Armand Rajabpour-Miyandoab, a 26-year-old French national of Iranian descent, fatally stabbed a German tourist and injured two others. According to France’s top anti-terrorism prosecutor, Rajabpour-Miyandoab recorded a video in ...
**Read More**
[](http://trk.libertyledger.-FeVDlA)
# **[These people are so happy to be DINKs (Dual Income No Kids) that they've started a trend bragging about how fun their lives are](http://trk.libertyledger.-FeVDlA)**
---
I realize pride is a sin, but I'm still having trouble understanding what these people have to be proud of here. They're DINKs (Dual Income No Kids) which means they're forever college kids with no responsibilities whatsoever — well, besides the dog; the dog can be very tough to care for.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-FeVDlA)

House Republicans on Tuesday confronted the leaders of elite universities about the anti-Israel protests that have swept the universities' campuses since the Oct. 7 terror attacks that killed more than 1,200 Israelis

# **[GOP Senator Slams Biden For Weak Response to Iran Provocations](http://trk.libertyledger.)**

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Let's do this again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=ce04b1e04a66270fb7667e60831823393bcf8966ddbfeac59d30c49007b6b9d42745b73ac4b603490f57932719fb0d1b373b97082ff7b0c90a65ab3a65b3bb8748c853b4b38667261965fa23d91c655a
