Friend, it's Ron DeSantis.

Tonight is the last time we'll be taking the debate stage for the year. After that, our team is racing to the Iowa caucuses!

I'm ready to finish out the first stage of this race and keep moving forward at a record pace, but to succeed, I'm going to need your help tonight.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb2e52612de6feed1d3e3d4b0e637a09ccffd6ada8b1ae45dd3baada2535172e7b7d92d7de1dd9d771aa40cbf6029d70deede80b6e97296c465
Send in $20.24

The stakes have never been higher. This election is our last chance to get America back on track before Joe Biden and the liberal elite make America unrecognizable. We have a chance to make sure this never becomes our reality, but only if the Republican party comes together NOW.

On that stage, you WON'T see a former President who thinks you owe him your vote, but you will see a CCP empathizer who idolizes Hillary Clinton. And you'll see me: rising above the fray, fighting for YOU, winning for us, and leading the Republican party toward our American comeback.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb22a4501a3fa2d7d4ff1d918ede92f45ce53dfc256224581c6dd3b05ab523a5b3184dd6e98311f368967f7faa82b60df7d538823c2c2727e69
I am counting on you tonight. We have what it takes and it's time to show it.

I'm ready to fight, win, and lead.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb22a4501a3fa2d7d4ff1d918ede92f45ce53dfc256224581c6dd3b05ab523a5b3184dd6e98311f368967f7faa82b60df7d538823c2c2727e69

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb22a4501a3fa2d7d4ff1d918ede92f45ce53dfc256224581c6dd3b05ab523a5b3184dd6e98311f368967f7faa82b60df7d538823c2c2727e69

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb2e0b448e9d54ff636922a59f45c7dde36e98e3037be82bc5d727cdd073d4537bb709abbc7f0dedb08e4105e8f2e0a8fd175356eb4c14a292b
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb22a4501a3fa2d7d4ff1d918ede92f45ce53dfc256224581c6dd3b05ab523a5b3184dd6e98311f368967f7faa82b60df7d538823c2c2727e69

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4e259412c8e5bdb22a4501a3fa2d7d4ff1d918ede92f45ce53dfc256224581c6dd3b05ab523a5b3184dd6e98311f368967f7faa82b60df7d538823c2c2727e69

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: James Carville
subject: Democrats are in BIG trouble
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
It’s not looking good
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta83182aa-a70f-44c2-9728-0cb9ce4831cb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter – I’ve worked in politics for half a century, so believe me when I tell you: **Democrats are in BIG trouble.** The 2024 Senate map is the toughest one I’ve ever seen. Our razor-thin majority is hanging on by a single thread, and there’s no question that Mitch McConnell and his extremist cronies will use every trick up their sleeves to snatch back power.**** **The GOP is coming at us with full force – and with experts saying that Nevada could once again decide Senate control, they’re zeroing in on Jacky Rosen as a TOP target for defeat. Now, brand new polling shows the Nevada Senate race in a statistical dead heat!!! It’s not looking good, Peter.** [**Jacky needs to raise another $3,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP attacks and fuel her campaign forward – but the ONLY way she can get there is with your immediate grassroots support. So PLEASE, will you split a $20 donation between her campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec0374e3-6a79-428e-8533-f308b11f6de7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Democrats won in Nevada by less than 1% last year, making it the closest Senate race in the entire country. Now that they have a second chance at winning in Nevada, Republicans aren’t going to leave anything up to chance – and they’re already pulling out all of the stops to flip this seat. **If Jacky loses in Nevada, McConnell and his far-right posse will take back the majority and enact their dangerous, out-of-touch agenda. We CANNOT let this happen.** In my expert opinion, we CAN win this race and keep control of the Senate – but that starts with raising the resources, today, to prepare for the tough fight ahead. [**So please, Peter, I’m asking you one more time before the midnight deadline: Will you chip in as much as you can spare to Jacky’s campaign and Blue Amp Action now to help her win in Nevada and defend our majority?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td43d1941-e829-45e8-b9c3-667d9e3aec3a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **** Thank you for being part of this incredible team. I’ve seen many grassroots campaigns in my lifetime, and I know this one has what it takes to win. James Carville
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---

---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7577e838-1727-4c8f-a4e5-9ae422785114/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

subject: Win a Shotgun This Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
Help me win this highly targeted seat and you could very well win a $3,000 Benelli 828 U 12 Gauge

I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | |
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686714%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ugYo66bHJ9MjIDFueRXwzQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Friend,
Christmas is almost here, and there's no better way to celebrate our freedoms and rights as Americans than by protecting our Second Amendment.
As a proud America First conservative candidate running to represent Georgia's 2nd Congressional District, I am thrilled to announce a unique opportunity to win a free shotgun when you support my campaign!
**[By making a modest donation to my campaign today, you will be automatically enrolled for a chance to win a $3,000 Benelli 828 U 12 gauge shotgun!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686725%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3Mcz7182BLvqpTVFq3s1Ww&sysid=1)**
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686726%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sWGbXlfoPWH5dcyLWfsXGA&sysid=1)

| | | [PROTECT THIS HOUSE, WIN A SHOTGUN](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686727%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a2QQ1eTJasZess0glr0NHQ&sysid=1)
---

Your support here will not only get you a shot at this top-quality shotgun, it will power our efforts to flip Georgia's 2nd Congressional District Red for the first time since 1875!

With your support, we can hold Washington DC accountable, drain the swamp, and ensure our beloved nation remains the land of the free and the home of the brave.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to win an amazing shotgun this Christmas and help me restore America First leadership in Congress.

**[Pitch in to help me win my seat, and you’ll automatically enter to win a Benelli 828 U 12 gauge shotgun.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686728%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OEjzN5XWkdDwZkuQYAtuXg&sysid=1)**

| | | [ENTER TO WIN A $3,000 SHOTGUN](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686729%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eSrYoqy%2fKgtrkeqCKRwmow&sysid=1)
---

From my family to yours, I wish you a Merry Christmas and a safe, prosperous New Year filled with joy, warmth, and the invincible spirit of American freedom.

God Bless and good luck!

Chuck Hand

America First Candidate for Congress, GA-2

# News
We are excited for our upcoming Christmas Party. Come and have a great time. Many are choosing to wear Christmas outfits to increase the fun of the night. We will also have professional photos. We will have two Republicans of the year awards to hand out.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Rise and shine.
body:
It’s debate #4
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~)
---

Friend,

TONIGHT, I will participate in one of my most important campaign milestones yet - the Fourth presidential debate.

As I prepare for tonight, I wanted to let you know that I am proud of our accomplishments. Thanks to grassroots support, our momentum is at an all time high, we're **SURGING** in the polls, and we're closer than ever to _**VICTORY!**_

_But with this surge in momentum comes higher stakes for our campaign, especially during tonight 's debate. _**[That's why I've set a bold goal of raising 8,000 NEW donations before I take the stage, and I need your help to make it happen.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~ "That's why I've set a bold goal of raising 8,000 NEW donations before I take the stage, and I need your help to make it happen.")**

---
| | [HELP CRUSH OUR 8K DEBATE GOAL](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~)
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~)
---

**Here 's why reaching this goal is critical:**
1.) The fourth debate is a **HUGE** milestone that will be an important opportunity to share my vision for our country with even more voters and build on our momentum even more.
2.) If we can hit our debate day goal, it will be **KEY** to showing the strength of our movement, providing my campaign with the necessary resources to amplify my message even further _**AFTER**_ the debate, **and proving to the American people that we are in it to WIN IT!**
**[Will you step up with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join me in my fight for America's future before I take the stage in just a few hours?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~ "Will you step up with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join me in my fight for America’s future before I take the stage in just a few hours? ")**

I wouldn't be asking for your help if this wasn't such a pivotal moment for our campaign, Friend, but I can't rest when so much is at stake.

_**We have a country to save! **_

Thank you for being an invaluable source of support.

---
My very best,
---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ITxcpgguQTf3JnRlh7GA6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RcAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~~)

Nikki Haley

| | [GET YOUR BUTTON](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8EfNw3dH1xtzxvIw5bPew~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RlAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9kZWJhdGUtYnV0dG9uLWZvb3Rlci1mb3VydGgtdHY_~~ "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hpXhop1EBwOn9zlDkhUxBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RfAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hpXhop1EBwOn9zlDkhUxBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RfAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/hpXhop1EBwOn9zlDkhUxBw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnUu6EP4RfAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~~ "DONATE")

name: Bob MacGuffie
subject: Jim Himes Still Won't Freeze Funding to Iran
body:
Campaign Update
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Campaign Update
---
| |
---
| | |
---
December 6, 2023 The October 7th Hamas attack and massacre of Israeli innocents in their homes occurred in the aftermath of Iran's release of five long-held hostages to the U.S. The U.S. had freed up some $6 billion to Iran in exchange for their freedom. The exorbitant payment was considered by many observers as a highly controversial act, which only rewarded and incentivized terrorism. So much so, that last week Speaker Mike Johnson put up [H.R. 5961:](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nV3sn48nu3xrHeSN03TbnkwsF68dqGwNk0jIAUbXFcKKHLMsbMAPRT14tbIk_DpWd6HhOvkwy9vRdI6Tu5nC_o0YdbphA9aWuv9s8vcajJ-oKEyjDQ5F0Y_07U7PzwWIoOUp662g8jH3wAa6MgrZgZd0b9accljTo6k2Tk4IAiM5LubtGdDAzvge4SnFyC8G&c=LP84Mm6N-QkRlq8WkonBb5vItqRMyWucCDGvEy4BhEiZxWtXK_rHbA==&ch=VxHiVhVttVNDWywS5Sxh9WtUDakH3hT6MzM9y-SX1Qzr3Hw9Z3L-Iw==) No Funds for Iranian Terrorism Act for a vote, in an effort to withhold what funds were yet to be transferred. The Bill passed 307-119, and almost predictably, Jim Himes voted AGAINST the Bill! It's a virtual certainty that Iran was involved in both the training and financing of the attack - and that really changed the complexion of an already odorous and supplicatory hostage deal. Iran had been financially hamstrung with international sanctions until the Biden Administration lifted them in 2021. Since that point at least $50 billion has been released by the U.S. to Iran before the hostage payment. Flush once again, Iran re-commenced what it does best - fund, train, instigate and direct terrorists and terrorism across the greater Middle East. It only took two years and Iran's cat's-paw, Hamas, committed the greatest atrocity against the Jewish people since the holocaust of the 1940s. In addition, just one month ago, the House took a vote on 'H.R. 6126: Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act'. The Bill passed - but not with Jim Himes' vote - Himes voted AGAINST Israeli aid in their hour of need. I took him to task on that despicable vote in a [Campaign Update](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nV3sn48nu3xrHeSN03TbnkwsF68dqGwNk0jIAUbXFcKKHLMsbMAPRT14tbIk_DpWDuZeYDf5qfTZRs7CcDesY_VHKwnImr72CmStUwqjXPGJLOR2v80jFsMEF4KjLPr42YgMY9WYi4mAH4gPJxdqig==&c=LP84Mm6N-QkRlq8WkonBb5vItqRMyWucCDGvEy4BhEiZxWtXK_rHbA==&ch=VxHiVhVttVNDWywS5Sxh9WtUDakH3hT6MzM9y-SX1Qzr3Hw9Z3L-Iw==) a couple weeks back. So, within one month Mr. Himes has had the opportunity to vote for both an aid package to Israel, plus a vote to stop any further funding to Israel's mortal enemy, Iran - and Jim Himes votes AGAINST the interests of Israel in both cases. Many serious foreign policy analysts equate the fight for Israel's survival as the first domino in an ultimate fight for Western Civilization itself. I don't know who Jim Himes thinks he REPRESENTS in this horrific chapter, but it's not his constituents who believe the civilized democracies of the West must be preserved, protected and defended. I suspect both these votes would pass by a wide margin of the citizens of CT-4. This man was hired to vote in Congress on our behalf - and he fails us fundamentally and profoundly on a monthly basis. We don't have to put up with this failure.
Jim Himes is NO Moderate
The 2024 election will be a referendum on this man's failed 15-year rule.

clean_body: Campaign Update | | | | | | | | Campaign Update | | | | | December 6, 2023 The October 7th Hamas attack and massacre of Israeli innocents in their homes occurred in the aftermath of Iran's release of five long-held hostages to the U.S. The U.S. had freed up some $6 billion to Iran in exchange for their freedom. The exorbitant payment was considered by many observers as a highly controversial act, which only rewarded and incentivized terrorism. So much so, that last week Speaker Mike Johnson put up == No Funds for Iranian Terrorism Act for a vote, in an effort to withhold what funds were yet to be transferred. The Bill passed 307-119, and almost predictably, Jim Himes voted AGAINST the Bill! It's a virtual certainty that Iran was involved in both the training and financing of the attack - and that really changed the complexion of an already odorous and supplicatory hostage deal. Iran had been financially hamstrung with international sanctions until the Biden Administration lifted them in 2021. Since that point at least $50 billion has been released by the U.S. to Iran before the hostage payment. Flush once again, Iran re-commenced what it does best - fund, train, instigate and direct terrorists and terrorism across the greater Middle East. It only took two years and Iran's cat's-paw, Hamas, committed the greatest atrocity against the Jewish people since the holocaust of the 1940s. In addition, just one month ago, the House took a vote on 'H.R. 6126: Israel Security Supplemental Appropriations Act'. The Bill passed - but not with Jim Himes' vote - Himes voted AGAINST Israeli aid in their hour of need. I took him to task on that despicable vote in a == a couple weeks back. So, within one month Mr. Himes has had the opportunity to vote for both an aid package to Israel, plus a vote to stop any further funding to Israel's mortal enemy, Iran - and Jim Himes votes AGAINST the interests of Israel in both cases. Many serious foreign policy analysts equate the fight for Israel's survival as the first domino in an ultimate fight for Western Civilization itself. I don't know who Jim Himes thinks he REPRESENTS in this horrific chapter, but it's not his constituents who believe the civilized democracies of the West must be preserved, protected and defended. I suspect both these votes would pass by a wide margin of the citizens of CT-4. This man was hired to vote in Congress on our behalf - and he fails us fundamentally and profoundly on a monthly basis. We don't have to put up with this failure. Jim Himes is NO Moderate The 2024 election will be a referendum on this man's failed 15-year rule. The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public showing an entirely different story to the lies they told.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=86afcd8207254b978942b44b86ae0578&_e=eH41TY-hLx1WCOkBDG7-bkhywQbQBqeHtbrtqtxK5PVE3O34V9q5LN21zKanwXxsNuRTksg2x1xKp3fdhXswVU2C8o_H8hEXYDFmG8MxV4bTIpzDnNOSrDOze5ZjtHhOQIEVbyd7gZFPFrgEVSIYgcHyZcFCE7AqwLpS2p2p4LJMdRaIlxiB1-eDdDWrjbayFJTeA2l0wsW4hi-n1Ibt07Xq8BQDCYi6qv44VFM0iamFYX0iRby64dr879t-E2uO "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi lied about January 6.

Liz Chaney lied about January 6.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

That’s why we came to the United States of America! ttps://secure.winred.com/george-logan-for-congress/announcement-video/?recurring=true&amount=25 But it wasn’t easy, Peter. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Shut Down Toxic Shell Plant
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175785?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: A Pennsylvania community is breathing in excess and ILLEGAL toxins from a Shell plastics plant!**[**_Sign the petition to SHUT DOWN the toxic factory!_ **](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175786?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) The facility has reported at least **53 malfunctions,** including one just two weeks after opening that **turned the night sky orange.** Imagine the terror of seeing _**flames shooting into the sky**_ and an _**ominous glow over your neighborhood,**_ wondering what you and your children are breathing. In just over a year of operation, this Shell Plastics plant in Beaver County, Pennsylvania has _**repeatedly violated air pollution limits.**_ That’s why a local coalition of neighbors and environmental activists is calling on the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental protection to SHUT DOWN the Shell plant until its pollution is under control. [_**Friend, will you support the community demands and help HALT OPERATIONS at this toxic Shell Plastics plant? We need at least 37 more signatures from your area to hit our goal!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175787?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175788?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There’s no reason to believe Shell is making any effort to protect the people of Beaver County or the surrounding environment. In fact, Shell has a long history of denying the impacts of its pollution – including **burying its own science** about climate change in the 80s. Now, its executives are raking in more profits as their plastic plant repeatedly shatters emissions limits.
**More people are breathing in Shell’s toxins every second the plant remains in operation.** That’s why we need YOUR help right now to support local demands. [_**Please, Friend, tell the Pennsylvania Department of Environmental protection to SHUT DOWN Shells plastics plant before the situation gets even worse!**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175789?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2175788?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Paloma Henriques
Senior petrochemical campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

# WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 6, 2023
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1877, Thomas Edison made the first phonograph recording by reciting "Mary Had a Little Lamb." Edison re-recorded the historic event on film for the 50th anniversary in 1927. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAUAL_G3oKe38PYHjy0ihgqpWubCTlgB1cmjsCA-PsqnbveSSfd16W7uJji4_7pJm9LyJ3rS9x8J_DUnJC6mg82eI-euLdCgdBKGEl8tEZKkHoALVE6kFoKSQKVAzRBD6Hn0SIgCYRGCAAwlVHaGQKCoG4kTc9q8EMsea5-cnyU0Yd05M3PVZ8nnuxYynNh9MawZdju-14deS3rzb_8i7jSj4zajdH5-v59rFf8QMgMm8LoLBY-2-G5x5Ti0ihWw31yMf21y7-nvwEAAP__2w5RhA)) If you haven't signed up for _The Flyover_ yet, you can take care of that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuszAQAOCnsbeg8x0YPHj4pYjpp2tHZMwB1xocETdV376qOjb7N32vwzgESXKsL2FnX5Y8hljkwaPBi70gjbWe_cKMTJq9acF0rXEN6c3TRNDNs-XGGMvQNREjTm6KZMAtE2vxCEgGwRoDAK5ybRccAcHSTtS4qGrgWUo-q7csR9l4SV_5wWcV866T30q53RX9U9gr7P8Shf0QVon_5Xj_MdSzout8-5SU5G5bVcO6B0m_1n6UXdG1Bn3650aXpwHfAQAA__-5vFrB). ## Student Academic Skills Drop Worldwide
Teenagers' math and reading skills are in [an unprecedented decline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LuS4yAQheGnQRkqbroQEGyizJtuqMJNS-odBC7AVvntpzzxpOckX_3_buvNU6S0__Unurbl1UOjF65S8ZErvZouuA1Roe7QyUnIeZJ20N3hjLTGQoBpMODH8T5vsM06gPfgDc5jR04JpaUSo5RCCNvbafZWCy226a4HC8wIDNRy6f9nSu3ALb7zC0sP-eyiO1p7VKb_MLUwtVzX1Rd8Niz183-WXGJgajl9O_D0jaDygj5Q2nn9ohgrf6ZHQcCAqWHgASFSQt4Qk9-xVJ4RAq_P8sI3_2C5VFwMTC1dceFxUYxUx4kZsZ-e4o-r_VrpOwAA___I7Wqa) across dozens of countries, according to the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development. More than 40 nations saw declines. In the U.S., math scores dropped 13 points to one of the lowest marks ever recorded. However, U.S. students scored above the global average in reading and science. [Here's a chart comparing them.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uszAUQJ_GbKD7AzgePHwLW761I7rBl8SVwVHshPbtq3TufKRzdD7O81liivv1v2zq65pnWWp86YzUji3x3DfBr6qk3KhHC3iy6AZubh6t9rwMFsUOfOIA47KKG3nEIEiOmugJiJFgRAQA1zl7EsfAsNoLD24xPWiINT-6zxz3etM1feeXProlb03yt1rvxfA_Q5Oh6TiOTr5iLm9qaHq7DU1IhiYYDE3P0pb6DLrX0t5jkfaa8kVSK6VoKZvutXn4cD9iSrGM1vRw3SSm31j9c_0nAAD__73pWEY) The OECD said the global performance drops were the steepest since 2000 when it first started testing 15-year-olds in reading, math, and science every three years. The group said the decline couldn't be blamed entirely on COVID school closures, pointing also to the need for extra teacher support and rising mobile phone use in classes.
## Tuberville Drops Hold on Military Promotions
GOP Sen. Tommy Tuberville [dropped his hold](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2OszAQAJ8GOiPvOvwVFF9Dl6-9Ehl7HfbkH2Q7QXn7U66-bqRpRvN13-6aPcfHfx1oqS5t2lR-0QYoBoFqu7V2cURIqqUFRgnTCHOv2mNRdge9g9NgEXBwvdH9ANNMI5phGF3LC0pUgHIAkFLO3TxOelZSSTfuqp9Nc5NkuabcfSeO9SDn3-lFuTMptH45aj1Lo_41uDa4XtfVxd1EusrHN7ieyXNlUxpcTYqPTOWDhaKoKYS3qM-d8ou9J2FzOos4krfieEabyRYR2HPV-S1iChyJisgmasAJ1NTmxZ4Xe89lGJubfATN_jer_jnpJwAA___8tWrl) on more than 400 military promotions Tuesday, and the Senate unanimously confirmed 425 of those nominees. Tuberville is still blocking 11 4-star generals. Despite heavy criticism, the Alabama senator has been blocking promotions for ten months in protest of a policy that allows service members to be reimbursed for abortion-related travel costs. That policy is still in place, and Tuberville says he hasn't given up his fight. But he agreed to let almost all pending promotions go through while still [blocking advancement for top generals.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAQQL8GNqLjcCAMDF28pWtHi9jncBWYCFNH-fsqnTs_PT3pfV2na-TM2_0zFgp9rVOcOx80aVRWoZkGuYSVCMlICtqBvjjtz0amYJYLnm2E20weVsBorZ-Ns95GcAPNkgMCGo1gtQYAf_LuEr0BA6u7mbOfxQC0cK_t9F1564nW_KoHtdNci8wh9f7YhfkQOAoce6LEOb-ZwDHVQhs9d4HjTlvsJHAczGDAOtV_btQOzplUo0xxJ5VqXlThzD22l3q0Wmrnur112cLyeHLOvFsnBriXyH8V2f_98RsAAP__aLphkg)
## Fourth GOP Debate Tonight on NewsNation
The fourth GOP presidential debate, now down to four candidates with Donald Trump abstaining again, [takes place tonigh](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LESnCAQxvGnwU4HFhUtLNLQXdqUzgrLuRkUI9w5vn3G1On-xVf85vv1ml_Ikff3T9xoKiHN6Ap_aVZQ9zXoua38FIiAdEWTMlINRo2drtbJab0s3vvBjYaoC0MIiwP0bjA-dNhXPIEErUD2Skkpx2Y0A45aahnMorvRiVaS55LO5nfivawU4p2-dDYubVWc1lKOLPQPAVaAva6r-WQsyeP9DATYXNJ5C7A7XVmAPVLkwu5JiuQKp_3pByHAKhBgZSvAesq4F871ipHu-sQN84XbXf_5YOTA5OuTjs8S2eFee1qwkABrlOlgMEZKI8BW5-SPi2Pk3BvRyveGHP_By39v_BsAAP__w6Fzrg)t on the fledgling NewsNation cable network. On stage will be Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, Vivek Ramaswamy, and Chris Christie. Trump [held a Town Hall](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7Fu7CAQheGnwR3WDNhgCorbuNvbprRYM6yJMKxssmTfPnLqlJ9OcfR_3Jabiynmx3-3k62hLG6t8UULCq64kMvQeRuIBMmOLGrASaMZZbdZHA3cUWn0Gob7KscJg1GkjMJ1Mjh00QoQEgUoRAAwvdGTMxIkBH2Xo1nZAORjLUf_WWKuG4X0Li86-rXsXbJbrc-TyX9MzEzMrbU-lO9M7bx2JuYUX8QvMzH7kl3yvB5f-5Of5DLfXM6xvnkt7UJK3WH9s8WU4qk0G-Cxu5h-r-qf4T8BAAD__7x4Wcg) on Fox News last night instead. NewsNation, and its sister CW Network, will telecast the debate starting at 8 p.m. ET. NewsNation [averaged only 99,000 viewers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFy6yAQRb9G6uSBXUlAQfEad35tSs0Ci70JFhqZ2OO_zyh1yjv3FGfOx2W5kBRZr__pzr7lulBs8uRFwzAPgMvYJ5-ZgbFnr43S1mg3YX_zAGR1xswWU6JAFDBZRwFCsKRn1YsHBahBzVorpdzJGUsOFapsAk4udqPiJK3up88qa7txLu_65P0U670v_tba9ujwXwfnDs60rfx6HNcx9iaxcAfnnbfvUCTSOnxxKe8hcaDGwwGv1KSug2OHwerJ2SlPPJrgNM0WQsRZm5hyv_u0vaQUecymG9X1TlJ-HdqfRX4CAAD__9-yYXw) in primetime in November, compared to Fox News' 1.73 million.

More than 40 nations saw declines. | | | | | | WEDNESDAY, DECEMBER 6, 2023 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1877, Thomas Edison made the first phonograph recording by reciting "Mary Had a Little Lamb." Edison re-recorded the historic event on film for the 50th anniversary in 1927. () If you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can take care of that . Today's edition is brought to you by Flightpath-- | Student Academic Skills Drop Worldwide Teenagers' math and reading skills are in across dozens of countries, according to the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development. More than 40 nations saw declines. In the U.S., math scores dropped 13 points to one of the lowest marks ever recorded. However, U.S. students scored above the global average in reading and science. The OECD said the global performance drops were the steepest since 2000 when it first started testing 15-year-olds in reading, math, and science every three years. The group said the decline couldn't be blamed entirely on COVID school closures, pointing also to the need for extra teacher support and rising mobile phone use in classes. Tuberville Drops Hold on Military Promotions GOP Sen. Tommy Tuberville on more than 400 military promotions Tuesday, and the Senate unanimously confirmed 425 of those nominees. Tuberville is still blocking 11 4-star generals. Despite heavy criticism, the Alabama senator has been blocking promotions for ten months in protest of a policy that allows service members to be reimbursed for abortion-related travel costs. That policy is still in place, and Tuberville says he hasn't given up his fight. But he agreed to let almost all pending promotions go through while still Fourth GOP Debate Tonight on NewsNation The fourth GOP presidential debate, now down to four candidates with Donald Trump abstaining again, on the fledgling NewsNation cable network. On stage will be Ron DeSantis, Nikki Haley, Vivek Ramaswamy, and Chris Christie. Trump on Fox News last night instead. NewsNation, and its sister CW Network, will telecast the debate starting at 8 p.m. ET. NewsNation in primetime in November, compared to Fox News' 1.73 million. | | | Hey Friend,

My finance team just let me know that we came up short on our November goal.

This is not good.

We are getting absolutely crushed in fundraising.

If things continue on this trajectory, I don't see how we hold on to this seat in November.

So my team has asked me to reach out to you with an offer to extend our deadline for one day only and offer a 15X match.

[EXTENDED DEADLINE: 15X MATCH FOR TODAY ONLY >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=96fe5c3c85364ff78b87bceaca8bce76&_e=im94hSJk2IxWhUmjccJmjcuHhrvWtsDbRPe4v7x_-_EYlE4QAQlSNANL78vzi6b6YLrMl_k7IBqqeIWQQXMkC4qMhctlcYGMZTr44IGJxthWblDf-5sbThWJPuryPAa9byzF9Q9plun2b9A7xLdNCP7HPnc4ejmuU6Q5WY0HX02nDYMVMBHsomjP2J3wB1hPfBvVp27dbJQ2xL7iDyIk7mqxdSVgT54L6WKIoJf0WDpjxMmndWOqikcToAhz00pAdk0ReUPbMbh2ONhm4E6EyWqiaTPu2c0DtaE5iyeQpzkvAlDFk3o31aVvfh6MHY61)

Of course, no investment is guaranteed, but the sheer potential of this situation for fast-acting investors is undeniable ... and worth a few minutes of your time to see it for yourself. I urge you to be prepared to move quickly, this is unfolding at breakneck speed. body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5012c9abc35348d9a5826c781b582b12&_e=9h5K3oq-DJHnkBNwZxra5Y9SVptf1HpStB_OZZko4QS5enMk4y_pWH_HIAMsVqDg3gLbioF6Cf8g8Qp1jssJ0sJSEZoiOnT6NQr10SUqPO-fpAgYYv_6oJZNiECUIa96wPggBzDtKXwz6TpTO0Ay7aPa06646qHXhRI6rYWGMx_6041VxEwsrydb7MuFzMEFlnL6E-JtsFY_EYUFXqQ5QgYt9_ltnrecONE7h6o8fZdzQ5_lrz2xAYhowyoxK13g9dBaErGRhobf4ykuJCGskpegWhXO-FRQv2H8O9TUKvWnWHJ7ab7Z48FM9jLr_an_TW7JbQ1IhUzfaZqVOL32E7FXrbO5l26gbyj4ofk0WtlVX6xuagMPAw1QjR9yOtmy)

____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5012c9abc35348d9a5826c781b582b12&_e=9h5K3oq-DJHnkBNwZxra5Y9SVptf1HpStB_OZZko4QS5enMk4y_pWH_HIAMsVqDg3gLbioF6Cf8g8Qp1jssJ0sJSEZoiOnT6NQr10SUqPO-fpAgYYv_6oJZNiECUIa96wPggBzDtKXwz6TpTO0Ay7aPa06646qHXhRI6rYWGMx_6041VxEwsrydb7MuFzMEFlnL6E-JtsFY_EYUFXqQ5Qrs_O4JY8qMOjLS8I0l14Avwa9fb99b7Zf-ebLsGB30yDpiRLc6mf-ImNZCyGbHzyhS9rwq2apQuFJaB3mohk8p_QLSm9YDzEyN5w3wCt7jWs_EZRaaYapoBloo2YSGlAqzEzMMr2IZqllPyYw7FuZwGreLycUxZ6zqTJSq2SdvE)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5012c9abc35348d9a5826c781b582b12&_e=9h5K3oq-DJHnkBNwZxra5Y9SVptf1HpStB_OZZko4QS5enMk4y_pWH_HIAMsVqDg3gLbioF6Cf8g8Qp1jssJ0sJSEZoiOnT6NQr10SUqPO-fpAgYYv_6oJZNiECUIa96wPggBzDtKXwz6TpTO0Ay7aPa06646qHXhRI6rYWGMx_6041VxEwsrydb7MuFzMEFlnL6E-JtsFY_EYUFXqQ5QuSm4k9foNp-GXZffdwVIkRE46F_Ks-8YXLGqwT0EpuPd0i_qURBEgtiXqVUeLojXqQd2TMlLlhW13Dbkej6GtCqfGWiH0LmmNkN53oOScCSOKbBEpK0OT1dGBBXnTRA62L-B5tundB8uV9nd7slakyKduTkla2za-ITnTmvgbpL).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Freedom Nation Today

name: =?utf-8?Q?Carolyn=20Rush=20For=20Congress?=
subject: Help unseat Jeff Van Drew’s bad economic policies
body:
The combination of technology, globalization and tax policy have combined to increase compensation and wealth for people at the top. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/carolynrushforcongress/economy-9426496?e=420896fe25)
---
,
The combination of technology, globalization and tax policy have combined to increase compensation and wealth for people at the top. CEOs and celebrities benefit while blue collar workers suffer from depressed wages.
My name is Carolyn Rush, and I am a Democratic mother of five who has spent over 3 decades working as an engineer. I’m running to represent New Jersey’s Second Congressional District in the United States House of Representatives.
My district is currently represented by a party-changing Republican who believes tax cuts for the wealthy are a good economic strategy. He has sworn allegiance to Donald Trump over the needs of the people he represents and our country overall. He’s fine with the ultra-wealthy getting richer while the working class get left behind - but I’m not!
| [CHIP IN TO SUPPORT A CANDIDATE WHO WILL FIGHT FOR AN ECONOMY THAT WORKS FOR ALL OF US](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=f9dee31a1d&e=420896fe25)
---
[](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=070598a68a&e=420896fe25)
I believe our economy should serve EVERYONE, not just the few at the very top. I support tax policies benefiting the middle class and low-income families as well as small businesses. I believe spending on technological innovations to fight climate change grows the economy by creating jobs in green energy sectors that pay good wages. I fully support infrastructure spending to create jobs and open economic opportunities in much-needed areas, and more.
| [If you agree, donate to fight for our shared values!](https://carolynrushforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866b1e87ca5aa4116782b6220&id=dc2b3fb17f&e=420896fe25)
---
With hope for America,
Carolyn Rush

name: US Conservative Network
subject: Biden's Digital Dollar 401K Heist
body:
While America slept, FedNow was silently 'installed' across millions of US bank accounts.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
Blackrock warns "Prepare for a recession unlike any other." Central banks igniting a global recession with their fight to stop inflation.
| | | |
---|---|---
---
# Biden's FedNow May Be A Calculated
Attack On Your Freedom
---

In the wake of the controversial Executive Order 14067...

[Pres. Biden has just launched FedNow - a move many are calling the BIGGEST 401(k) heist of the century.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/aMoLXe4STy5c4h6LOEKHug~~/AARclAA~_UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

While America slept, FedNow was silently 'installed' across millions of US bank accounts.

Biden and his scheming cronies want you to believe it's a harmless money transfer network, but insiders know the truth:

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Devotional today
body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1200f38f157d4daf98d4612dc22b227d&_e=O_w4ZOCdvCgoUjWlE0J_us25h0rYWTYmbWd9oX7Wunukskk7-ubqZzzTAU96QGYqsoGNfzIKF8AG0lgJOj3sa9BwsZd8pSb_MtydsLlkE09Qhw6hXRjJuiQ4cvb0v7CZsDRi0_j73MUuP7Dk2IascJMlZ19-cG8_aooQyOgd4iS-bD8kcidj2IyZ9hbHr4THSP01TL83s-7-12M85rPL-E8PiAwmq18MF734UKGKgT20YJ8sqPFJU3Vf7Xie5oJA2pYczEb-Ov089VggJIeT7v2kQ6vCpVFP7gnWyfD7L8RaId_yyHOBqQYrCFgz7FuiJI_36HQsu_tdrMBQeIhXah0AlxXi_kuk5MEwS5V37ArM8YX8PsKMmM-X4A118XmJ)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1200f38f157d4daf98d4612dc22b227d&_e=O_w4ZOCdvCgoUjWlE0J_us25h0rYWTYmbWd9oX7Wunukskk7-ubqZzzTAU96QGYqsoGNfzIKF8AG0lgJOj3sa9BwsZd8pSb_MtydsLlkE09Qhw6hXRjJuiQ4cvb0v7CZsDRi0_j73MUuP7Dk2IascJMlZ19-cG8_aooQyOgd4iS-bD8kcidj2IyZ9hbHr4THSP01TL83s-7-12M85rPL-Lf0PGQEzRv_kvIulOq2Jq5swwfEUHHd0QQ13gOaTJkJQ5RAfAYkLMZByruI9-0qgRDQPU1JlTWC38fIiWGb10Y3_JqDnuw_vEj4zR17jQoZOE2Z06R38_mvGAAWscc1PuX3iYZxJ6-Q-Qqgzhryll1NZ4DlOLg2SC-XABCH9H2T)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1200f38f157d4daf98d4612dc22b227d&_e=O_w4ZOCdvCgoUjWlE0J_us25h0rYWTYmbWd9oX7Wunukskk7-ubqZzzTAU96QGYqsoGNfzIKF8AG0lgJOj3sa9BwsZd8pSb_MtydsLlkE09Qhw6hXRjJuiQ4cvb0v7CZsDRi0_j73MUuP7Dk2IascJMlZ19-cG8_aooQyOgd4iS-bD8kcidj2IyZ9hbHr4THSP01TL83s-7-12M85rPL-NcIYagED4pz2fCHusEY8eTHP4BK8BC9UEYzIS18GIfYzaB8G9MKRwrz94bgk1yFQqYmSE2f6_EIjgdbZD3zI3sCVIoWeBY6Rkzwetn2GWMQlwmWkXaISwOLIUqiilY4y1Jd-ceMeCKPtlrzIQ8w8jrx1_9qjVhT-pQnsie_wkB0).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=1200f38f157d4daf98d4612dc22b227d&_t=gDyNi_ulR0GjcHeGg9gjeEL2VDUnT_xFulcEBThsxPwx6OQZXIf2J7s_rwjNQvrgXpsan0pwluha-P7PLAma0xZhhLtZH0RyIzaMp80Eji-CabA_VRNk6COQtkxaLQ1bsEeoYUXd4kchPlo9-9C-eRaSHTd7qE8E8lT7G8VkhC8%3D)

subject: We CANNOT afford another defeat in 2024, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This is the most important election of our lives

Friend,

The 2024 Presidential election will determine the future of our nation.

Republicans need a candidate who has what it takes to DEFEAT Joe Biden and get America back on track. clean_body: I need you to complete this by midnight tonight. | | | | Friend, House Republicans are launching a HUGE project, and I need your help. House GOP Leadership is starting a MASSIVE voter canvass effort as we head into 2024. The responses we get from this Official GOP Voter Canvass will affect our strategy as we battle to expand our House Majority and retake the White House. | | | "Generic Button" If we are going to expand our Majority on Election Day, we need to make sure that our records are accurate for EVERY Republican. We are LESS THAN A YEAR away from Election Day. Winning will be a team effort; without you on our team, we 're guaranteed to lose. | | | | "Generic Button" Help us out and ensure we enter 2024 on the right foot. "Complete your Canvass by 11:59 tonight>>" I look forward to reading your response! | Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions -. Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Take a look at what my finance director just sent me:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is not good.

| |
---
| | | Hey Friend,

My finance team just let me know that we came up short on our November goal.

This is not good.

We are getting absolutely crushed in fundraising.

If things continue on this trajectory, I don't see how we hold on to this seat in November.

So my team has asked me to reach out to you with an offer to extend our deadline for one day only and offer a 15X match.

[EXTENDED DEADLINE: 15X MATCH FOR TODAY ONLY >>](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9744bbd64c1241beb7b2507e5af62146&_e=XOjp3dkpfdREDa3529LbHWk9g8M_yNNvKILCc_oo4WSJs-9eAEuEs1H4Ll8CaVQPd70p1AMss8nAkUQJj7fzoWyMDJNWHWk7vvx3xR2CUjx3zAZQLspue0Z7ylXyBetjAxYFaTS8w2QC1ubeCOnTurlVvyzVvLCfiEEu80BZrqxYgS8XkZ8JgKLdez8Re5L0bHXo6tv46kRtPS3xmPHNgw6e35yJIfV_f1UNneKw5u-M4P3ylycuiquHavf8Sy-_qj-IdfOKEgvx84kqvL36KYrGMASWwLJ9-lyLfF_RIzJPRa_JeRbYd0NqQfZWJGAj)

Thanks,
Lauren

Sent from my iPhone
---
|
---
| Begin forwarded message:
From: Shana <finance@laurenforfreedom.com>
Subject: November $$ update
Date: November 30, 2023 at 9:28 PM
To: Lauren Boebert <lauren@laurenforfreedom.com>

We had a good couple of days, but still came up short by about $9,239.

Maybe reach out to the supporters and see if we can extend the deadline to tonight and offer a 15X match?

Sent from my iPhone

needs to start seizing resources in a neighboring territory
“immediately,” the Associated Press reported. Maduro’s referendum to
claim sovereignty over Essequibo, an oil-rich region internationally
recognized as part of Guyana, passed with overwhelming support on
Sunday.

Federal Judge Hands Huge Victory To Trump In Bid To Remove Him From
Arizona Ballot

A federal judge dismissed a case Tuesday seeking to remove former
president Donald Trump from Arizona’s presidential ballot. John
Anthony Castro, a little-known Republican presidential candidate,
filed the lawsuit in September alleging that Trump is ineligible for
office under the Fourteenth Amendment because he provided “aid and
comfort” to Jan. 6 “insurrectionists.”

Biden for the opportunity for a better life in the United States in an
interview with Fox News in Arizona on Tuesday. Thousands of illegal
immigrants have been entering the United States in the area of
Lukeville, Arizona, according to Fox News.

name: Karen Crnkovich
subject: #TeamKC 6 month Update - Momentum and Gratitude
body:
As I reflect on the past six months as a candidate, I am extraordinarily grateful for the outpouring of encouragement and response I have received.

When I jumped into this race, I made the commitment that I would not be outworked and I am delivering on that commitment:
1\. I have attended nearly 800 individual and group meetings
2\. Over 300 individuals have contributed to my campaign - this is **3x my closest competitor** in terms of individual donations
3\. I have knocked on over 500 doors, supporting candidates in this past November's election and taking the opportunity to speak directly with voters about me and my campaign.

**Each day, momentum and excitement build around my campaign.**
As we close this year and set our sights on victory in 2024, the path is clear. I am focused, energized, and motivated to keep charging forward despite the obstacles and naysayers. **_I am the candidate who will send the radical democrat Sharice Davids home._**

Here are ways you can show you support the winning team:
**1. Please like my FB campaign page @KCforKansas and share my posts.____**
**2\. Please follow me on X/Twitter @KCforKansas and share my tweets.____**
**3. Email me back and let's find time to have a chat.**
**4\. Please consider making a contribution, money isn't the sole indicator of success - but it definitely helps. **
**
**
I am eager to not just speak to you _**but to listen**_. I want to hear your concerns and frustrations with our federal government.

__
Lastly, in this holiday season of celebration and reflection, may your days and nights be filled with joy and peace.

Best regards,____
Karen
Karen Crnkovich for Congress, KS03 ____
[www.kcforkansas.com](http://www.kcforkansas.com/) ____
913-414-4446
#teamkc

Former President Donald Trump on Tuesday said that he doubted President Joe Biden would be the Democratic Party’s nominee for the 2024 election. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Moment to talk?
body:
I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America’s future. | |
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_t=9mDmnXGEWQhlwukl7uLwb4wt24IjF6_KG_zRxAmNkS6Pxfz2lUIbH5xByGQxX6-kNfZgEiZzLmH703ITC88J2R6KLIO0OniVs_snVJ1wlYM%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_t=9mDmnXGEWQhlwukl7uLwb4wt24IjF6_KG_zRxAmNkS6Pxfz2lUIbH5xByGQxX6-kNfZgEiZzLmH703ITC88J2R6KLIO0OniVs_snVJ1wlYM%3D)

Peter,

I wanted to let you know how grateful I am for your support. Generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason I am able to fund my campaign and fight for America's future.

Now, I want to take a few minutes to talk with you about the journey I have been on. **[Once you've finished reading this, please consider making a contribution of any amount to help me fund my campaign so I can get my message out to every voter!](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf95S9NZIlWFj_Io-4CYKQFBaP1bu6W4WotxO3NjmMkcd9z5fyFHnzMPjkab0szgLmocWY26PGWOnEGD_5GwLkgKqDPtW7dKU8elDUkL_Bi5qwf8nCMu52Qpzg5Iz5cJCBsK7Qb3QoyxbpLVuvI3I_TXoLf4v2qMmra7JLjs1WIAbw%3D%3D)**

Ever since I launched my campaign for President, I have read and heard my life described in every way imaginable. _**Today, I want you to hear my story in MY words.**_
| | | | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf-0erOOo1YkjLanlEr9zA5qSdsVEQNggmnQA0IdUYRt-AV4-CqO8VMKrNsvnCLQTlNT2T82nnh7LyhDPPHHyOqiwlr7Me01Eir3tOY-NENS9eIxACvByfosAsFnhMXak-SHAXbU2WMDCXz2xrxmIvqTnBih18-GKeuE0bu7evPOBA%3D%3D)
---
| I am the daughter of legal immigrants from a small, rural town in South Carolina. We were the only Indian family in our town. My father wore a turban as he still does to this day, and my mother wore a sari. No one knew who we were, what we were, or why we were there. But with each passing day, the community began to look beyond our skin color. They began to see my family for who we are: hard working people who held the same values they cherished. Gradually, those initial stares transformed into smiles and we shifted from being excluded to embraced. Not every day was perfect. But every day was better than the one before it.

---
After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: _" Don't complain. Do something about it." _

---
| | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. **But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️**

It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor.

---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf_Y95L9hmfbff8mK7Jk2DdrkH2Sr-galfqhBKyOZ4dxQPFqlGgNa5bcmqfsmWoLfBv5D5JTAyKGinxUNLeewWSN5zOJI0-yWENdFMeUxMW5Tg4OF3d3PXzKVX0pBi2MwChzvt2iDt0bGfRL0pwklyTVKRNyZSnEcTNSOHToaZPOOg%3D%3D)
---
When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy.

When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them.

---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf9TkpWPwI0UyTxDpRo_JMz-517edvzv8Qag4JX_bdbJM-KEE9EFJ_BVSFxN4tURJdryq45na5ocW5oOiW93f5RiCjaEQ8_rv8NxOpt-Ojsws1b4qaQW6JJLoraaspch_I0YU-XkzMMD1Pg9x3fMWpQSED3UMmll4FiFPXcDFbdXPA%3D%3D)
---

Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class.

**[It would mean a lot to me if _every single person reading this today_ could send a donation of just $5 to help me keep my campaign momentum STRONG! >>](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf-bL-_V0Act09R2V2eOgZVd6Mp8H6MgugM7Upxenbc1IX5HphW9JITYTSuEvmBPoJHyW-Ei0guB0c7aywA0gDC8w1EtyQxiImnEQRBH5sZ3rxnZ0NapeuRAiDuF3brBpTu5xvUigKCULuu_N1CQNYPiVS_Y7d5esSeQvS8H8rJS7g%3D%3D)**

Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days.

**[Will you consider making a one-time donation of any amount today to show the of OUR movement?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf9Zx6g6Nv5r5xoKaH5GrmSaEwPkUJNEiYOv-uOafgPId5ZoW4NpQB5gF2GeBL_JirafF6nG6gO9HT0JifnI8VY62KKHP9bd-iZ_GeDMfSC5pvEXermOWdjgW0lJYOEkQUy6bkGPUaOHOVrtlwnaK5n0i-eukrpKJJVWZGLls7_Igw%3D%3D)**

---
| | [RUSH SUPPORT TODAY](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf9U25VYvYl0SEfZdjc7fTmatNPCao281PU2cJrU66S19EUlP0Vtd5WfXYHd6Fcj-M3-SadLXoCSn-jCVyhWrruMGTmJduafn-YGjwtSrb3cI4RljkldSYoXP-W5DUeecisjeXVknB7Eoaa3mw6bmDjdzs3inA4N-8JiEizUSnXIXg%3D%3D)
---

Peter, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, **[I need your help- starting right now.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=4ef98a4233d1469eb0fcde0314fe481f&_e=lPhnsdpLetGGLQktRNOvwM6DXm26V0aUYssTY6ltTlcIqu2cvaB58gHnUY27QAXmGAIwK9znuYPFO9N2TsZDwRXYUy46WMA6MsRyd5dDEL7KXtoVMhrN_QjPf6F6MhsJsKZ0GUAanhH4tZyvkQC0uIMtKGfNtlEHO07hsoQRl8hfPU3Ck9xVA4AlFNYfGeHqQ3qXzq7IXwEwS2txLTkHQ3sLtb-AbTe_bt1HA_7EUf9lRZrOxOYrXHwZhVeeQ_0agG5R4n6DIKecIITG1Tqpuj3utJ7N4dog7Dqwo-zaznnhnUBzXc096pb8ybxkVrtI-d1OrWLIc9Wzr5c6M5W71TjJ5pNWu09VEMLfoD5GYfAUODmMXM-XDnUTMgmY2rfyNoXHHRBTveTDK_Dhe3ikcw%3D%3D)**

Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me.
---
My very best,

---

After graduating from Clemson and working in the corporate world, I decided to take a job working for my family's business that my mother started in our living room when I was a child. I was frustrated when I saw how hard it was to make a dollar and how easy it was for government to take it away. When I voiced these frustrations to my mom, she gave me some wise advice which was: " Don't complain. Do something about it." | | | So, that's exactly what I did and I decided to run for state legislature. But it wasn't easy. I ran against the longest-serving legislator in the state and hardly anyone thought I had a chance. I was polling at 15 percent a week before the primary. But the people of South Carolina took a chance on me, and we won. ➡️ It was an honor to serve the people as a state legislator. I fought against the status quo and stood up for the people of my district. When I fought for government transparency by pushing to make sure important votes were on the record, my colleagues retaliated. They stripped me of my committees. So I decided to run for governor. | | When I campaigned for governor, people didn't know who I was. I was polling in fourth place, with limited time until Election Day. I was the least funded and least known GOP candidate. But together, we defied expectations and won. Then, we made a difference in South Carolina by cutting taxes, creating thousands of jobs, and revitalizing our economy. When I was nominated as Ambassador to the United Nations, people said I didn't have the experience. I proved them wrong. When I got to the UN, I took the "kick me" sign off our back. I told the world that America would have the backs of our allies, and for those who did not have our backs, we were taking names! The dictators, murderers, and thieves at the UN didn't know what hit them. | Now, I'm running for President because our country is heading down a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction. We need a leader who will rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and prioritize serving the people over the political class. Your donation will not only show that my campaign is a force to be reckoned with, but it will also play a vital role in helping fund our campaign in the upcoming days. | | Peter, throughout my life, I've been shaking up the status quo. I'm hoping to do the same as your next President. But in order to get there, Your contribution is what keeps this movement alive and thriving, so thank you for standing with me. My very best, | Nikki Haley | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. . . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. Our mailing address is: 186 Seven Farms Drive, Ste F-401 Daniel Island, SC 29492

Biden Pours Billions Of Taxpayer Dollars Into California’s Floundering
High-Speed Rail Project
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziob8uubgcaevv3tfj70jg551n5cj4fdoka929j0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge2o35c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38ctk6oon9dtjmeqjetjjkorrbdt36kq32tbiekojf8j0c9j6f932cug66pt26iojactlk1rrasjmemh39cdhmirr7djlkupjb8bk63o78d7l69qq2dthm6q34tjlkipr2ttlkoq33d5j6up77d5k6pqq6cdnmlpr2d9ieipredd0mirj1dd6e1qjac9lk9q39cdlk1p7fcll6oonf8h5u

The Biden administration is set to give $3.07 billion in funding to
California’s high-speed rail project, which has failed to make
substantial progress since it was first funded in 2008. The California
High-Speed Rail Authority will receive funding from appropriations in
the $1.2 trillion Bipartisan Infrastructure law, and aims to connect
the California cities of Merced, Fresno and Bakersfield, according to
a press release from

Pro-Israel Dem Launches Primary Challenge Against Squad Member http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6gltqdjpi9m7rikdhdbve437nf68h0aa64jrkq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge2o35c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq0sjnmmibcsjk6korb89l6mqq3d1leer31d9memg74t5lmgp79td662q33cdl6erjadd46sq39ctme5qqct3legojb9dl6mp3acjnk8iv0

New York’s Westchester County Executive George Latimer launched a
primary challenge against “squad” member, Democratic Rep. Jamal
Bowman, on Wednesday. Latimer, who served in both chambers of the
state Legislature before taking the county-level position, asserted
that he is the candidate who can “deliver real, progressive results”
during his campaign launch video.

Dark Money Group Founded To Boost Biden’s Agenda Is Scaling Back
Operations http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zigm8aii7asebs7fqfdb138vvltm5e46pbfni638_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge2o35c5h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3bd9ieir38cti69qbacpkmerj79hnmmrq2d1ieqqqbdtjmkqfb9pieuqn0td36uqn7c9l64qq2ttlk8rrfdjhemh39c9l6er7b91n6kpr2d1lkir7b9jm6gor9ctn6mh38dhmmmjr0t9iegon9dtjmprq49fg

The super PAC tasked with “making the case to the American people for

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37572%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=INsJBQM7bYwOckn6nCUu1g&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c37573%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VaV%2f8s1Ttnpp1xb9oi5qXg&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

Ron DeSantis is getting ready to take the stage again, show the nation one more time how ready he is to lead America's comeback and gain every bit of support that he can before election year kicks off at the Iowa Caucuses.

It's all on the line, friend! Fresh off an incredible debate victory against Gavin Newsom last week, and ready to deliver one more time on Wednesday, NO ONE is outworking Ron DeSantis. And no one is more fired up.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=773f2e4beaf2a9e9d671ad0bd4f8c8ae28e6c65050163f6cabc4b4edeeafd3115ff98db44f96467b1b81cb871400207d7dcf78f78c6cbaeac84ddfc664daef4c

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Volunteer!

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=773f2e4beaf2a9e9d671ad0bd4f8c8ae28e6c65050163f6cabc4b4edeeafd3115ff98db44f96467b1b81cb871400207d7dcf78f78c6cbaeac84ddfc664daef4c

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.
