name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Why I'm running for re-election
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
I just filed for re-election to represent the Second Congressional District of Texas in the U.S. House of Representatives.
Many are choosing to retire from Congress this year, which is frankly understandable. This year has been a particularly tumultuous one in Congress. We've seen chaos and infighting. The perverse incentive structure in American politics makes it more profitable and rewarding for politicians to sow division and generate fame for themselves rather than working on behalf of their constituents. All of this distracts from the real work in front of Congress for the American people - securing the southern border, reining in inflation, addressing crime in our communities, and stopping the scourge of fentanyl.
---
| | | [DONATE TO SUPPORT MY RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkpHPqo6-MsAnjD6l3QYj1L3InMSaH_apVx_aLpXthCCQqreXa41MZgEDWBpzete7qJlrVhf6dwc-r0O7C-NrD6ErGcsgb-hKVEqTBbOHX7UyyRntlJ6KtKiQGN_tHr22coJinZjnAwWl2bsEjs_keX6UjzztqYowROlz1aaEImHBpCk6hjH6JgvAUTBd-kNFOrG3pbgng6xC3AxzgvT_I3SnLFzMyY72z6H_KCDJlN9hRCMImZU1Y5kjafgaRgRTxTaGldG0mQmZLjOCdse-hPB0Sh9zXPLeksumj2jAhFpdqcwGcqjmUhjJjB4JNwmoiDl2W1Yoq9hhtzsRia3K6B2I0XCeZdiZjs54T4W5zSOxaUmmtDvKg==&c=yo4hbKgZfzWSK8UXZBoL4gViV3kizeZvC-pjmzMYk76aw42NmY5iNw==&ch=jID4mcQmbt3a3Byg0dVGjkdEHyfmftY1hKvu33o812ca_g7gPEG7Rg==)
---
| But, at least to me, that is all the more reason to remain in the fight. Our country desperately needs leadership at this moment - serious legislators who are committed to doing the hard work of policy making in Congress. That is what I've tried to provide - real leadership - to my constituents and my country since I was elected to the House five years ago.
We've made a lot of progress since then.
I serve on one of the most powerful committees in the entire Congress - the Energy and Commerce Committee. I've used my position to stand up for the oil and gas industry that is under constant attack from the Biden Administration and radical environmentalists and have passed serious bills aimed at boosting American energy production and dominance.
This year, I was named Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force. I'm focusing this task force on developing policy solutions to completely destroy the Mexican drug cartels that are taking advantage of the open border to kill Americans with fentanyl poison.
And I've proposed legislation that would stop the illegal immigration crisis that has an acute impact on my state of Texas. My bills would stop the abuse of our asylum laws and discourage illegal immigration.
Equally important, I use my position in Congress to carry out a vital mission - growing the conservative movement to be successful and robust for generations to come.
The conservative movement finds itself at a moment of choosing: Do we devolve into a movement based on clicks and outrage? Or do we grow our movement by persuading more Americans to join us, staying grounded in the principles of conservatism that our country needs now more than ever?
I choose the latter. That's why I hold the Crenshaw Youth Summit, attracting thousands of young Americans from across the country to Texas to hear from conservative leaders, persuading them to join our movement. And that's why I'm not afraid to go anywhere and everywhere to spread our conservative vision, including CNN, MSNBC, the Daily Show, Real Time with Bill Maher, and The View.
I truly believe this is how we grow our conservative movement to elect sustaining, governing majorities to every level of American politics. And that's what I will continue to try to accomplish.
Serving the people of Texas in elected office is an honor and responsibility I cherish. I am excited for my re-election campaign and for the opportunity to continue that service for the Second District of Texas in the House of Representatives.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkpHPqo6-MsAnjD6l3QYj1L3InMSaH_apVx_aLpXthCCQqreXa41MZgEDWBpzete7qJlrVhf6dwc-r0O7C-NrD6ErGcsgb-hKVEqTBbOHX7UyyRntlJ6KtKiQGN_tHr22coJinZjnAwWl2bsEjs_keX6UjzztqYowROlz1aaEImHBpCk6hjH6JgvAUTBd-kNFOrG3pbgng6xC3AxzgvT_I3SnLFzMyY72z6H_KCDJlN9hRCMImZU1Y5kjafgaRgRTxTaGldG0mQmZLjOCdse-hPB0Sh9zXPLeksumj2jAhFpdqcwGcqjmUhjJjB4JNwmoiDl2W1Yoq9hhtzsRia3K6B2I0XCeZdiZjs54T4W5zSYRxxuN7VyIw==&c=yo4hbKgZfzWSK8UXZBoL4gViV3kizeZvC-pjmzMYk76aw42NmY5iNw==&ch=jID4mcQmbt3a3Byg0dVGjkdEHyfmftY1hKvu33o812ca_g7gPEG7Rg==)

| [If you support the work I've done in Congress and share the mission to grow our conservative movement, I would greatly appreciate any donation you can make to my campaign. With committed patriots like you from across the country sending even a small contribution, I will have the resources necessary to win my election and help conservatives across the country win theirs. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hkpHPqo6-MsAnjD6l3QYj1L3InMSaH_apVx_aLpXthCCQqreXa41MZgEDWBpzete7qJlrVhf6dwc-r0O7C-NrD6ErGcsgb-hKVEqTBbOHX7UyyRntlJ6KtKiQGN_tHr22coJinZjnAwWl2bsEjs_keX6UjzztqYowROlz1aaEImHBpCk6hjH6JgvAUTBd-kNFOrG3pbgng6xC3AxzgvT_I3SnLFzMyY72z6H_KCDJlN9hRCMImZU1Y5kjafgaRgRTxTaGldG0mQmZLjOCdse-hPB0Sh9zXPLeksumj2jAhFpdqcwGcqjmUhjJjB4JNwmoiDl2W1Yoq9hhtzsRia3K6B2I0XCeZdipCLdIODnFElM63Q0a33XVA==&c=yo4hbKgZfzWSK8UXZBoL4gViV3kizeZvC-pjmzMYk76aw42NmY5iNw==&ch=jID4mcQmbt3a3Byg0dVGjkdEHyfmftY1hKvu33o812ca_g7gPEG7Rg==)
Thank you for your continued support. I am forever grateful to have patriots like you in my corner as I seek re-election to Congress in 2024.
In Service,

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | Peter - I just filed for re-election to represent the Second Congressional District of Texas in the U.S. House of Representatives. Many are choosing to retire from Congress this year, which is frankly understandable. This year has been a particularly tumultuous one in Congress. We've seen chaos and infighting. The perverse incentive structure in American politics makes it more profitable and rewarding for politicians to sow division and generate fame for themselves rather than working on behalf of their constituents. All of this distracts from the real work in front of Congress for the American people - securing the southern border, reining in inflation, addressing crime in our communities, and stopping the scourge of fentanyl. | | | == | But, at least to me, that is all the more reason to remain in the fight. Our country desperately needs leadership at this moment - serious legislators who are committed to doing the hard work of policy making in Congress. That is what I've tried to provide - real leadership - to my constituents and my country since I was elected to the House five years ago. We've made a lot of progress since then. I serve on one of the most powerful committees in the entire Congress - the Energy and Commerce Committee. I've used my position to stand up for the oil and gas industry that is under constant attack from the Biden Administration and radical environmentalists and have passed serious bills aimed at boosting American energy production and dominance. This year, I was named Chairman of the Congressional Cartel Task Force. I'm focusing this task force on developing policy solutions to completely destroy the Mexican drug cartels that are taking advantage of the open border to kill Americans with fentanyl poison. And I've proposed legislation that would stop the illegal immigration crisis that has an acute impact on my state of Texas. My bills would stop the abuse of our asylum laws and discourage illegal immigration. Equally important, I use my position in Congress to carry out a vital mission - growing the conservative movement to be successful and robust for generations to come. The conservative movement finds itself at a moment of choosing: Do we devolve into a movement based on clicks and outrage? Or do we grow our movement by persuading more Americans to join us, staying grounded in the principles of conservatism that our country needs now more than ever? I choose the latter. That's why I hold the Crenshaw Youth Summit, attracting thousands of young Americans from across the country to Texas to hear from conservative leaders, persuading them to join our movement. And that's why I'm not afraid to go anywhere and everywhere to spread our conservative vision, including CNN, MSNBC, the Daily Show, Real Time with Bill Maher, and The View. I truly believe this is how we grow our conservative movement to elect sustaining, governing majorities to every level of American politics. And that's what I will continue to try to accomplish. Serving the people of Texas in elected office is an honor and responsibility I cherish. I am excited for my re-election campaign and for the opportunity to continue that service for the Second District of Texas in the House of Representatives. | | | == | == Thank you for your continued support. I am forever grateful to have patriots like you in my corner as I seek re-election to Congress in 2024. In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | P.S. If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

body:
With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e128a2577ae46f69a255f5fef842322&_e=-iweT9Gn7DJDoJMGRFYEyYboA9-MyjXizkK5wjKrtCtJ8P7PDTi5qLIgmWzBBwCKSMcRDgfBQLKIKiWLTKU2FRYeh4TUxI347nBSkw8Mcp4CxN5LDMQmf6X6PZON12FzFRIs3KgwpAfnklptsnTJri25pDhAZc8e9_S1m6WBQIw8cZ0Rh_8OJwkZTR-XnW0HngIoXhFILyEwUNEg72h8dGC2PUpZAdGbt7VnF95wRu2ux6StNQPMvJxFbXa-nyxKtgr-LNlmhnniA2lXjgUscHKcU2kWkd4D1VE_5hnCgOCJFtmUzF7q6oANjPmIaYnfJz_noN_imRsuLxx2ayEkJfTRvCMr4TayG3UYSJwJrEi0qTno_t2Dk3TGASMSxYob)
---
____ Hello Friend,

I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_.

This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support _Pathway to Victory_.

With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever.

One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures.
---
| | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness.
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e128a2577ae46f69a255f5fef842322&_e=-iweT9Gn7DJDoJMGRFYEyYboA9-MyjXizkK5wjKrtCtJ8P7PDTi5qLIgmWzBBwCKSMcRDgfBQLKIKiWLTKU2FRYeh4TUxI347nBSkw8Mcp4CxN5LDMQmf6X6PZON12FzFRIs3KgwpAfnklptsnTJri25pDhAZc8e9_S1m6WBQIw8cZ0Rh_8OJwkZTR-XnW0HngIoXhFILyEwUNEg72h8dKy83HNUNK7VJX9gKPXFGohGMOocaYzH42Hvc13xvljqN7TCG0jIyXzCWBof1c0ERGD5523j4j52H1iACoc9IGXD-KgQ55O5ahQWDHY51yWOwpG1dIEKUCB1ZkhHYMAEb9DWBU7SPC-YCoUTVsL_Nicz4goWS_FYZMnTp0llOs4v)
---
| | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ today.

Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year:

-- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior.
-- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit.
-- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes.
-- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together.

And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the _Proclaim the Gospel_ $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31.

To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/2024-pathway-to-victory-daily-devotional/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5e128a2577ae46f69a255f5fef842322&_e=-iweT9Gn7DJDoJMGRFYEyYboA9-MyjXizkK5wjKrtCtJ8P7PDTi5qLIgmWzBBwCKSMcRDgfBQLKIKiWLTKU2FRYeh4TUxI347nBSkw8Mcp4CxN5LDMQmf6X6PZON12FzFRIs3KgwpAfnklptsnTJri25pDhAZc8e9_S1m6WBQIw8cZ0Rh_8OJwkZTR-XnW0HngIoXhFILyEwUNEg72h8dObCncf4m4t6UKeeFuUZzjt0LOuRR0aubOMUDx9jCYzxkKxeP5w0UvO0sR9igmTCmX_3LuU2JDquNVa_3dmrYJpUlqa4K3yaavnMl20olRO4BPafio1aXoNhNNqkN1FRuvqpkTU74Qoq9JBPy33XiZesEblOizwg-iC7ppepElB0).

With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 _Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional_ , a great Christmas gift for anyone!

I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that.

I'm very thankful for your friendship with _Pathway to Victory_.

God bless you,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

clean_body: With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. | | | Hello Friend, I invite you to meet the new year by studying God's Word through the brand-new 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. This 532-page leather-bound book is available now with our thanks for your generous matching challenge gift to support Pathway to Victory. With darkness seeming to flood every aspect of our culture, the need to cling to Jesus in the coming year is more urgent than ever. One of the ways we can stay close to the Lord is by reading His Word and maintaining a devotional time of prayer and reflection on the Scriptures. | | Our annual devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a forest-green leather cover and inlaid wood brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional can be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment and biblical guidance. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth to face the new year with spiritual readiness. | | | We're offering the devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to Pathway to Victory today. Here's an outline of what we'll be studying together this year: -- From January to February, we'll begin the year with straight talk from the Savior. -- From March through May, we'll take a fresh look at the Holy Spirit. -- In the summer, we'll gain wisdom from Solomon's reflections in Ecclesiastes. -- And in the fall and winter, we'll explore 1 Corinthians together. And the best part is that your gift of any size will be doubled in its impact thanks to the Proclaim the Gospel $500,000 Matching Challenge running until December 31. To support the work God is doing through Pathway to Victory , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: . With a donation of $300, we will send you 10 copies of the 2024 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional , a great Christmas gift for anyone! I have no doubt that 2024 will present many challenges--globally, politically, economically, and personally--but God remains in control of all things, and our job is simply to stay close to His leading. I pray that this devotional will help you do just that. I'm very thankful for your friendship with Pathway to Victory. God bless you, Dr. Robert Jeffress Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Shut Down Dark Money

body:
A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.

|
---
| | | **A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dark_mo_1_12_5_23_email_2_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.
But government institutions have betrayed our trust.
The intelligence agencies spy on American citizens.
Government and tech platforms conspire to surveil and censor the public.
Regulatory agencies have been captured by those they are supposed to regulate: Wall Street controls the SEC, and polluters and extractive industries dominate the EPA.
Big Pharma controls the CDC, NIH, and FDA.
Big Ag controls the USDA.
Big Tech has captured the FTC.
No wonder trust in government is at an all-time low. It’s time to earn it back.
| |
---
**Here is what Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has pledged to do as President of the United States:**
* RFK Jr. will remake public institutions to serve the public.
* RFK Jr. will roll back the secrecy and make government transparent.
* RFK Jr. will protect whistleblowers and prosecute officials who abuse the public trust.
* RFK Jr. will rein in the lobbyists and slam shut the revolving door that shunts people from government agencies to lucrative positions in the companies they were supposed to regulate, and back again.
* RFK Jr. will get money out of politics.
* RFK Jr. will open our institutions to real citizen involvement.
* RFK Jr. will restore integrity to the government.

|
---
None of the other candidates have made a similar pledge.
None of the other candidates have the experience and know-how to make these concrete promises a reality.
If you agree with RFK Jr.'s vision for restoring integrity in Washington, please donate to his 2024 campaign for President _right now_.

body:
Kyrsten Sinema “quite literally gave the middle finger to President Biden’s White House” according to Politico.
#

Peter -
Here’s the truth: We don’t expect people to contribute to every email we send out. That would be outrageous.
But we are asking you to make your first online contribution today.
$10. That’s the request. Here’s why:
$10 because Kyrsten Sinema “quite literally gave the middle finger to President Biden’s White House” according to Politico.
$10 because the same person funding Supreme Court Judge Clarence Thomas’ lavish trips is a max-out donor to Kyrsten Sinema.
But mostly importantly, $10 because Ruben Gallego is behind on his December fundraising ahead of a critical FEC deadline, and we really need your help to catch up.
We know it may not seem like $10 can compete with Sinema’s far-right billionaire bucks, but it all adds up when we’re all in this together.
That’s how we’re going to win. So please.
[**Can Ruben Gallego count on you to use this link to contribute $10, or whatever you can afford today to our campaign? Help us close the gap on our fundraising goals.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-dec23.csjDeB&refcode=em231206-1-15&t=1&akid=1517%2E734936%2EbjBGCw)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Peter — Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in.
**Please let me explain:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)
On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left.
When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)
While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)
And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)

**Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)
Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go.
**Missourians deserve a US Senator who will stand up and fight for them — and unlike Josh, I'm ready to serve.** If you’re ready to help us make sure every Missouri voter knows it before they vote on Election Day, I need your help:
**[Will you chip in any amount you can afford to our campaign right now so we can get our message in front of voters? The only way we’ll be able to flip this Senate seat is if we build a powerful grassroots movement, and support from real people like you is the best way we can do it.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39604?refcode=em20231206-4325&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4325%2E614464%2EJ7N6dA)**

clean_body: Please let me explain. Peter — Josh Hawley could never understand the Missouri I grew up in. Please let me explain: On the right is Joshua Hawley. While his banker daddy was sending him to a fancy prep school miles from his hometown, my family and I were relying on our neighbors to survive bankruptcy and medical bills in mid-Missouri — in a community where people took care of each other. That’s us on the left. When Hawley graduated from law school, he joined one of the world’s most elite corporate law firms. I joined the Marine Corps to pay back the community in Missouri that took care of me and my family. And when he was climbing the ladder to become another corrupt politician, I was serving my country — and then working to prevent the pointless overseas wars that make us less safe. While Josh Hawley aligned himself with the same giant corporations who’ve spent decades attacking Missouri workers and shipping away our jobs, I’ve been fighting to take back power for American workers and small businesses. And when Hawley voted against relief for veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits, I stood up alongside thousands of veterans to hold him accountable. The Missouri I grew up in taught us to take care of one another. To do your duty. To serve and sacrifice for your fellow Missourians. Josh Hawley doesn’t know that Missouri — and on January 6th, 2021, he showed us the only thing he’s learned is how to be a fraud and a coward. Josh Hawley hasn't just abandoned our state and our values. He's embarrassed himself and all of Missouri. And embarrassing Missouri... That’s something I can't let go. **Yesterday,****** the Senate had a briefing about Joe Biden's "supplemental" bill... the $100 billion slush fund that would spend billions relocating illegals into America.

**Chuck Schumer had the nerve to lie about Republicans** and say that we "injected" border security into the discussion.

**Schumer 's mistake was telling those lies when I had a microphone in my hand.**

I didn't let Schumer get away with lying, and I'm not going to let Joe Biden spend your tax dollars putting up illegal immigrants at American hotels and calling it "border security."

| | _**_Meet Tom Cotton_**_

Tom Cotton was born and raised on his family's cattle farm in Arkansas, served as an Army infantry officer in Iraq and Afghanistan, and is fighting for working Americans in the U.S. Senate.

The tragic attacks of September 11, 2001 occurred during Tom's final year of law school and changed his life's trajectory.

After clerking on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit and spending a short time in private law practice, he joined the United States Army as an Infantry Officer, spending nearly five years on active duty.

Between his two combat tours he served as a platoon leader with the Old Guard at Arlington National Cemetery, the unit responsible for military honors funerals.

Tom's military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal, Combat Infantry Badge, and Ranger Tab.

In the U.S. Senate, he's fighting the tough battles for Arkansans and Americans, and delivering real results. He knows that only the strong can survive in a dangerous world, and he's building a movement to make America strong again.

name: BREAKING House GOP News:
subject: Meet George Santos’s Republican replacement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kellen Curry
body:
Santos has been expelled from the House...

| | |
---
Friend, Have you met the one man who will REPLACE George Santos?
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za7neet48fsbb1dou7vamt15etdbnvv4k0sj948g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge9oj5c9h2bs)
---
My name is Kellen Curry... I’m a veteran, a conservative, and most importantly, I’m the guy who has a plan to defend the House Majority after the expulsion of Rep. George Santos. You see, not only are Republicans crushing Joe Biden in every presidential poll... Not only is the GOP primed to build on its majority after handing the gavel to Speaker Johnson... **_But Washington is finally kissing corruption GOODBYE!_** For Santos, his political career will be remembered as a blatant fraudulent exploitation of his candidacy. **[But Friend, this is exactly why I left Wall St. - to answer the highest calling I’ve ever had to answer to make this country better for the hardworking men and women that keep it going. The last thing I need is YOUR help. ](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn2ip5ocrh895n8u05re2caa6nu1gnfrkdsqnnhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge9oj5c9h2bs)** You see, after becoming the third generation in my family to serve in the Air Force, I took everything I had to the finance world in New York City at J.P. Morgan. But something was missing. I took a good look at Washington D.C. and realized that God was calling me to step up and turn this country around before the America I loved was destroyed forever! **[Now I’m counting on the support of patriots across the country to get me to Congress in NY-3!](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztsj97vjunu3d285ris4c6np8o3bmdk5m50hg5vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge9oj5c9h2bs)** But time is short, Friend! **The GOP nomination for the special election will be decided THIS WEEK! I have no time to waste. ** Look, I’ll be the first to say that I’m new to politics. But that is exactly why I’m prepared to serve YOU, not myself. I’ve always known that my service to America was not yet over. I’ve been waiting to put Washington on notice and to declare that the crooked politicians won’t get away with their corrupt games any longer. Please, Friend. Asking for money is the last thing I ever want to do. But I’m running out of time. **[Will you help me live out my calling to continue to serve this country by sending me to Washington?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi41d36840841c07av6iisi8bhfg877m1naainn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge9oj5c9h2bs)** It is with a sincere heart that I promise you I will never let you down. With gratitude, Kellen Curry

name: Mucarsel-Powell, Debbie
subject: Listen, I know you're busy, so I'll get right to it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
I'm not buying Rick Scott's act
| | |
---
Listen, I know you're busy, so I'll get right to it. MAGA Republican Rick Scott has already spent _OVER $3 MILLION_ this cycle on attack ads against Democrats like me. **It's the largest ad buy of any GOP Senate candidate so far.**

He wants you to think his campaign is strong — that he's ready to fend off any challenge. But I'm not buying his act.
**The truth is that Rick Scott is terrified. Honestly, I don't blame him — polling shows that I am in the lead, and experts at _CNN_ just ranked Florida as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue.**

Rick Scott had to spend $64 million of his personal fortune to win by just 0.12% of the vote in 2018. We have a huge opportunity to flip Florida blue this time around, but _**_only_**_ if we have the resources to fight back against our opponent's massive wealth and record-breaking ad buys. **[So, friend, if you have anything extra to spare today, will you chip in to help us win in Florida and defend Democrats' Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74662888/442259292/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk412-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmYwNGRlNmUtNDA5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=At1jZPJ5ar38OJZYcv3PliuuUL56V6RPsL_8gYVi8BI=)**

Listen, friend, we cannot let these attacks go unanswered. In a statement accompanying this new ad, Rick Scott claims Democrats “have rigged the game against hard-working Americans.” Come on. _Seriously?_
I'm here to tell you myself — that is a bold-faced lie. Rick Scott made his fortune as the CEO of a hospital chain charged with the biggest Medicare fraud scheme in history at that time. He made off with millions, pled the Fifth, and faced no consequences. Now, he's pushing a far-right agenda that would ban abortions nationally, raise taxes on working families, and end Social Security and Medicare. _Talk about rigging the game against hard-working Americans._
My story is different. As a teen immigrant from Ecuador, I fought hard to create my own American dream. In high school, I worked early morning shifts before homeroom to help my family afford rent for our one room apartment.
I studied hard to earn a scholarship that made college possible for me and dedicated my career to public service. Eventually, I ran for Congress, flipped a battleground district blue, and became the first South American immigrant elected to the House. In Congress, I fought tirelessly to expand Medicare access, lower the cost of living, end gun violence, and protect families like yours.
**I've spent my life giving back to the communities that gave me so much and fighting to protect the opportunities that made my story possible. Rick Scott has spent his career getting rich and leaving working families behind.** Floridians deserve better. That's why I'm running to defeat Rick Scott and actually fight for the families that he claims to care so much about.
**[But to defeat his massive fortune, I'm counting on your help. So I'm personally asking — if you've made it this far, will you please chip in $5 to help us retire Rick Scott and flip Florida blue? With your help, this race is truly ours to win.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74662899/442259314/-1832279535?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk412-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmYwNGRlNmUtNDA5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=At1jZPJ5ar38OJZYcv3PliuuUL56V6RPsL_8gYVi8BI=)**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The pressure is on.
body:
The pressure is on. But I’m ready to crush it on the debate stage!

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7a2b2mql9r4vrjaffcgdrktn94rl50eq9160u8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs)
---

Friend,

_The pressure is on. But I 'm ready to crush it on the debate stage!_

With time running out until I take the stage for my fourth presidential debate, my team and I are still short of our goal.

**[Can I count on you to make a donation before I take the stage at 8 PM tonight so we can crush this goal?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrdglo1rjcpgjhid8t2ch59g6q90cpqhehvv2d3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "Can I count on you to make a donation before I take the stage at 8 PM tonight so we can crush this goal?")**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0hlkorfk8dlll5pn7snu20g5a6muh96fk0ppsb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs)
---
| | [HELP REACH OUR GOAL OF 8K NEW DONATIONS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjcdh66e85h8uaf74ustpbqpui4q9ds660lcsfp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs)
---

Every dollar we raise during this time will give us a surge of momentum before I step on stage and help us to:
* Capitalize on the momentum AFTER I walk off the stage.
* Amplify my message further than ever before.
* Host more events and meet with voters across the country.
* Continue building the necessary infrastructure for a winning campaign.
* **WIN THE WHITE HOUSE ON ELECTION DAY!**

**The bottom line is this, Friend:** We have a country to save, and I'm ready to show America WHY I am the best candidate for the job.

**[Will you step up in the next hour with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join my fight for America's future?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr5l77dektqcmcuoufs1c1tb5sfs927n8ahl9hb0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "Will you step up in the next hour with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join my fight for America’s future? ")**

I wouldn't be asking for your help if this wasn't such a pivotal moment for our campaign.

Thank you for being an invaluable source of support.

Let's win this!

---
My very best,

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl55hrb2pa8hq3egr0608ngdstfp4jnkm9mc3vho_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs)

Nikki Haley

---

| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmriung8e3dqm3pj5420232hutuuurpek8m3ctcg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR BUTTON](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkel7cpqidq2j9pff5d4fatk135qpvtthjjmdlk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsh0ndmn2m1us93mfahvj8uovt6msa4g3cl72tbo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zutpl66effpdnj9dci9cehmu6io9jpj99225p90o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3geaor1c1h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---

---

| | Peter, I can’t believe it - we’re already in the final month of 2023.

That means we have just a few weeks left until our **final deadline of the year - and Team Cao has some major goals.**

If we’re going to win in Virginia, it’s critical that we show the world that we mean business. _That means coming in with MAJOR fundraising numbers._

With such a well-funded, entrenched establishment opponent like Tim Kaine, we need our grassroots team to step up in this critical moment more than ever.

**[We’ve had incredible momentum so far, but we need YOUR help to keep it going. Please, pitch in NOW so we can meet our end-of-year goal and send Tim Kaine PACKING in 2024!](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=efefbb64fc9f438da8f7241e2acfe6a8&_e=DTlD8_8A8xmVGaMuPNgXshBMp7HmRwfc5Ol3qebJ4ETXifdQmr_Sfc0sEFJY1K6xkutkYZEEhoO1ExaVRt3bot_1abGe_FtmI3FgS1TMJ9VcBZSk5jbc0ThevtWWdX9xNI3hvrGgF-BBz9DHr0kCOOesPoI14IDA_mcYUCFFfKOYB44Yk9RQkIHmAxoklqjYdXm603v0RPAZUk3Fn2trmBlBZ39i9BysBGI4KJetQa_misscF03clIjL71OlaXB-ED-9lTVEGtNzPHYVfoDvlEII6nggwe8et7xjqkWw59AcTXW5VDhZKGQipH8UdfrtnZZWUn239AS7gEZVLSxQDHd1LfxFAmgl3xKU2YEj6URvkCk26S722UWEnsdRyh1r)** I know that right now with Biden's Build Back Broke economy not everyone has the capacity to give right now, and that's okay.

But if you do, I need you to know how important your generosity is.

The road to the Senate majority runs right through Virginia.

If we’re going to e _ver_ get our country back on track, we need to seize this moment before it’s too late.

I can’t imagine what two more years of Democrat control will do to our country. I don’t want to think about it, and I know you don’t either.

name: Joe Biden
subject: You’re not alone, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
One of the things I try to be mindful of, at all times, is what a difference a small human gesture can make to people in need. | | |
---
Peter -- One of the things I try to be mindful of, at all times, is what a difference a small human gesture can make to people in need. What does it really cost to take a moment to look someone in the eye, to give them a hug and say "I get it, you're not alone." Today, I am asking you to do something small for our campaign -- but it’s something that will make a big difference. Tonight is the next Republican debate. We are expecting to see over-the-top attacks and blatant efforts to divide the American people in a competition for who can best appeal to Republicans’ extreme, MAGA base. But no matter who the Republicans nominate -- whether it's someone on that stage or not -- we have to be ready. Now, I am going to guess you didn't spring out of bed this morning and shout out loud, "Today is the day I am going to make my first contribution to Joe Biden's reelection!" But that's what I am about to ask you to do. **I know I am not alone in this fight, but it'd mean a lot for me to know you're with me today. Especially before tonight's debate.** [Can I count on you to use this link to make your first online contribution to my reelection campaign? $5, $10 or anything can afford will all add up fast when lots of people join together and act to help us win this race.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZnCojhadU-b1ix1YpHL0vbGADzeqRKxqJ41wJ6X41MfFXKa3P_17Yd_ZLtRFo_Q1csBWneZ6sdBny8w4CoYv0VmiSgL9jsJs7qOJ0n8CPHraQ-HV7rXi0MjlvwrTgebtRHBQRRGbsXx9Fro17V6Fu3cRgcvtjCEAirgD8iTdw0AWTrKPS3Vj-LNoFfnCTi_VlX2MKT4snJXcOqn3Vz0-4Sg1F6kOzkubj3MmAWaG5RtDGJSbdg3vGE6AjGKOLuQffWt9udc9ymRWSIS46TzslNsK15UPodBtou5lva52Op6qyELjXQ-R1lBnIEyCHGlZUyngD0jldloHxZaoy8Hor3BYIQvDh2WxZEi1PZYizILdy9V4I1kIM3orXJTToh0GuE6wYz9L3jiWKVzQVQhw_TfwckN0bJhub38tZTD9g1mfOkzvW05yXcj1t5_aB0ntD8caHfjlqHQ9Ft0mPS0cS4Ea8HE-tEWzW4jha7M4KbA_Wf0ON40ChoQNE3qYbX5J0QOdMnGOA5spvRMULPinsmDj29L1vuWzZbaLK4GOmDjvc-YNSAbBuvC0dlbdiGR7-QG37TMufcD0PnWovPf3sY6i3vVlOU_wHG09yRFBcyu6a60tPbhoNAXDReWYWRoq6FiNY6qv8jPN7zUXBnb-fkw3s8VYii4d2L_vPUcIHKoOFR-mmpDMhxEWMLxnMrWazjZFRI-bAdI3o_3TxqqHjWDM_GUpHu9YQeKxUd5oPUDA/41w/nCG4QWWsQRuJV8A8c3xPaw/h0/Y8OZE1v4wpC5YRSkrr_D_vED7NMMFlBiHCMM4UBQVac) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: One of the things I try to be mindful of, at all times, is what a difference a small human gesture can make to people in need. | | | Peter -- One of the things I try to be mindful of, at all times, is what a difference a small human gesture can make to people in need. What does it really cost to take a moment to look someone in the eye, to give them a hug and say "I get it, you're not alone." Today, I am asking you to do something small for our campaign -- but it’s something that will make a big difference. Tonight is the next Republican debate. We are expecting to see over-the-top attacks and blatant efforts to divide the American people in a competition for who can best appeal to Republicans’ extreme, MAGA base. But no matter who the Republicans nominate -- whether it's someone on that stage or not -- we have to be ready. Now, I am going to guess you didn't spring out of bed this morning and shout out loud, "Today is the day I am going to make my first contribution to Joe Biden's reelection!" But that's what I am about to ask you to do. I know I am not alone in this fight, but it'd mean a lot for me to know you're with me today. Especially before tonight's debate. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Your contribution means everything to our chances. That is my word as a Biden. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: The tipping point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S)
It’s Tiernan, Bob Casey’s Campaign Manager, with an important message.
**Pennsylvania will be one of**** _the most_****competitive Senate races on the map in 2024.** Don’t believe me? Let’s talk about what happened here in 2016.
Donald Trump won PA by the narrowest margin in a presidential election _since 1840_ , securing the White House – and Republican Pat Toomey won his Senate race by less than 2 percentage points, cementing a GOP Senate majority.
**The numbers don’t lie: Pennsylvania has a long history of being**** _the_****tipping point, and 2024 will be no different.**
That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter. With our Democratic Senate majority hinging on this seat, we need your help to build a winning campaign to re-elect Bob Casey.
**[Can you pitch in any amount to hold this battleground seat and defend our Senate majority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?refcode=em20231206-1&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S)**
There's a reason why Mitch McConnell and national Republicans are laser-focused on this race. They know Pennsylvania’s record of deciding elections, and they’re gearing up to spend historic amounts of money to replace Bob with an anti-choice extremist.
If we want to win this critically important race, it’s going to take all of us working together.
**[So please, support Bob Casey’s re-election with a contribution today. If everyone reading this email chips in $5 or $10, we’ll be able to fight back against McConnell’s millions and win the most important race on the map.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?refcode=em20231206-1&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S)**
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?amount=15&refcode=em20231206-1-el&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?amount=25&refcode=em20231206-1-el&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?amount=50&refcode=em20231206-1-el&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?amount=100&refcode=em20231206-1-el&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?amount=250&refcode=em20231206-1-el&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231206-1?refcode=em20231206-1&refcode2=1304_552475_27Xr-S&akid=1304%2E552475%2E27Xr-S)

We couldn’t do this without you — so thanks for being on our team.
Tiernan
Campaign Manager, Bob Casey for Senate

name: BREAKING House GOP News:
subject: Meet George Santos’s Republican replacement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kellen Curry
body:
Santos has been expelled from the House...

| | |
---
Friend, Have you met the one man who will REPLACE George Santos?
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi97p85jhhr4g0a9j7il4ghain6c6pk8tamhsb78_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge1pj2c1h2bs)
---
My name is Kellen Curry... I’m a veteran, a conservative, and most importantly, I’m the guy who has a plan to defend the House Majority after the expulsion of Rep. George Santos. You see, not only are Republicans crushing Joe Biden in every presidential poll... Not only is the GOP primed to build on its majority after handing the gavel to Speaker Johnson... **_But Washington is finally kissing corruption GOODBYE!_** For Santos, his political career will be remembered as a blatant fraudulent exploitation of his candidacy. **[But Friend, this is exactly why I left Wall St. - to answer the highest calling I’ve ever had to answer to make this country better for the hardworking men and women that keep it going. The last thing I need is YOUR help. ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkeou2anid7jpnjm7l1coctasemvhaop1sf5ki7g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge1pj2c1h2bs)** You see, after becoming the third generation in my family to serve in the Air Force, I took everything I had to the finance world in New York City at J.P. Morgan. But something was missing. I took a good look at Washington D.C. and realized that God was calling me to step up and turn this country around before the America I loved was destroyed forever! **[Now I’m counting on the support of patriots across the country to get me to Congress in NY-3!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrc3cm6cej69desi1kqaahj5grbh4qh99vikik5g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge1pj2c1h2bs)** But time is short, Friend! **The GOP nomination for the special election will be decided THIS WEEK! I have no time to waste. ** Look, I’ll be the first to say that I’m new to politics. But that is exactly why I’m prepared to serve YOU, not myself. I’ve always known that my service to America was not yet over. I’ve been waiting to put Washington on notice and to declare that the crooked politicians won’t get away with their corrupt games any longer. Please, Friend. Asking for money is the last thing I ever want to do. But I’m running out of time. **[Will you help me live out my calling to continue to serve this country by sending me to Washington?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg36bhhfoujihtj1jai1ntp0pmgisd187ao9edv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ge1pj2c1h2bs)** It is with a sincere heart that I promise you I will never let you down. With gratitude, Kellen Curry

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
| | | Hi Friend, Just wanted to follow up with a quick update after last month... As you probably know, _Hoosier Republicans secured a record 76 Republican mayors in our municipal elections last month_. And thanks to your support, we’ve got a lot of momentum heading into the 2024 election year. **You’ve already done so much; we can’t thank you enough. But would you please pitch in just $5 to help us double down on our momentum and build out our grassroots efforts to secure victory in 2024? ** [**Follow this secure link to chip in $5 >>** ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/92f85e12851c2ac83947229f28c3afba/72d760e03d1772bec3d6b838967d376c/40313) Together, we can continue to elect Hoosier Republicans! name: BREAKING House GOP News:
subject: Meet George Santos’s Republican replacement.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Kellen Curry
body:
Santos has been expelled from the House...

| | |
---
Friend, Have you met the one man who will REPLACE George Santos?
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z88rmc298cec7mfunemvpnd3guqeule71f8i06n8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie8o36cth2bs)
---
My name is Kellen Curry... I’m a veteran, a conservative, and most importantly, I’m the guy who has a plan to defend the House Majority after the expulsion of Rep. George Santos. You see, not only are Republicans crushing Joe Biden in every presidential poll... Not only is the GOP primed to build on its majority after handing the gavel to Speaker Johnson... **_But Washington is finally kissing corruption GOODBYE!_** For Santos, his political career will be remembered as a blatant fraudulent exploitation of his candidacy. **[But Friend, this is exactly why I left Wall St. - to answer the highest calling I’ve ever had to answer to make this country better for the hardworking men and women that keep it going. The last thing I need is YOUR help. ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9sarqh8ohcgrh52sr812o6s9km7kpfhpcsl9ov0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie8o36cth2bs)** You see, after becoming the third generation in my family to serve in the Air Force, I took everything I had to the finance world in New York City at J.P. Morgan. But something was missing. I took a good look at Washington D.C. and realized that God was calling me to step up and turn this country around before the America I loved was destroyed forever! **[Now I’m counting on the support of patriots across the country to get me to Congress in NY-3!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztp2p3amj6uavr7apnm4044ljbk2s3pc32n2jfag_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie8o36cth2bs)** But time is short, Friend! **The GOP nomination for the special election will be decided THIS WEEK! I have no time to waste. ** Look, I’ll be the first to say that I’m new to politics. But that is exactly why I’m prepared to serve YOU, not myself. I’ve always known that my service to America was not yet over. I’ve been waiting to put Washington on notice and to declare that the crooked politicians won’t get away with their corrupt games any longer. Please, Friend. Asking for money is the last thing I ever want to do. But I’m running out of time. **[Will you help me live out my calling to continue to serve this country by sending me to Washington?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq71l701p1oqldq9nhpbq8ai91m3ebf7qt62v2i8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie8o36cth2bs)** It is with a sincere heart that I promise you I will never let you down. With gratitude, Kellen Curry
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0q2msoskbftf1gjkol2qlp56i3pg21nnsrk9vjg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie8o36cth2bs)
---

name: Giffords.org
subject: LAST CHANCE: Add your comment in support of expanded background checks
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your voice matters in this turning point for the gun safety movement
#

Team - In case you haven’t heard, the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF) published a proposed rule that would move us closer than ever to universal background checks.
**Before this rule can be finalized, the ATF is required to seek public comments on this critical gun safety measure, and the deadline to submit your comment is TOMORROW at midnight.**
[**Will you please use this link to submit your comment in support of expanded background checks for gun sales before the comment period closes tomorrow?**](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em231206-1-30&refcode2=7003.3935704.-L-jrh)
[](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em231206-1-30&refcode2=7003.3935704.-L-jrh)
Currently, only licensed gun dealers are required to conduct background checks, leaving a gaping loophole that allows unlicensed firearm sellers to sell guns without background checks. This often happens online or at gun shows.
The ATF’s new rule would address this loophole and clarify when individuals are required to get a license and conduct background checks.
This rule would be a huge setback for the gun lobby’s “guns everywhere” agenda, so they’re fighting tooth and nail to oppose it. That’s why it’s critical we drown out their negative comments with support for this lifesaving rule.
[**Make your voice heard before the ATF’s public comment period closes tomorrow at midnight by adding your comment in support of expanded background checks for unlicensed firearms sellers.**](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em231206-1-30&refcode2=7003.3935704.-L-jrh)
**[ADD MY COMMENT](https://giffords.org/action/tell-atf-expand-background-checks/?source=em231206-1-30&refcode2=7003.3935704.-L-jrh)**
Thank you for taking a stand. Your voice matters in this turning point for the gun safety movement.
\- The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=7003%2E3935704%2E-L-jrh) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Michigan is on the list.
Do you recognize her?
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231206-1-tt&t=3&akid=879%2E135344%2Efyz7om)

It's Elissa Slotkin.
She's running for Senate in Michigan because we need a new generation of leaders who think differently, work harder, and never forget that they are public servants.
And she's the one who is going to protect this seat for Democrats and defend the majority in the Senate.
You know who this is?
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-dec23.ZG_uWI&refcode=em231206-1-tt&t=4&akid=879%2E135344%2Efyz7om)
---
That's Betsy DeVos, and she's the leader of the many ultra-wealthy Republican donors contributing the maximum allowed amount to Mike Rogers' campaign.
National Republicans know that Michigan is going to be one of the most competitive states in 2024. And they are therefore gearing up to spend millions of dollars in order to flip this Senate seat.
So Elissa needs your support in order to put our campaign in a position to win this race. Because she cannot defend this seat alone. It's going to require a team effort.

Today, it feels as though we're stuck in an endless cycle of gun violence. Even as we mourn the most recent shooting — at a school, a mall, a grocery store or even a family's own backyard — it's impossible to shake the feeling that the next mass killing is inevitable.
But here's the thing, friend: **This cycle _isn't_ endless. The next mass killing _isn't_ inevitable. There are concrete, straightforward steps that we can take _right now_ to end the cycle and protect our communities from gun violence.** And the vast majority of Americans support these kinds of commonsense reforms.
Last year, we took a meaningful step forward by passing a package of gun safety reforms — including my legislation to end gun trafficking. But there is so much more that we must still do. That starts with getting assault weapons off our streets. You have my word that I won't stop fighting until we pass this legislation and end this epidemic, but I need grassroots Americans like you to stand with me.

**THEN:** The NRA shifted away from their mission and now exists to influence legislation that makes both gun manufacturers and GOP politicians very rich _— all at the expense of our public safety._

**NOW:** Their influence over GOP lawmakers has led to a refusal to act on common-sense gun reforms _— and has cost America hundreds of thousands of lives to gun violence._

_**The NRA has compromised our freedoms and safety, and WE, the American people, are subsidizing it!**_

clean_body: | = DID YOU KNOW? The IRS forbids tax-exempt organizations from influencing legislation as their primary purpose,yet the NRA exists to influence politicians to stop any common-sense gun reform! = | Should the NRA be allowed to keep its tax-exempt status? | = = FIRST: The National Rifle Association was founded as a tax-exempt organization with the mission of promoting sports shooting and gun safety. THEN: The NRA shifted away from their mission and now exists to influence legislation that makes both gun manufacturers and GOP politicians very rich — all at the expense of our public safety. NOW: Their influence over GOP lawmakers has led to a refusal to act on common-sense gun reforms — and has cost America hundreds of thousands of lives to gun violence. The NRA has compromised our freedoms and safety, and WE, the American people, are subsidizing it! = Should the NRA be allowed to keep its tax-exempt status? | = = Thank you for your participation. -Defeat Republicans ****Defeat Republicans**** | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | [](https://substack..MmE6G5ptgm_HWR-S-8gGhjRZIT-qNo1pCKEK-2zx8Uk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/haley-will-make-america-strong-again?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Over the past few months, [I've traveled extensively and have spent time on the ground in Australia, Hong Kong, Panama, Colombia, Canada, the United Arab Emirates and Brazil](https://substack.com/redirect/aae23dab-5eb7-4972-9ef0-4a9901db2f5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Over the course of those travels, it's become crystal clear to me that America faces a set of foreign policy challenges unlike those of the past. American weakness has destabilized the world, and what we desperately need today is a strong leader who understands the unique geopolitical dynamics facing the United States. That person is Nikki Haley.
Make no mistake, [the United States and China are at war](https://substack.com/redirect/c802e308-4285-4c9a-93f8-d194b5dd704c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While the war has so far been played out as a technology race, currency war, space race, trade war, and narrative war, Beijing's increasing belligerence and aggressive expansionism should alarm every American citizen. When America is united and strong, our enemies takes notice. When we're divided and weak, they take advantage. The United States needs a unifier who can restore American strength.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8c5a262c-94c9-4bfe-8f9b-275b6b2f9273?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The wars in Ukraine and Israel are [hot fronts of the US-China war](https://substack.com/redirect/659bdfe5-ed09-49af-95b5-e7ee206babf6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Beijing and Tehran continue to support Putin's war in Ukraine while Iran's support of Hamas has been funded through oil sales to China. And while military conflict is currently contained to Eastern Europe and the Middle East, the potential for conflict in South America is high and Beijing is salivating when it looks across the Taiwan Strait. The Belt and Road Initiative has enabled China to _de facto_ hijack institutions such as the United Nations. [Global multilateralism is ](https://substack.com/redirect/d2920429-5320-4e65-9774-8a30cb40ef5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)dead.
I've spent enough time with Ambassador Haley to know that she'll stand up to those who want to see America fail, confront China as needed, and most importantly, restore global respect for the United States. She believes in a doctrine of peace through strength. As Ronald Reagan once warned, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction" and that's exactly what's at stake. American values are being tested and we need a leader who can rise to the challenge.
Ambassador Haley has been a strong fighter for American values, both personally and professionally. She coordinated the global effort to impose the strongest set of sanctions in history on North Korea. She stood up for Israel, pushing hard to move the US Embassy to Jerusalem. She also called for a boycott of the Beijing Olympics while highlighting China's global ambitions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/127bd368-fa36-4bf2-a874-6509cca85ffb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What I appreciate most, however, is that Ambassador Haley doesn't apologize for American values. For those that fear she's a warmonger, let's not forget her husband is currently deployed. She understands on a deeply personal level the sacrifices our soldiers and their families make to keep the world safe for democracy, freedom, and individual liberty. She appreciates that a strong and capable American military can deter wars, while retreat and surrender may inspire them.
Unfortunately, the threat from China is not just overseas. China has been flying spy balloons overhead, buying up farmland, stealing intellectual property, setting up intelligence gathering efforts off our coast, and killing Americans with fentanyl. [They've addicted our children to Tik Tok, something Congressman Michael Gallagher, who chairs a committee focused on China, has called digital fentanyl](https://substack.com/redirect/3ed5f560-8716-4383-b826-24f0ba5a4d3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Chinese disinformation efforts are ubiquitous, their fingerprints are on numerous cyber-attacks, and [they're developing brain-altering weapons which they may already have tested against our diplomats](https://substack.com/redirect/5dca0f99-08f9-40dd-8900-7adef905f2d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Ambassador Haley understands the link between strength abroad and strength at home. [A strong American economy - one that provides opportunity for all - will unleash the unrivaled power of American ingenuity. It will enable and support the risk-taking entrepreneurial spirit that has led to the best technological advances the world has ever seen](https://substack.com/redirect/9012d30e-a94e-42d1-b198-8f92110fb13c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But she also knows that China often steals our breakthroughs. Like me, she's an optimist and knows that if we let America be America, free of Chinese influence, our best days lie ahead.
Nothing I've said above is unknown. So let me add something new, something about who Nikki Haley is as a person. My wife and I have a daughter with special needs who realized this summer that she'll be able to vote next year. She was eager to meet Nikki, having met several of the other candidates (side benefit of being in New Hampshire!), and asked to do so for her 17th birthday. Nikki not only took a few minutes to meet with her, but did so outside the limelight of cameras, press, or any media. She was warm, caring, and so genuinely present that minutes after meeting her, my daughter triumphantly declared "You've got my vote!" Nikki hugged her, the way only a caring mother could.
Nikki Haley is the best candidate to restore American strength at home and abroad. We need someone with compassion and respect, someone who understands we have more in common as Americans than identity politics suggests. We need someone that won't embarrass America on the world stage. We need Ambassador Haley. While it's taken me a bit longer than my daughter to come to the same conclusion, I'm happy to declare that _Nikki Haley has my vote_.
_**Vikram Mansharamani was a candidate for the US Senate in New Hampshire in 2022. He 's the author of the forthcoming **_**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World (**_**Outfox Publishing, 2024).**_

Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books,_[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/85d56327-3213-4b13-9cf0-7f6f97a3d1a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _and _[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/1973f0fd-c0c7-46cd-8149-3d524242f09a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

body:
I’ll be real honest with you

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

I’ll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they’re **WAY OFF TRACK** to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it’d be a complete disaster if they missed it.

To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office **PERMANENTLY.**

_They’re even attacking our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson, for being a Christian!!!_

_**[That’s why I’m teaming up with my brother from the bayou- Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. So with all the respect in the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EJ2ggmzB3AYXO0JnQPvWsg&sysid=1 "That’s why I’m teaming
up with my brother from the bayou – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to
raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. So with all the respect in
the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the
day.")**_
---

")

---
How dire is the situation? Well, just about every poll shows Republicans and Democrats in a **STATISTICAL TIE** for control of the House... and election experts just downgraded Republicans in a half-dozen key races.

The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I’m like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory **FULLY RELIES** on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help.

That's why I really need your help right now. We don’t have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win!

_**[I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c686896%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QyzM8gLDbBDSxEZjJkoXgw&sysid=1 "I’m personally asking
you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat
the Democrat Machine once and for all.")**_

God bless you,

John Kennedy

It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise.

SURVEY")**_ at your earliest convenience. It’s important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else.

_What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats?_

name: John N. Kennedy
subject: like a cat on a hot-tin roof
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I'll be real honest with you

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

I'll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they're **WAY OFF TRACK** to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it'd be a complete disaster if they missed it.

To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office **PERMANENTLY.**

_They 're even attacking our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson, for being a Christian!!!_

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my brother from the bayou - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. So with all the respect in the world, I'm personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrffesll0juvgdjp97bmfrr8ngubqi3dl4btv14o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie2or2cth2bs "That’s why I’m teaming up with my brother from the bayou – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. So with all the respect in the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day.")**_

---
How dire is the situation? Well, just about every poll shows Republicans and Democrats in a **STATISTICAL TIE** for control of the House... and election experts just downgraded Republicans in a half-dozen key races.

The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I'm like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory **FULLY RELIES** on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help.

That's why I really need your help right now. We don't have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win!

_**[I'm personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd54ncr5i7ss8bf6p0aajcsu41k0ftkvk70qibvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie2or2cth2bs "I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all.")**_

God bless you,

John Kennedy

Peter, it's Ron DeSantis. Tonight is the last time we'll be taking the debate stage for the year. After that, our team is racing to the Iowa caucuses! **I'm ready to finish out the first stage of this race and keep moving forward at a record pace, but to succeed, I'm going to need your help tonight.**

The stakes have never been higher. This election is our last chance to get America back on track before Joe Biden and the liberal elite make America unrecognizable. We have a chance to make sure this never becomes our reality, but only if the Republican party comes together NOW. On that stage, you WON'T see a former President who thinks you owe him your vote, but you will see a CCP empathizer who idolizes Hillary Clinton. And you'll see me: rising above the fray, fighting for YOU, winning for us, and leading the Republican party toward our American comeback. **[I am counting on you tonight.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=973e08ebd03d468792c6eff9c066ce50&_e=BH6kL4m1VnaX4wX4dG13umLCaalwfaNgbfMxGrGcIN3fUfzqACRKTPfpmnbV63Wu_sBFcZsArfE3eHmopXpjQ7AIEOcsURK0fGPztgYOKb2Ej3sno-Dv_6NoePkyemJFpK0dJ5PT79JIHT1ZqUPCsdoNLPJrjSYTm-SZ4i0vArW9xN1Ekl5c723lEcGTJI_dnQVr01kLvIFG8yaelBTYJj3Arv4nHMZvFqWlQwrOtBBmHPeg4chy70E0ek6yMrvFw0Erelz1B8nQ0AFBLJCJ32DM9ENs85C5RqYkfMD9-pCfKFghvngcr78wTopvonx2fTODZia-V5pueQ4wZBgSXn6yWvC7fO0kLpd3xBEBNuLTFuWJHv39NfCApwkRo6znJzGZbPIW2IY6Izb8j98QhA%3D%3D)** We have what it takes and it's time to show it. _**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_

| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=973e08ebd03d468792c6eff9c066ce50&_e=BH6kL4m1VnaX4wX4dG13umLCaalwfaNgbfMxGrGcIN3fUfzqACRKTPfpmnbV63Wu_sBFcZsArfE3eHmopXpjQ7AIEOcsURK0fGPztgYOKb2Ej3sno-Dv_6NoePkyemJFpK0dJ5PT79JIHT1ZqUPCsdoNLPJrjSYTm-SZ4i0vArW9xN1Ekl5c723lEcGTJI_dnQVr01kLvIFG8yaelBTYJj3Arv4nHMZvFqWlQwrOtBBmHPeg4chy70E0ek6yMrvF0zYuK3qdZ8A4D6sD5ebpQYJ-a8DUiXgYqSyEbEL6G3l1k6rJ3ervHZAnGfYlH5DW82JCDViPx6C_ZKpUnKGpJBh9hsjCn0uMN9lXSngMqmvtS_MvYirLL1cYBBrEVl0mpBri9H43S-thlZG-gWWtIw%3D%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=973e08ebd03d468792c6eff9c066ce50&_e=BH6kL4m1VnaX4wX4dG13umLCaalwfaNgbfMxGrGcIN3fUfzqACRKTPfpmnbV63Wu_sBFcZsArfE3eHmopXpjQ7AIEOcsURK0fGPztgYOKb2Ej3sno-Dv_6NoePkyemJFpK0dJ5PT79JIHT1ZqUPCsdoNLPJrjSYTm-SZ4i0vArW9xN1Ekl5c723lEcGTJI_dnQVr01kLvIFG8yaelBTYJj3Arv4nHMZvFqWlQwrOtBBmHPeg4chy70E0ek6yMrvF79JE-v5cJh0mFgecf3DJwa5hF35wf63oFOCp9XHSit9yhzUEvFcvFSIO2jM4FJUhQP7gtjZ0TSmQvOZtMcvWIHZSbTLXC0dKpv6H8_ff7W-O_TfYYzho2EhiNKgC436looGhUE_pnvfb8h8E-4Ri-Q%3D%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

name: Fred Guttenberg
subject: short and simple -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend -

I'm writing to you today because I am proud to endorse Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for U.S. Senate in Florida.

I love Florida, and am proud to call it home - but our state has been victim to some of the worst mass shootings in our country. Florida families, including mine, have been shattered by shootings in Parkland, Fort Lauderdale, and Orlando.

I know from personal experience that Florida desperately needs a leader in the United States Senate who cares about public safety and fiercely defends the right of every Floridian to live free of gun violence. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is that leader. Meanwhile, as a Senator, Rick Scott has sided with the gun lobby every time.

Debbie is up against a man who bought this Senate seat for himself last time around - and still only won by less than 1%! I hope you'll join me in supporting Debbie Mucarsel-Powell for Senate by splitting a gift between her campaign and the DSCC - with grassroots support, I know she can deliver the leadership Florida deserves and we can expand our Senate majority.

| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://go.dscc.org/go/15538?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231206-FredGuttenberg-GuttenbergDMPTandem-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231206-FredGuttenberg-GuttenbergDMPTandem-ETG-sl1&akid=12824%2E9716520%2EycvgM9)
---

Thank you for being in this fight. I know Debbie, and I know we can build a brighter future for Florida.

Fred Guttenberg
Brady PAC National Advisory Council
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=12824_9716520_ycvgM9&akid=12824%2E9716520%2EycvgM9)**.

This is appalling

| Have you been seeing how POORLY America's heroes are being treated, patriot?

A veteran was KICKED OUT of his home to house illegal migrants... FOR FREE. In Chicago, their new mayor blamed their failing city on REPUBLICANS!!! In Washington, DC, they're spending hundreds of thousands on repainting the "Black Lives Matter" Plaza while carjackings and crime are at an all-time high! | [**PROTECT AMERICA**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6035dbac00874bb6ae85d5be205c6c53&_e=NS_9C2AK-kRLqhI54ep_fNwL4eG8mv9phqVKsMiCeCnDuPSBOvVWlaxdc9OeZ8c_75YysF91OJFWAwEL5JpZVL5hx6MhcPmlY0Irxj2rEJ0qvy4vX6Nh_yqiRulNfnY2waZL4YL0iHlkpNOCypJkrOMFwGMbd3hf5kZ8WV8aLqxhFyzfz8XUAdiJqJlUWthX9kuumr1dpnrI32D0z7Qp5mr-a_KfHQvUbULKwJ3dQuljpqWd0ovVfQiDhgFuNQsCWT6t3kqn60PzlrvgJIOaxVYgTfJwPr1nXLmMHxqsqaxN3u__b83-mYVdAlSgmjJFyT_Zsu13IbyiZuAuPz_h-lO1z186DdFjp5kOmboTaYMVI9X1CzR5otqXKCa3UfIDEz3u3V_NECp8qAjuRs1tfQ%3D%3D)
