We need to ensure that we fire each and every single corrupt Democrat. We need Democrats and their policies **OUT** , and we need **MAGA, America-First** policies **IN!**

Will you join me in supporting a Republican win in November 2024? [**DONATE FOR A RED WIN**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=6035dbac00874bb6ae85d5be205c6c53&_e=NS_9C2AK-kRLqhI54ep_fNwL4eG8mv9phqVKsMiCeCnDuPSBOvVWlaxdc9OeZ8c_75YysF91OJFWAwEL5JpZVL5hx6MhcPmlY0Irxj2rEJ0qvy4vX6Nh_yqiRulNfnY2waZL4YL0iHlkpNOCypJkrOMFwGMbd3hf5kZ8WV8aLqxhFyzfz8XUAdiJqJlUWthX9kuumr1dpnrI32D0z7Qp5mr-a_KfHQvUbULKwJ3dQuncl_X1x0Ks6dFAcXdc9GTJIF2RdeUTfYZONPj8HyVJhBdRMvOhJrvK9wI8_qcpLL6gmpB48qtYnFMXZbMsbjJiiQYAE_zmKCaXFhrZyP6gtBkYM5KE1XFKh2nwCqy4sWBhK5rhudjVQFjy5UzPwEpIvRI_ci9W6k49FaH3RzIOEA%3D%3D)

---
| | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

It's official!

We are headed to the General Election in November as the Republican candidate for US Congressional District 6!

That means the race starts now! Beating the democrat will not be easy, and it will take all of us working together to win in November. We can do it!

Can you donate today to help make that happen?

Sean Casten is more vulnerable than he has ever been. He is being challenged, not just by 1 but by 2 people. I expect him to win, so we need to stay on course and focus on the win in November!!

Please consider making a contribution to my campaign to help me beat the democrat. No amount is too small. Can you donate $25 today?

[](https://conforti4congress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7fd34b7284bf7f5e87a4e45e5&id=7a27247bbd&e=25f4fa3311)

Your support is greatly appreciated.
Stay strong!
---
| Thank you,

Niki Conforti
Candidate
Illinois 6th Congressional District

clean_body: It's Official! | | | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, It's official! We are headed to the General Election in November as the Republican candidate for US Congressional District 6! That means the race starts now! Beating the democrat will not be easy, and it will take all of us working together to win in November. We can do it! Can you donate today to help make that happen? Sean Casten is more vulnerable than he has ever been. He is being challenged, not just by 1 but by 2 people. I expect him to win, so we need to stay on course and focus on the win in November!! Please consider making a contribution to my campaign to help me beat the democrat. No amount is too small. Can you donate $25 today? Your support is greatly appreciated. Stay strong! | Thank you, Niki Conforti Candidate Illinois 6th Congressional District | PS: Follow my campaign on , , and ! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Conforti for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I'm at my wits' end

|
---
| | |
I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.

**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**

But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.

**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoq89db205n34uvev3pfg3meiuuo2vp59fskjnc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie6ob2c5h2bs "STAND WITH RYAN")
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8l9buflv12dt3d1caicf71im4mth46gfludu838_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie6ob2c5h2bs "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8teg2laeur8o2ltud4mjq6bs7tpv7u5o2gv3m88_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie6ob2c5h2bs "DONATE TODAY")
---
You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5bfeffk4jnul19mnulkqstuvvu3h7c31hieit10_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c3ie6ob2c5h2bs "DONATE TODAY")

subject: RE: Republican Ballot Harvesting

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a8187480163142cdbd75693fdb9983b3&_e=UgSSTRdDX-FxSTpa9dJStvm55U_UqMbeGbTP54Fzpqkwci0tIevZTrzDKV6zpGP8YmQENY1Kri8jPWifRyW4_RiMSKeiE-Wv9NKwffjdV3WdO0S60MlFBOly-qO2pRZKtUv3pdvjlkwQMbs_N3Z1YfdUbEMqauLXSdG89OAyz2CM7adz2xTXxpxR9re_Os_agyvV58kkNjsEC5GHAH-LMCRZ_nNNczbXkd4sbYLZvbEPwVLn9uK4eYRiHCxSNWBlSrkDzIogGDfC20a8DdPEbWEcjWk6QqMUk9_wxPGqZNNR3Ef53HIi58sHR2M5UzaOsx66nUTys3Sp3NUuvrSFyJ_OHxFi0if1VfPJk-fOJgXbvc5sHU2tDskvOLH9LUVSwZyYNtupjqhbKa_M4FsW4-oba6lrxSrf3RuvWwrupvU%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a8187480163142cdbd75693fdb9983b3&_e=UgSSTRdDX-FxSTpa9dJStvm55U_UqMbeGbTP54Fzpqkwci0tIevZTrzDKV6zpGP8YmQENY1Kri8jPWifRyW4_RiMSKeiE-Wv9NKwffjdV3WdO0S60MlFBOly-qO2pRZKtUv3pdvjlkwQMbs_N3Z1YfdUbEMqauLXSdG89OAyz2CM7adz2xTXxpxR9re_Os_agyvV58kkNjsEC5GHAH-LMCRZ_nNNczbXkd4sbYLZvbEPwVLn9uK4eYRiHCxSNWBlSrkDzIogGDfC20a8DdPEbShafnOMxxi-sdfH3K9fyab1EZqIw2BK3r2plOIuPMuSFhhQjS633VArzhofSGJdVXyc-o7jhlJGt94-2CTwoWp4E1cMj1ZT7Xs9w0RNI3zrLySvD2q5BakbEqfAfzIOtiqdzVoc8yoV5FYJZGL7bXc%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_
---

This is a non-negotiable if we want to win.

Democrats are early voting in record numbers. Democrats have a sophisticated ballot harvesting operation in deep blue cities. And Democrats are all over social media platforms getting young Liberal voters to register.

**If we don 't do it too, we will lose.**

But make no mistake: We will ONLY be successful with the support of our grassroots team. No matter where you live in the country, this is your chance to directly impact whether Conservative WIN or LOSE the next election.

Will you do your part?

I look forward to seeing your name.

Thank you,

Byron Donalds
Co-Chairman of "Bank Your Vote"

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election. "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:" If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents. There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. body:
This past fall, the affiliated C3 organization, New PA Project Education Fund, conducted non-partisan voter registration civic education on campuses.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74679453/442318248/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231206doubled_N_NP_90DO_8_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5Y2JhNWFlLTU0OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qdcnuv8DV1TNpoOfyJr56pwVugO5Hl4hJLCz0EWn1us=)
| Hi there,

This past fall, the affiliated C3 organization, New PA Project Education Fund, conducted non-partisan voter registration and civic education on campuses across Pennsylvania.

**In one weekend blitz at Temple University in Philadelphia, the New PA Project Education Fund collected more than 70 voter registration forms!**

We had incredible conversations with students, where we asked them where they planned to be on Election Day and worked to ensure students were aware they could register to vote on campus. We had these conversations at several campuses across the Commonwealth with the intention of registering lots of students to vote, making sure they all knew what was at stake in November.

**_And this was the impact:_** Youth turnout in November DOUBLED on college campuses compared to the last time there was an open Supreme Court seat.

[**This is a BIG win, but to keep up the momentum heading into 2024, we need your help. Help us prepare to continue to engage youth voters across Pennsylvania by donating $25 today. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74679457/442318252/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231206doubled_N_NP_90DO_8_G_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5Y2JhNWFlLTU0OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qdcnuv8DV1TNpoOfyJr56pwVugO5Hl4hJLCz0EWn1us=) __
Despite this win, youth voters still have low engagement rates. According to The Civics Center, the overall voter registration rate for 18-year-olds in the collar counties of Philadelphia and the city itself is 17%. Additionally, school districts in Pittsburgh showed a 15% registration rate. They found low voter registration rates among 18-year-olds in the most populous areas of the Commonwealth. With critical elections coming up in 2024, we have to continue to work to improve those stats.

In order to further our democracy, we must ensure that young people are informed, engaged, and ready to vote. That’s why we always center youth in our work.

[**Youth empowerment is one of the New Pennsylvania Project’s top priorities, but we need your help. Will you chip in $25 right now to help us register as young voters at campuses across the Commonwealth?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74679495/442318278/1843371473?refcode=EM_F_231206doubled_N_NP_90DO_8_G_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5Y2JhNWFlLTU0OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Qdcnuv8DV1TNpoOfyJr56pwVugO5Hl4hJLCz0EWn1us=)

Thank you,

Peter, Don’t be fooled — Republicans are still angling to repeal the Affordable Care Act and make significant cuts to Medicare and Medicaid. Donald Trump recently posted on Truth Social that he’s still committed to repealing the ACA. New GOP Speaker Mike Johnson has not ruled out making cuts to Medicare to bring down the national debt. But here’s what we know: Healthcare is a human right. Fellow Conservative, Joe Biden could not be more out of touch. _Hardworking Americans face the worst cost-of-living crisis in 40 years. But Democrats seem hellbent on_ __banning gas cars__ _and replacing them with expensive electric vehicles built in China. _ I’ve been pushing back hard against Biden’s anti-oil and gas agenda since day one. And I recently ran a petition asking patriots like you to add your name to OPPOSE the war on gas-powered trucks. If you’re one of the 34,000 patriots who signed my petition to stand with me in this fight, I can’t thank you enough for your support. **Will you please pitch in a generous donation to help me DEFEAT the radical Democrats in 2024 and** _**STOP a total ban**_**on gas vehicles? ** **[**Make your contribution HERE >>>**](http://trk.tedcruz.-lG6kVCPw6K9i7SOa7IgtA)** From the internal combustion engine to gas stoves, the left wants to outlaw basic necessities that make our lives better. **[Please pitch in what you can to help me stop them.](http://trk.tedcruz._ZDjuLHSf4goQs8w)** Together, we can keep Texas red next year and take back America! If you’re one of the 34,000 patriots who signed my petition to stand with me in this fight, I can’t thank you enough for your support. Will you please pitch in a generous donation to help me DEFEAT the radical Democrats in 2024 and STOP a total banon gas vehicles? From the internal combustion engine to gas stoves, the left wants to outlaw basic necessities that make our lives better. Together, we can keep Texas red next year and take back America! For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. id:2023-11-29-15:13:35:431t |

name: Charles Harper, Evergreen
subject: Why is the federal government’s largest utility defying its own climate commitments and doubling down on dirty fossil fuels?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
It’s time the Biden administration held the Tennessee Valley Authority accountable
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)
---
| | Hi, A giant utility company that the government actually owns—**the Tennessee Valley Authority (TVA)** —is putting the Biden administration's very own climate commitments at risk.

If this seems absolutely nonsensical, that's because it is. **It's time TVA changes course—and it's on the Biden administration to hold this federal utility accountable.**
---
[**SEE HOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5078?t=4&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)
---
TVA was originally created by New Deal visionaries to uplift and bring power to underserved communities in the Southeast. But today, it's one of **America's dirtiest utilities** , shackling over 10 million people across 7 states to polluting, unreliable, and expensive energy.

And while TVA's **customers** —disproportionately Black, Latino, and low-income communities—face some of the **highest energy burdens in the country** , TVA's current **CEO Jeff Lyash** is raking in a whopping $10.5 million a year, making him the **highest-paid federal employee. **

_It doesn't have to be this way. _ **There is a future where TVA becomes a clean energy leader** that exemplifies President Biden's climate leadership, cuts costs and pollution, and empowers communities. [In our latest explainer, we share how recent shifts in decision-making power are creating an urgent opportunity to fix TVA.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5078?t=5&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)
---
[READ NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5078?t=7&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)
---
**The Biden administration has a choice to make—it's not too late for them to make the right one. **

Sincerely,

Charles Harper
Senior Policy Lead, Power SectorEvergreen Collaborative
---
| | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/337?t=8&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/338?t=9&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/336?t=10&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4575?t=11&akid=13892%2E53494%2E_BC7G_)

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Spare me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Republicans don’t give a damn about protecting kids and they are certainly not “pro-life.”

Friends —
Republicans don’t give a damn about protecting kids and they are certainly not “pro-life.”
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t cut child hunger programs.
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t allow guns, of all things, to be the leading cause of death for our kids.
And if they were interested in life, they wouldn't — once again — be attempting to take away people’s health care through the Affordable Care Act.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3056?t=1&akid=1706%2E4767699%2EN4Pey_)
And they call themselves "pro-life." Spare me.
Here's a refresher on what a “pro-life” agenda ACTUALLY looks like:
* gun safety laws
* taking action on climate change
* healthcare for all
* expanding pre-natal care
* expanding mental healthcare
* expanding childcare
* universal preschool

Obamacare is not just popular in blue states — it's popular in so-called Red States, as well. When expanding Medicaid is on the ballot, it wins — and it wins in states like Idaho, Missouri, Nebraska and Oklahoma.
Republicans will not stop until they can repeal the Affordable Care Act and take away people's health care — they even tried during the midst of a global pandemic.
That is what is on the ballot in this election.
\- Gavin
* * *
👉🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans like Ron DeSantis and Donald Trump with a zest for demonization.
We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.
_If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-dec23?express_lane=true&amount20&refcode=em231206-1-15&refcode2=1706_4767699_N4Pey_&akid=1706%2E4767699%2EN4Pey_)**
---
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-dec23?express_lane=true&refcode=em231206-1-15&refcode2=1706_4767699_N4Pey_&akid=1706%2E4767699%2EN4Pey_)**
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1706%2E4767699%2EN4Pey_).

1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

Friend, Last month, Florida State Representative Angie Nixon introduced a resolution in the Florida Legislature calling for a “de-escalation and cease-fire in the state of Israel and occupied Palestine.” **In response to her resolution, one Republican attempted to shout down Angie, calling for genocide against the Palestinian people** , and many of her colleagues physically turned their backs on her. When women of color stand up for our humanity and our rights, we’re silenced and censured. We can't let the political establishment silence our movement for a ceasefire. That’s why we need to have Angie’s back right now. **Tonight at 8 pm ET, I’m joining my sisters-in-service, Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez at a virtual fundraiser for Angie Nixon’s re-election campaign. Can you attend?** [**Click here to donate and RSVP to tonight’s virtual fundraiser in support of State Rep. Angie Nixon.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wi0QDIfUy4C3hnm6i8opoy9LrnBF4-qy1_K3L2kU61l_SDCXP4PCxnJ2P_JBe-yFWug_sE1PewN8PET5dgQ-BIQBxHNNv-ukEWir4-gOZDbKVz89r105BIoVMica0lTyFFIDEM1xpk_XQ0s16wIjdNrMkorJoTKXHzT-wHbaSAQ0DgZg_xsXP-fZ0KZvsXDIJAzpNu02CXIz7HG_oEvJCK2OQtbLEhea4lv6orgm5M5AHY7o2GlxLWN8geqAcdZKrHKwe4jLzBH3s2sgzdgqBDjj7P7bM6Ok1aYE5VCRodIyEqv6-2P4G8EMmWyCDf1R2OxZa44-lJLZ2eyfRbdMNJHkTXgPqlolj8rr1dPSeMdyqUVeoI_FarH3A4skPUuX9ney1n5dPo8eX9YJBk3Erj/41w/sSsu2fdFSbeZoisX9rmuEQ/h1/iH2uxTKkqetWUPy_qSMTTE446JBhgyimqQb__j643N4) _(After you donate, you’ll be redirected to register for the Zoom. ---
****
After a brief pause in the bloodshed, Israel’s government has resumed its genocidal bombing of Gaza. More than 15,000 Palestinians—including over 6,000 children have been killed by the Israeli government. Nearly 2 million people in Gaza have been displaced, and many are starving.
Last week, I stood in solidarity with elected officials, artists, and advocates on a hunger strike in front of the White House to demand a permanent ceasefire now.
I also held a vigil on the Capitol steps to honor every life lost in Palestine and Israel since this horrific violence began. We gathered in solidarity to grieve the lives of every innocent civilian killed, no matter their faith or ethnicity.
We must continue to demand the release of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained. We must keep the pressure on the White House and members of Congress to see Palestinians as human beings, advocate for a lasting ceasefire, and stop providing bombs and billions of U.S. tax dollars for war crimes.
As AIPAC plans to spend $100 million to defeat me and our allies in the ceasefire movement, we must support the elected officials who are speaking up to save lives. Let’s have Angie Nixon’s back and show our grassroots strength today.
**[Join me and Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez at a virtual fundraiser for Florida State Representative Angie Nixon tonight at 8 pm ET. Click here to donate and register to join the Zoom.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wi0QDIfUy4C3hnm6i8opoy4KZz4gYIRto8lvbTRZxuCeRUjDIuh9gPvg-VsAzzh7aHqiPzMKpN43sm81xorsg5r1t6dOFxXkIZxIsq-wHtmEM6ksMBo8j8e2VvAA08XwnWTKAyv0qcgJ4o0LwTeMJyb_ItqaKiQKCdGDXFzssjhnchzZjQUZ9cqW9O-XK4yqMBmo6SUML_W-qlXcuiWc5L0taTR1NxgGDMfHYpqWkdYovzClxbA_0lxMCWlxTpbpP6Mo3PVGHx2VR0jJSInq4klmJokRqugYeqW9RnJ2i97IfjGmlIIikSvz9wBihmw6WLMSgCkJ5O_7REpVUKvplthTBosLK2KZ6Dd7Q1iFArSmJX_C8SzH5rDVkxp66TmaOf7RIduN7BsjVpKFcpJi3I/41w/sSsu2fdFSbeZoisX9rmuEQ/h4/SdgSGjJf__Wuk3FmX5KokolQnIAXB6F0mhaAHUTlmO0) **
Thanks to you, our movement for a lasting ceasefire and a just peace is growing every day.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: We need to have Angie’s back right now. | | | Friend, Last month, Florida State Representative Angie Nixon introduced a resolution in the Florida Legislature calling for a “de-escalation and cease-fire in the state of Israel and occupied Palestine.” In response to her resolution, one Republican attempted to shout down Angie, calling for genocide against the Palestinian people , and many of her colleagues physically turned their backs on her. When women of color stand up for our humanity and our rights, we’re silenced and censured. We can't let the political establishment silence our movement for a ceasefire. That’s why we need to have Angie’s back right now. Tonight at 8 pm ET, I’m joining my sisters-in-service, Reps. Cori Bush, Ilhan Omar, and Delia Ramirez at a virtual fundraiser for Angie Nixon’s re-election campaign. Can you attend? (After you donate, you’ll be redirected to register for the Zoom. Then you’ll receive the link by email.) ** | After a brief pause in the bloodshed, Israel’s government has resumed its genocidal bombing of Gaza. More than 15,000 Palestinians—including over 6,000 children have been killed by the Israeli government. Nearly 2 million people in Gaza have been displaced, and many are starving. Last week, I stood in solidarity with elected officials, artists, and advocates on a hunger strike in front of the White House to demand a permanent ceasefire now. I also held a vigil on the Capitol steps to honor every life lost in Palestine and Israel since this horrific violence began. We gathered in solidarity to grieve the lives of every innocent civilian killed, no matter their faith or ethnicity. We must continue to demand the release of all hostages and those arbitrarily detained. We must keep the pressure on the White House and members of Congress to see Palestinians as human beings, advocate for a lasting ceasefire, and stop providing bombs and billions of U.S. tax dollars for war crimes. As AIPAC plans to spend $100 million to defeat me and our allies in the ceasefire movement, we must support the elected officials who are speaking up to save lives. Let’s have Angie Nixon’s back and show our grassroots strength today. Thanks to you, our movement for a lasting ceasefire and a just peace is growing every day. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . **I don’t want to scare you, but the plain fact is that Democrats could lose our Senate Majority in 2024.** Republicans only need **2** more seats to take control, and with Joe Manchin’s retirement and ultra-competitive races for other Democrat-held seats, _the odds are in the GOP’s favor._ **But we have an opportunity _right_ here in Tennessee to defeat Senator Blackburn, flip a red seat, and secure control of the Senate for Democrats.** If we defeat Marsha Blackburn, Democrats can hold our majority. But she has corporate PACs and powerful far-right donors on her side to fund her reelection bid. I’ve got YOU. We’re building this movement from the grassroots up because we KNOW that the only thing that can overcome Marsha Blackburn and the TN GOP is people power. **_[That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in just $10, or anything you can afford, to help keep up the fight and KEEP THE SENATE BLUE!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74688827/442330347/209297649?amount=10&refcode=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDU2OWY5NC01OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCIR3SmqF-XWWnEQznFRFbvGqf6X0YWb3wzsIFHR-k=)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74688829/442330349/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDU2OWY5NC01OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCIR3SmqF-XWWnEQznFRFbvGqf6X0YWb3wzsIFHR-k=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74688831/442330351/209297649?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ms=ea.5d569f94-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZDU2OWY5NC01OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eRCIR3SmqF-XWWnEQznFRFbvGqf6X0YWb3wzsIFHR-k=)

| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: And it’s up to ALL OF US to stop him. | I don’t want to scare you, but the plain fact is that Democrats could lose our Senate Majority in 2024. Republicans only need 2 more seats to take control, and with Joe Manchin’s retirement and ultra-competitive races for other Democrat-held seats, the odds are in the GOP’s favor. But we have an opportunity right here in Tennessee to defeat Senator Blackburn, flip a red seat, and secure control of the Senate for Democrats. If we defeat Marsha Blackburn, Democrats can hold our majority. But she has corporate PACs and powerful far-right donors on her side to fund her reelection bid. I’ve got YOU. We’re building this movement from the grassroots up because we KNOW that the only thing that can overcome Marsha Blackburn and the TN GOP is people power. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Together, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. # [Woke lunacy plus indoctrination: You do the math](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=887511&post_id=139471825&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDcxODI1LCJpYXQiOjE3MDE4ODI3MzYsImV4cCI6MTcwNDQ3NDczNiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTg4NzUxMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.SZHGVuKc9VQN5DIlFLlnCYuRANBGf88l0XSKo7wz_fA)
### American students see their math scores plummet. Here's how we fix it.
| | [1776 Project PAC](https://substack.com/redirect/6ece2129-ffb0-4db7-aaab-730dfbd2f328?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=887511&post_id=139471825&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5NDcxODI1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwMTg4MjczNiwiZXhwIjoxNzA0NDc0NzM2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItODg3NTExIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.U1kIgtxlrMrrNZwh398_yJyUFMRUsL6KaGQ33WO2QbM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/the1776projectpac/p/woke-lunacy-plus-indoctrination-you?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9af85891-b076-403d-859a-85a04563c612?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here at the 1776 Project PAC, we're fresh off major victories in school board races across the country. We're proud to say that nearly 60% of our school board candidates prevailed in November 7th elections.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/3d4fce3b-d76a-41a2-8ed2-22b6731a1622?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Our candidates were victorious in 68 out of 118 school board races in battleground states across the country, including Pennsylvania, Ohio, and Virginia.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6be8f60f-555a-4b87-a6d7-f5132719b6a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The key wins include:
-Flipping the Matthews County school board in Virginia from liberal to conservative and keeping control in Virginia's Bedford school district, which we flipped last year.
-Winning two seats on the Upper Perkiomen School Board in Pennsylvania, the second most heavily Democrat county in the state.
-Winning 36 out of our 37 school board races in York County, Pennsylvania.
-Flipping the South Western City school board in Franklin, Ohio to a 4-1 conservative majority.
[Share 1776's Newsletter](https://substack.com/redirect/fbf9a742-8a5b-4494-9ad2-5b3d2bc3274d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This all shows that when students and parents stay informed, stay engaged, and stay strong, we can take on the indoctrination, the woke madness, and restore merit back into education.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a1a2332-609f-4747-adf5-95f88be6af6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And the stakes could not be higher. [New numbers](https://substack.com/redirect/e54a1b0f-6bc0-4ae2-84d4-e03c05071e79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from standardized tests show a massive plummet among American students in mathematics, compared to other industrialized nations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82613943-8be2-421a-a97b-08f99ce0b0ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
U.S. students saw a 13-point decline in their 2022 Programme for International Student Assessment (PISA) math scores when compared to the 2018 exam.
And while the drop is being blamed largely on the pandemic and school closures, a major factor ignored by the left-wing extremists setting education policy in Washington is the departure from traditional education in favor of woke indoctrination.
And it doesn't just affect math.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bbdeec70-5d8c-4f5b-9cee-123f82bb396b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For example, we recently [spotlighted](https://substack.com/redirect/22214cba-2689-4994-9017-9e8418379354?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the agenda items at the National Council of Teachers of English conference, which focused on subjects like:
"Queerness and graphic novels"
"Decolonizing the department"
"Using CRT..."
"Land acknowledgement that draws connection to genocide in Palestine."
It's why in district after district, we're finding candidates ready to take on this madness and restore sanity back into the classroom.
Because if we don't turn the tide, the reading and math scores are only going from bad to worse.
[DONATE](https://substack.com/redirect/3d4fce3b-d76a-41a2-8ed2-22b6731a1622?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But with your help, we will continue to flip key school board races and give students a chance at a dignified education to learn actual skills, to embrace American patriotism, and to be equipped with the tools they need to find success in adulthood.
The work we're doing is more important than ever. And your support matters more than ever.
And now, it's time to move on to the next election cycle. Stay tuned.

Hello,
I’ll get right to it: **[I’m emailing to ask you to help me defeat Lauren Boebert by giving $5 right now to my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74690907/442332774/1610638071?refcode=em20231206am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=edba9486-5a94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJhOTQ4Ni01YTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=U0m-amdlghsqdma23L2uMiX6jFhh3YIDBk5ss2as1q0=)**
At the end of this month, we’re facing a critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines before – and for good reason.
After December 31st, my campaign is required by federal law to publicly report our fundraising totals. Everyone will be scouring our report. Reporters will write about how much we’ve raised. Advocacy groups will take notice. Lauren Boebert will see the strength of the people-powered campaign we’ve been building. And all of her Super PACs will be watching, ready to pounce at any sign of weakness.
This deadline isn’t just about meeting the goals we need to hit to fund our campaign operations. It’ll show the world whether or not we are prepared to take on extremists like Lauren Boebert – and defend our very democracy.
**My race against Lauren Boebert was the closest in the entire country in 2022. We lost by just 546 votes. But we're only 71% of the way toward hitting our huge $2 million online goal, and I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to take on Boebert’s Super PACs and win:**

clean_body: After December 31st, my campaign is required by federal law to publicly report our fundraising totals. Hello, I’ll get right to it: = At the end of this month, we’re facing a critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline. You’ve probably heard about these deadlines before – and for good reason. After December 31st, my campaign is required by federal law to publicly report our fundraising totals. Everyone will be scouring our report. Reporters will write about how much we’ve raised. Advocacy groups will take notice. Lauren Boebert will see the strength of the people-powered campaign we’ve been building. And all of her Super PACs will be watching, ready to pounce at any sign of weakness. This deadline isn’t just about meeting the goals we need to hit to fund our campaign operations. It’ll show the world whether or not we are prepared to take on extremists like Lauren Boebert – and defend our very democracy. My race against Lauren Boebert was the closest in the entire country in 2022. We lost by just 546 votes. But we're only 71% of the way toward hitting our huge $2 million online goal, and I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to take on Boebert’s Super PACs and win: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Whether or not we hit this goal and have a huge show of strength will set the tone for the rest of the entire campaign. I am so thankful that you’re making this journey with me. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Why Dr. Bowden Is Endorsing Our Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Don't miss her urgent message! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a17b3ffe3db2/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12666619?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=35d514f94d&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,

I’m proud to share that **Dr. Mary Talley Bowden has _endorsed my Congressional campaign_ to serve Texas’ 23rd District!**

Dr. Bowden is a true freedom fighter and a strong advocate for her patients. She is fighting big pharma and the medical establishment to protect her patients from dangerous and untested vaccines.

Americans want real leaders and patriots who will stand up for our constitutional rights. We are tired of government overreach, and that is why **__REAL PATRIOTS__ like Dr. Bowden and myself** are _**fighting back against Big Brother and big pharma. **_
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=2450facd69&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| I’m _deeply honored_ to have Dr. Bowden’s endorsement, and I’m grateful for her recognition that my campaign is about protecting our constitutional rights. Together, we are forming a coalition to fight for freedom and the American way of life.

When elected to Congress, I will be a woman of my word who fights for Texans’ Constitutional rights and will work tirelessly to ensure that the government stays out of our lives.

**Peter, let’s change the tide of history together by sending me to Congress to work for __YOU.__** With your grassroots support, we will break the status quo and put the government back to work for __**We The People!**__
**_[Can I count on your endorsement with a donation of $23.00 today?](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=6755f5702c&e=c982eb7ad4)_**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: The pressure is on.
body:
The pressure is on. But I’m ready to crush it on the debate stage!
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| |
---
| | | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~)
---

Friend,

_The pressure is on. But I 'm ready to crush it on the debate stage!_

With time running out until I take the stage for my fourth presidential debate, my team and I are still short of our goal.

**[Can I count on you to make a donation before I take the stage at 8 PM tonight so we can crush this goal?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~ "Can I count on you to make a donation before I take the stage at 8 PM tonight so we can crush this goal?")**

| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~)
---
| | [HELP REACH OUR GOAL OF 8K NEW DONATIONS](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~)
---

Every dollar we raise during this time will give us a surge of momentum before I step on stage and help us to:
* Capitalize on the momentum AFTER I walk off the stage.
* Amplify my message further than ever before.
* Host more events and meet with voters across the country.
* Continue building the necessary infrastructure for a winning campaign.
* **WIN THE WHITE HOUSE ON ELECTION DAY!**

**The bottom line is this, Friend:** We have a country to save, and I'm ready to show America WHY I am the best candidate for the job.

**[Will you step up in the next hour with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join my fight for America's future?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~ "Will you step up in the next hour with just $5, $10, $15, or more to hit my goal and join my fight for America’s future? ")**

I wouldn't be asking for your help if this wasn't such a pivotal moment for our campaign.

Thank you for being an invaluable source of support.

Let's win this!

---
My very best,

| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/fTxiwXSFYREaFD5uPZCbxQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RgAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS9mb3VydGgtZGViYXRlLWdvYWwtdHY_~)

Nikki Haley

| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UdBJJi-DsTpBJ0AINqiotg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RjAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~ "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UdBJJi-DsTpBJ0AINqiotg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU0KoP4RjAWh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlLndpbnJlZC5jb20vdGVhbS1zdGFuZC1mb3ItYW1lcmljYS93aHktaW0tcnVubmluZy1mb290ZXItdHY_~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

My very best, | ~ Nikki Haley | | ~ | | | | | | ~ "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | ~ "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | ~ "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. ~ "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | ~ "DONATE" | | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. ~~ By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. Texts may be sent via an automated telephone dialing system. Consent not required to contribute. Message frequency varies. Message and data rates may apply. and . You can opt out at any time. Text STOP to end. Text HELP for help. ~. . Contributions are not tax-deductible. Team Stand For America does not accept contributions from foreign nationals. ~ American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Support Your Values this Christmas/Hannukah Season
body:
| | |
---
---
As the holiday season heats up, we want to help you find great Christmas or Hanukkah gifts for friends and family while supporting fellow conservatives. When possible, we should use our hard-earned dollars to make purchases that support people who share our values. **_[That’s why we’ve compiled a list of items and services that will make fantastic gifts for the conservative in your life.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)_**
---
| | [VIEW ITEMS](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
We’ve already got some great items like Mark Levin’s book _The Democrat Party Hates America_ and Sen. Ted Cruz’s new book _Unwoke_. We’ll continue to add gift options in the coming weeks – so please check back often! Also, if you have a product or service to share with our members, [please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bWlkPTQ2NTg1JmlkPVQxN1VOVHNmWkp0d2tTeVRUQyJ9/ebFzapGsHCQ_6AfHzyyOLA). If approved, we will list it on the website. Thanks in advance for supporting the conservative movement with your Christmas and Hannukah shopping.

In liberty, Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | Secure the Border Ugly Christmas Sweater! Hey Friend, Get ready to turn heads at every holiday gathering with our limited edition "Secure the Border" Ugly Christmas Sweater! 🎅🧤 If you want one, you need to hurry 🚨 It's only available for a limited time.🚨 🎁 | Thank you and Merry Christmas! Team Cassidy P.S. to guarantee arrival before Christmas, you MUST order before midnight on Dec. 8th | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild. | Bill is working for all of Louisiana | DONATE BY MAIL Bill Cassidy for US Senate PO BOX 80505 Baton Rouge, LA 70898 Can’t donate? Don’t worry - There are other ways you can help! | Christmas Merch! (Team Cassidy) PO Box 80505, Baton Rouge, LA \-

| | Patriot,

---
Today, our campaign attorney will appear before a _State Supreme Court_ as Soros-funded Democrats make a serious attempt to _**REMOVE**_ my name from the 2024 ballot.
---
These left-wing radicals failed to beat us in a district court. Now, they’re appealing to a State Supreme Court in which _all 7 judges_ were appointed by _Democrats_.
---
_**This showdown may very well end up at the United States Supreme Court****.**_
---
But as I’ve said before, _I_ am not the victim in this case.
---
The victim of this despicable witch hunt is _**YOU**_.
---
**The Soros-funded Democrats are effectively trying to rob half the country of your right to vote.**
---
Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what’s happened to our once Free Republic.
---
2024 will not just be the most important election of our lifetime. It could be the LAST election we ever have.
---
If we don’t win on November 5, 2024, we will never have a free election again. ...And America will not survive.
---
_If you’re doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are spending all of our nation’s resources trying to disenfranchise half the country, then please do not even think about donating._

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: AIPAC tried to buy off Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

AOC’s values aren’t for sale.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231206-1.YXINqZ&refcode=em20231206-32202&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz ]HuffPost: Top Pro-Israel Group Offered Ocasio-Cortez $100,000 Campaign
Cash, Per New Book

AIPAC — the GOP-funded group that endorsed insurrectionists and has
attacked the Squad at every turn for fighting for Palestinian human rights
— offered AOC’s campaign $100,000 back in 2018.

But Alexandria, like all Justice Democrats candidates, isn’t for sale and
believes in the human rights of all people, including Palestinians. So of
course, she turned down the offer!

Now, AIPAC is preparing to spend $100 million in right-wing mega-donor
funds and recruiting credible primary challengers to our Squad of
progressive incumbents like AOC. We’ve gone up against their money before
and won because of a groundswell of grassroots support from people like
you.

If you’ve been waiting for the best time to make your
first donation, this is it. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231206-1.YXINqZ&refcode=em20231206-32202&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1003&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz ]Will you make your first contribution today
to help us fight back against AIPAC?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231206-1.YXINqZ&refcode=em20231206-32202&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1022&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz ]Contribute $3

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1023&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1024&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231206-32202-footer&t=1025&refcode2=32202_1203867_CdmMCz&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=32202%2E1203867%2ECdmMCz

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Everyone is lining up behind Kim’s campaign – from the California Democratic Party to SEIU to Reps. Katie Porter and Lou Correa.

Kim is our best chance to flip CA-45 blue and retake this Biden-won district. All eyes will be on our campaign from now until Primary Day, so we need to prove Kim has the grassroots support to take on Michelle Steel.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Levinson for NC PO BOX 207 Davidson, NC 28036 [info@LevinsonForNC
body:
To view this email as a web page, go [here](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/vm2/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/44811/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811)

---
| | |
---
Happy December! Thanksgiving has passed and the Holidays are here. As we enter the final weeks of 2023, our campaign continues to propel forward! We are **LESS than 100 days** away from Primary Election Day in North Carolina and the stakes could not be higher. Our team has been crisscrossing the district -- meeting with voters, attending events, walking in Christmas parades, and rallying the troops to help us take the first step towards restoring America by securing a victory in the Primary Election on March 5th.
---
---
With 2024 around the corner, we are rapidly approaching the most important election of our lifetime. We cannot sit on the sidelines. It's time to send proven leaders to Washington that will combat misguided policies of the radical left. We need to elect a Congressman who will:
* **Fund our Police and Keep our Neighborhoods Safe.**
* **Restore Law and Order at our Southern Border.**
* **Fight for Fiscal Responsibility in Washington.**
* **Restore the America we Love.**

I can't do this alone. I need your help now more than ever. **Here’s how you can help:** **1\. Donate:** Contribute to help us continue to spread our message across NC-14.
---
[Chip in $25, $50 or $100 TODAY](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/fb90bf1df089a972a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)
---
2\. **Volunteer: **Knock doors, make phone calls or organize an event to help us get out the vote on March 5th!
---
[Visit LevinsonforNC.com to Sign-Up to Volunteer](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/6d3a71377369d037a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)
---
3. **Spread the Word:** Share our campaign and message with your friends, family, and neighbors. Follow us on social media and share our posts!
---
| [](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/f8d04c7060424439a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)| [](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/a06a3cd62980a454a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)| [](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/6428be4512751b94a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)| [](http://portalc.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e260e24ab7d704886257084d9aa8c35b/44811/e83fbea0b01f5ffa3947229f28c3afba/c25681998cd777e8a6473c7b9fa19141/44811)
---|---|---|---
I would be honored to have your support! **\- Judge Eric Levinson**

body:

YOUR GOP DEBATE #4 STREAMING LINK

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50cb0b0af676d114f049062dd883e4123ac3a511b25a4046418dfb1f2d367c680e9efb430de7d8dc8117cdf914250c1bbfbdfb1ae4d5c0680a
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50d23e22a3abd68642410ae5a8c51939207bfc1e10bccf086beba03f9f2a1afae5c6673c45aca543986b48c61c25f4422c3e5cf86d58257fa7

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50cb0b0af676d114f049062dd883e4123ac3a511b25a4046418dfb1f2d367c680e9efb430de7d8dc8117cdf914250c1bbfbdfb1ae4d5c0680a
TUNE IN NOW

Right now, Ron DeSantis is preparing to take the stage and fight.

He's fought for the truth against the media.

He's fought for rights against the radical Left.

He's fought for kids against mega-corporations.

He's fought for freedom against out-of-control bureaucrats.

He has proven time and time again that he is the one fighter we can trust to win—and the nation is about to see it in action one more time right now.

This is the last critical debate night of the year and Ron DeSantis is looking to our team to make sure we meet the moment. Before he gets up there and faces meritless attacks from every corner, we're asking you to be a part of this crucial night.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50d481dcb277797ab0084a1352167a2016724cc64f2052dfabb527ea2ec5eeba1bfa6f269a4ff245c4c4c78e2c16f3edbf1fd967c2958210ce
DONATE $20.24

The spotlight's on us, friend.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50bffd30af67dd3c46ca55d933d635751e9472bca45276fdc286131b83aee30fe829446b6864bdb777f44eb9db3b5264b7cc50e0c70d27ca4c
Tune into the debate here and donate what you can before the night is out! He needs our support and he needs it tonight. Let's show what it looks like to never back down.

Thank you!

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50cb0b0af676d114f049062dd883e4123ac3a511b25a4046418dfb1f2d367c680e9efb430de7d8dc8117cdf914250c1bbfbdfb1ae4d5c0680a

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da509cf161e99e322702748b1912aa9ba69dc52941a96148246fa095ec4c506dc8bf2ddf5f3d9ea0191b337072651fd2c8213cd2219ec4c9d4f1
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50cb0b0af676d114f049062dd883e4123ac3a511b25a4046418dfb1f2d367c680e9efb430de7d8dc8117cdf914250c1bbfbdfb1ae4d5c0680a

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4f86d7109d62da50cb0b0af676d114f049062dd883e4123ac3a511b25a4046418dfb1f2d367c680e9efb430de7d8dc8117cdf914250c1bbfbdfb1ae4d5c0680a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules - I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). - This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. - I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. - I am at least eighteen years old. name: Mark (personal)
subject: I'm serious about how dangerous Bob Ferguson would be for Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Look, I am serious about improving public safety in Washington. I'm concerned about my opponent, Bob Ferguson, urging us to decriminalize dangerous drugs like fentanyl.

KUOW reported that “ _Ferguson may be the first statewide attorney general in the country to advocate for decriminalization._ ”

This is an extreme position for Ferguson to take. I don't know what he's thinking.

These drugs are devastating our communities and forcing families and businesses out of Washington.

**If you agree with me that the answer to this problem is to hold people accountable while providing access to substance abuse and mental health treatment, please sign my petition below.**
We need to be clear about where we all stand on this issue.

**[go.mulletforgovernor.com/a/public-drug-use](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694661/442345643/985698888?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167)**

Thanks for taking action on this today, friends. Mark
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Mullet
Date: Tues, Dec 5, 2023 at 8:09 AM
Subject: public safety

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694662/442345644/-774169363?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167)

Bob Ferguson says he wants _“Washington to change course...to eliminate the criminal penalties associated with possessing a non-commercial amount of drugs."_
\- KUOW, Washington AG urges legislators to 'move away from a war on drugs', April 2021
Mark has always been laser-focused on ensuring public drug use will not be tolerated in Washington state.

As governor, he will continue championing strong public safety measures to keep Washington communities and neighborhoods safe. **That includes accountability for public drug use.**

[Will you let Mark know you’re standing with him as he works to find the right balance between drug addiction treatment, public safety, and law enforcement needs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694663/442345645/-774169363?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167) | | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694664/442345646/-774169363?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167)**
---
**Mark’s opponent in this race doesn’t agree. Bob Ferguson is on record saying he wants to “eliminate the criminal penalties.” He supports open use of drugs like fentanyl in public without _accountability_.**
**“Ferguson may be the first statewide attorney general in the country to advocate for decriminalization.”**
\- KUOW, _Washington AG urges legislators to 'move away from a war on drugs', April 2021_
_While Mark is working with community leaders and law enforcement to find the right balance between getting people with drug addiction into treatment while ensuring our sidewalks, parks, and community spaces remain safe,_his opponent wants to give them a pass by decriminalizing the use of dangerous drugs.__

**If you agree Washington’s cities and counties should have the resources to hold people accountable while providing access to substance abuse and mental health treatment, please sign our petition.**
[SHOW YOUR SUPPORT FOR STRONG PUBLIC SAFETY. SIGN ON HERE.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694665/442345647/-774169363?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167)
**The contrast between Mark and his opponent could not be more evident.**

**Mark is taking action in the state Senate to end a lack of accountability for public drug use—and as governor, he will prioritize public safety. Sign below to show your support:** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74694666/442345648/-774169363?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_231206_2_2&refcode2=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=3gBNEyRsnOjn4BReXQrs2TR6xQpSyn2esdI+kvt/9o5uVLuNQPcGayom241RoMZu&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzQzM2MyMi02Mjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ndJBPg2M3Os6eR89qqxEW_Lge1Doc6lzBPdraXUxQpM=&emci=f404f4a0-5994-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=a7433c22-6294-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=45626167)**

Thanks for signing on.

— Team Mullet

clean_body: | | Look, I am serious about improving public safety in Washington. I'm concerned about my opponent, Bob Ferguson, urging us to decriminalize dangerous drugs like fentanyl. KUOW reported that “ Ferguson may be the first statewide attorney general in the country to advocate for decriminalization. ” This is an extreme position for Ferguson to take. I don't know what he's thinking. These drugs are devastating our communities and forcing families and businesses out of Washington. If you agree with me that the answer to this problem is to hold people accountable while providing access to substance abuse and mental health treatment, please sign my petition below. We need to be clear about where we all stand on this issue. Thanks for taking action on this today, friends. Mark \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Mullet Date: Tues, Dec 5, 2023 at 8:09 AM Subject: public safety Bob Ferguson says he wants “Washington to change course...to eliminate the criminal penalties associated with possessing a non-commercial amount of drugs." \- KUOW, Washington AG urges legislators to 'move away from a war on drugs', April 2021 Mark has always been laser-focused on ensuring public drug use will not be tolerated in Washington state. As governor, he will continue championing strong public safety measures to keep Washington communities and neighborhoods safe. That includes accountability for public drug use. | | Mark’s opponent in this race doesn’t agree. Bob Ferguson is on record saying he wants to “eliminate the criminal penalties.” He supports open use of drugs like fentanyl in public without accountability. “Ferguson may be the first statewide attorney general in the country to advocate for decriminalization.” \- KUOW, Washington AG urges legislators to 'move away from a war on drugs', April 2021 While Mark is working with community leaders and law enforcement to find the right balance between getting people with drug addiction into treatment while ensuring our sidewalks, parks, and community spaces remain safe,his opponent wants to give them a pass by decriminalizing the use of dangerous drugs. If you agree Washington’s cities and counties should have the resources to hold people accountable while providing access to substance abuse and mental health treatment, please sign our petition. The contrast between Mark and his opponent could not be more evident. Mark is taking action in the state Senate to end a lack of accountability for public drug use—and as governor, he will prioritize public safety. The moment I endorsed Donald J. Trump for President, liberals in Washington doubled down and viscously attacked my campaign. Now I'm hanging on by a thread.

Biden & the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend.

If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.**
**Now I 'm endorsing Trump in 2024. And if President Trump can't win Montana, nobody can.**
I'm running for Congress in the most important race in America.

I led the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm the toughest Republican in Washington D.C.
**Biden hates me because I 'm Trump's friend and close ally. And if he can destroy a Trump Patriot like me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**

After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again. This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6. Now I 'm endorsing Trump in 2024. And if President Trump can't win Montana, nobody can. And if he can destroy a Trump Patriot like me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. | But you have my word as a Navy SEAL, if you help me out today, I can promise you that we will ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.
