name: =?utf-8?Q?Jim=20Walsh?=
subject: Did you hear the great news?
disclaimer_text: paid for by working families - and it** **doesn't actually reduce emissions**
body:
I went from Kent to Tumwater to join the group Let's Go Washington to submit and qualify the first initiative, to repeal the gas tax. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6c2127029e&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Washington Republicans,

**In case you missed it:** Initiative 2117 - **to** **repeal the Democrat's cap and trade triple tax scheme** \- was filed with the Secretary of State's office.

[_You can click on the video link below to hear from me directly as I went live from the Sec. of State's office with the_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c2503f2a3b&e=6a281f566d) _[r](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5286147086&e=6a281f566d)_[ eceipt of filing.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e4df88e7e6&e=6a281f566d)

With 90,000 more signatures submitted than what is legally needed, the initiative is well on its way for full qualification and will first head to the legislature in 2024.... **and will most likely not be acted on by the Democrat majority.** This tax scheme was one of their prized accomplishments from the 2021 legislative session.

When the Democrat majority refuses to pass this initiative into law in Olympia, the**initiative will head to a statewide vote on the November ballot.**

A few quick notes before you watch the video below **(the media is already in full-spin mode to defend the Democrat scheme)** :

\- This cap and trade gas tax scheme is what is making Washington's price of living the highest in the nation alongside California.

\- This cap and trade gas tax scheme has created over $1.5 BILLION for Olympia Bureaucrats in this year alone - **paid for by working families - and it** **doesn't actually reduce emissions**. If Democrats were actually successful with their climate programs, Jay Inslee wouldn't have to scrub his website of failures.

\- **It punishes working families and** **doesn't actually reduce emissions** in our state. People still need to drive to work, and go to the grocery store, and drop kids off at school, and heat their homes.

\- **It doesn't just stop at our cars.** It's directly driving up the price of our groceries and other goods in the supply chain. And it is driving up your home utility costs - which is something**Bob Ferguson** wanted to hide from you on your utility bills.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=866ef64504&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Click to watch the video >>>](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d58b123f84&e=6a281f566d "Click to watch the video >>>")
---
| As it is stated in the video, this is just the beginning, not the end.

We have a lot of work to do from now until November to make sure voters understand this scheme and vote to pass this initiative.**This is a common-sense measure** that can restore affordability and help create transparency around the way Democrats build these tax schemes.

[_W_](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e992127846&e=6a281f566d)[ _atch my video and consider contributing to WAGOP efforts today to help us in this fight._](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=59706c8ea5&e=6a281f566d) 2024 is shaping up to be a great year for common-sense.

Sincerely,

Jim Walsh
Chairman
Washington State Republican Party
---

---

Peter Willis,

Last night, Bernie Sanders gave a powerful speech on the Senate floor calling on the United States to stop being complicit with Israel’s illegal bombing of Palestinian civilians.

As a Jewish Senator, Bernie’s voice is powerful and exposes AIPAC’s talking point that Jewish Americans stand behind Netanyahu’s government as unconnected from reality.

With thousands of innocent civilians dead, it’s time for Israel to stop violating international law. Add your name to stand with Bernie in calling for an end to Israel’s illegal bombing! However, illegally bombing civilians in Gaza only makes the situation on ground worse, strengthens Hamas’ political position, and endangers the Israeli hostages who are still held captive.

name: Marisa Wood
subject: [NEW] McCarthy's leaving Congress—here's what you need to know
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARISA WOOD FOR CONGRESS | FEC ID #: C00779439
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20231206_em_fr_b1_MW_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wood-email?refcode=20231206_em_fr_b1_MW_react]
Friend—Wow. Wow. Wow.
After his humiliating removal from his position as Speaker of the House, Kevin McCarthy JUST announced he's leaving Congress at the end of the month. Here's what you need to know:
1️⃣ Our mission hasn't changed—after decades of neglect from career politicians, our district needs a compassionate, working-class champion to deliver for them in Congress. I'm the public school teacher, grandmother, and longtime resident of this district who can get it done.
2️⃣ McCarthy leaving Congress will trigger a special election. Governor Newsom will announce the election date in early January, and we'll likely have a special election in the middle of 2024.
3️⃣ This means we'll have EVEN MORE to communicate to voters to ensure they know what's at stake for their next voice in Congress. Without a doubt, we'll have to spend EVEN MORE on direct voter contact for the likely special election in a few months.
Friend, any public school teacher knows how to stretch a dollar, do more with less, and change plans to do what's best for our students. I'm bringing that same spirit to this campaign.
Remember, this was never about Kevin McCarthy. It's about finally delivering for some of the most-neglected communities in California. Our broad grassroots movement has powered us through challenges before. We need to raise $11,297 TODAY to kick off this new phase of our campaign—can I count on you to donate today and help us meet our goal? name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want your opinion on religious liberty
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6LnIX_TvEqr55SNKMfcu1g~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6LnIX_TvEqr55SNKMfcu1g~~/AARclAA~~~) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6LnIX_TvEqr55SNKMfcu1g~~/AARclAA~~~)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6LnIX_TvEqr55SNKMfcu1g~~/AARclAA~~~)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

clean_body: There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried 188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb | | | | ~~ | Fellow American, There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. ~~ After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. ~~ In addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith. Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed. This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life. Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith? Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America. ~~ Thank you for your consideration. Regards, Dr. Ben Carson Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens. | | Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. American Freedom Report PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~ | ~~_

**Four more years of President Biden will lead to more jobs, a strong economy, and more protections for our rights.**
On the other hand, the _New York Times_ unsurprisingly just reported that Trump’s second administration could be “More Radical Than His First.”

Sarah Longwell

body:
| | | Hi, friend, it’s Colin Allred reaching out with some exciting news: **I just officially filed to be on the ballot to become Texas’ next Senator in 2024!** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74696488/442352053/1535078698?refcode=231206_SAP_Allred-FilingDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVhZjM5My02Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZiGLr7dd-M8iXqmSg2UskQxh54RTKr-5mOec_dtmHBg=)** I’m so proud of how far we’ve come since launching this campaign – and it’s all because of folks like you. But if there was ever a moment to build on our momentum, this is it. You and I both know that we don’t have to be embarrassed by our Senator – we can get a new one! **With my name officially on the ballot, Ted Cruz and his wealthy allies will be trying harder than ever to crush our movement, and I’m counting on you to help me show the strength of our grassroots team. That’s why I’m personally asking:** [**Will you split $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America to help me reach our goal to raise $150,000 today? Every dollar helps power our movement to defeat Ted Cruz, defend our Democratic Senate majority, and bring real leadership to Texas. Please, donate now. → **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74696489/442352054/1535078698?refcode=231206_SAP_Allred-FilingDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVhZjM5My02Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZiGLr7dd-M8iXqmSg2UskQxh54RTKr-5mOec_dtmHBg=) My fight to defeat Ted Cruz is personal. I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. She was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL. I decided to run for Congress to help more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream. I beat the odds – and an 11-term Republican incumbent – to help Democrats flip the House blue in 2018. Now, I’m running against Ted Cruz because I’m sick and tired of watching him fail our state, and experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight agree I can win. But not without your help, friend. **Thanks to wealthy mega donors and special interests, Ted Cruz has raised more than $40 million for his re-election campaign – and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to make sure I have what it takes to compete.** [**Please, will you split an immediate donation of $25 or more between my campaign and Serve America so we can fire Ted Cruz and bring real leadership to Texas? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74696490/442352055/1535078698?refcode=231206_SAP_Allred-FilingDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVhZjM5My02Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZiGLr7dd-M8iXqmSg2UskQxh54RTKr-5mOec_dtmHBg=) Thank you so much for being a part of this movement. We still have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this. Colin Allred [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74696491/442352056/697320110?refcode=231206_SAP_Allred-FilingDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVhZjM5My02Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZiGLr7dd-M8iXqmSg2UskQxh54RTKr-5mOec_dtmHBg=)
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74696492/442352057/697320110?refcode=231206_SAP_Allred-FilingDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OWVhZjM5My02Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZiGLr7dd-M8iXqmSg2UskQxh54RTKr-5mOec_dtmHBg=)

Now, I’m running against Ted Cruz because I’m sick and tired of watching him fail our state, and experts from CNN to FiveThirtyEight agree I can win. But not without your help, friend. Thanks to wealthy mega donors and special interests, Ted Cruz has raised more than $40 million for his re-election campaign – and I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to make sure I have what it takes to compete. = Thank you so much for being a part of this movement. We still have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing. Let’s do this. From the beginning of the cycle, we knew the race for the Senate majority would always come down to three key races: **Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.** But now that we’re approaching the end of 2023, the state of play is coming into focus.

First, Joe Manchin announced his retirement from the U.S. Senate, effectively ceding that Senate seat to the Republican Party.

**Now, Montana’s Senate seat is rated as a TOSSUP.**

Jon Tester is part of a dying breed – a Democrat representing a conservative state at the federal level. He’s one of just two left. Today’s announcement serves to show that this race is going to be a battle to the finish. **For Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority, they’ll have to convince voters in DEEP RED Montana that a man who votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time is worth reelecting.**

clean_body: NEWS ALERT: U.S. Senate Race Changed From Lean Democrat to TOSSUP. This is BIG. | | Fellow Conservative, On Thursday, national political forecasters moved my U.S. Senate race from Lean Democrat to TOSSUP. This race rating change should help convey to every conservative - and liberal - in America what we’ve been saying for months:The Senate majority runs through Montana. While this rating change will signal to conservatives that this is the race to watch in 2024, it will also put Democrats on HIGH ALERT.** Now is the perfect time to ; I know that Democrats will be sending tens of thousands of dollars to my opponent’s campaign today following this news. From the beginning of the cycle, we knew the race for the Senate majority would always come down to three key races: Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia. But now that we’re approaching the end of 2023, the state of play is coming into focus. First, Joe Manchin announced his retirement from the U.S. Senate, effectively ceding that Senate seat to the Republican Party. Now, Montana’s Senate seat is rated as a TOSSUP. Jon Tester is part of a dying breed – a Democrat representing a conservative state at the federal level. He’s one of just two left. Today’s announcement serves to show that this race is going to be a battle to the finish. For Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority, they’ll have to convince voters in DEEP RED Montana that a man who votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time is worth reelecting. And you can bet your bottom dollar they’ll pump several hundred million dollars into Montana to get the job done. The Democrats will make this the most expensive race in Montana history. I need your help to spoil their plans and save our country. – to help retire Jon Tester, and take back the Senate for the Republican Party. For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. # Breakthrough 8-Pound Solar Generator Is The Ultimate Protection Against Dangerous Blackouts And Toxic Fumes
A dangerous storm strikes... And in a flash... Supplies vanish in your city. Grocery stores... EMPTY. Water... SOLD OUT. Batteries... SOLD OUT. Gas stations... SOLD OUT. And without gas, that means no gas generators to keep your lights on, and no way to protect yourself and your family during a dangerous black out. Entire neighborhoods in darkness... **But picture this...** Instead of panicking and fumbling around in the dark, fearful and without supplies like everyone else... Imagine you and your family sitting back, relaxing and enjoying your evening... Riding out the storm and the power outage in total safety and with total peace of mind. You'll be able to run a toaster oven, a CPAP machine through the night, your TV, radios, GPS devices, lamps, small personal space heaters, fans, a mini fridge, electric blankets... **And you can use it right inside your home, because it's fume-free and SAFE.** You can't say that about a typical generator. Not by a long shot. So you can have the ultimate peace of mind that you and your family will stay connected when disaster strikes.
* Silent, Fume-FREE & Safe
* Fast Recharge
* Long-Lasting Battery
* Recharge 2,000 Times!
* Easy to Use
* Completely Portable & Easy to Use!
* Powers Your Favorite Devices
* FREE Portable 40-Watt Solar Panel Included
* and more!

That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**The Patriot Power Sidekick
Is An Essential Part of

I can charge my cell phone and iPad at the same time, run an electric razor, my radio, an electric blanket and so much more. It's so easy to take with you anywhere - very light!"_ _Craig W.
Police Officer
_ [**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVF4ZrsSfvyPavMVl--g7w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU20yP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTcmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBTMTJUMTIwMTIzX1JNX1JPTl8yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla7zBcGWrJegpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) **More Raving Reviews From Customers** | | **Rita L.** This product is so versatile, and at only 8 lbs, my grandchildren can get it. We had many trees down from a storm. The guys kept having to refill their gas powered chainsaws. My husband came out with this "little" box and his electric chainsaw. They laughed and said a long electric cord would be too dangerous. My husband calmly hooked up his Sidekick and made short work at lopping off the branches and then walked through the path he made. It lasted longer than the gas 'polluting' machines. Very grateful you have made this available to buy at an affordable price.
---|---
| **Steve G.** Peace of mind for years. I purchased this product to provide power to run a box fan in the summer and lights in the winter. I can use this product every day for over four years as it can be recharged up to 2,000 times. It won't make noise that draws attention and can create comfort in a difficult situation. Best of all, it's portable.
---|---
| **Thomas B.** Saved my CPAP machine during the winter storms. I just survived the ice storm, the freeze and the power outage in Texas using my 4Patriots products. I was most happy about my Patriot Power Sidekick. It's quiet. It's clean. I was able to deploy the solar panels on the dashboard of my van, it charged up. And then that night I plugged in my CPAP machine and it ran it all night long. With enough to charge my phone in the morning.
---|---
| **Jana H.** Portable power was a blessing when the grid failed us. I didn't think I'd need this but I needed it shortly after receiving it. This past February was the worst freeze that we, in Texas, have seen in a long time. Our power grid failed big time. We were without power for a couple of days. This product was a blessing. We were able to have a light and a small portable TV. I highly recommend this product and the company that sells it.
---|---
| **Allan D.** Patriot Power Sidekick to the rescue. We brought our new Patriot Power Sidekick with us on our last camping trip and it was a blessing. Our primary use was to power an air pump to easily fill up our air mattress for a comfortable night's sleep. One night we had a pinhole leak in the air mattress, so we just kept the Sidekick inside the tent hooked up to the air pump and ran it for a few minutes about every 3 hours to keep it fully inflated. It's quiet and powerful, and we will have it with us on every camping trip!
---|---
| **Chris S.** Power out, no problem. Recently had a power outage due to some crazy storms. I use my phone for everything. Having the sidekick charged up and charging my nearly dead phone meant I was able to have my alarm and get to work on time. Thank you for this compact, lightweight and fume free portable charging/light station available for when I needed it the most!
---|---
| **Richard B.** Well worth it! This is one of the items that made me a loyal customer. I never was a big fan on solar-powered anything. At the same time I've been in enough situations to know any type of a generator is necessary when you live in a more rural setting. Especially when gas prices go through the roof. I purchased the Sidekick and as soon as it arrived I unpacked it and plugged it into a lamp and left it plugged in all evening. I was impressed how little it took from the battery! After 3 hours the Sidekick was still at 98% fully charged. I'm looking forward to having two Sidekicks!
---|---
| **Frank S.** We have been looking for quite a while for something like this. The deal with the solar panels included was something not to pass up! We both have sleep apnea and use c/bipap machines for sleep. The power went out recently and the sidekick worked great. As a test we ran the Sidekick on the humidifier and it ran about 7 hours! It's a small humidifier. That's not bad for that type of application. Cannot wait till camping season comes along! We highly recommend this product.
---|---
[**➡ YES! I Want to Protect My Family Today With Life-Saving Solar Power!**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/DVF4ZrsSfvyPavMVl--g7w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU20yP0RnaHR0cHM6Ly90cmsucmVib290bWFya2V0aW5nLmNvbS9hZmZfYz9vZmZlcl9pZD0xMTcmYWZmX2lkPTE1MjAmYWZmX3N1YjI9UE9QUFBTMTJUMTIwMTIzX1JNX1JPTl8yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla7zBcGWrJegpUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)

Restore Our Nation

| | During a recent visit to Washington, D.C., I had the honor of meeting with the National Right to Work to discuss their crucial mission of protecting workers' rights and advocating for an open and fair workplace.
---
| [****](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=8b468620a8&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with the National Right to Work in their commitment to championing the cause of individual workers and fostering a pro-business environment.

I am proud to align myself with the National Right to Work effort. They are working towards fostering an environment that empowers individuals and promotes a thriving economy. I share their mission.

Now, more than ever, I need your support to continue this important work. Your contribution, no matter the size, will help me advocate for the rights of workers and create an environment that encourages business growth.

[To contribute to our cause, please click on the link below:](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=9401612210&e=54a81bd33c)

| [**Your support is invaluable as we work towards a future that empowers individuals and ensures a fair and open workplace. Thank you for standing with me on this critical journey.**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=a94f8c5b48&e=54a81bd33c)

[**ElizabethForNV.com**](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=442d59dc7d&e=54a81bd33c)

name: Derek Marshall
subject: California Labor Federation endorses my pro-worker campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KNZRgE7l55I8nU1Vw25kH3NO8ZQoAroKTub_hk8skIYMkBDizfs9nZSl5A-rIc_2SFIgp465grqvm95rmkPGOoWdZLphJjm2_e4ORvkp62iNRRaQtU_V4p-e00eiSU2JrbbM0tte4xzjQdTjZW3c5xaoR0wWfrmzpAYu1nUB-AdyJ0tHlk6mpEzggsTcbeA0FZoebqb6fWHrMQW6A5UGzkv4_Ckxl6K3XVBMlkzLwli2U4EFdrxNt9xJfwxqhStaJOd6ghvpEbXgsud9-3iMy0_wLbl1qUBNUa-wlCc8VtZ8rp7-8W3aTAidR2uzeyK_zE/41w/jeCpRSlgTaaWh46OET4HGw/h0/qHqa_jwM3z9zsKrPCtvr8KzkqoYy6uGmFpunDzt30vI) **[Donate to our union-endorsed campaign to flip CA-23 and take back the House.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KNZRgE7l55I8nU1Vw25kH3NUSOPLV1v0GuBseFOwReVbZaBCxu-Ag6a-NlRncQpnEkrvI2pkgc3H_hOYfn2Nso7D8y_cg4A9ilLc0Cee6BrTiU-wt9VMhLUpRQt-1RK_Y82kPISjEEapv5EnhCr0Iczy8wOoVqviRmBJ1KC3G07nY9gM3f7CRlIKLkPgYulc3usjeIB7ySXnZs1yaqnzbE-opIVBtAr7Mapnl9vDdEzvtD_dE_3Ikgts_ElGx9Cv_7WRZuUuC8zOG6gYax8n8FGmF6XMRQeXeNxEgtfgYkLBN7rHy6xKVIEYYyJ-tgVIFA/41w/jeCpRSlgTaaWh46OET4HGw/h1/rvtiLcEpaYFNve05nLA5hm_LjHzKVVH23wLGlU0GpCQ)**
* * *
I am proud to be endorsed by the California Labor Federation! They promote and defend the interest of working people and their families to improve California’s communities.
Like so many of us, I’ve experienced the underlying anxiety of living paycheck to paycheck. When workers across the country aren’t united, it is easier to exploit us.
When we unite and organize, our shared struggle gives us the power to improve our lives, bolster the economy, and strengthen our democracy.
**My opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, voted against the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which will expanded labor protections for working people who want to unionize for dignity and democracy in the workplace.**
Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you strengthen our campaign to create a more just and equitable future for working people and their families.
**[Our pro-labor campaign relies on your support to get out the vote. Will you chip in to flip CA-23 to blue and help dismantle inequality?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KNZRgE7l55I8nU1Vw25kH3N9CNx-qT4e8m8XBFHblhaCjN_kO28RfPPEv77lRGF7a-NV_kPg_4pRTZ5EkX7Q9YunS9xTaA-hrDXFf0r2uNQC-PEPRe7gAAZWaAzSEoh8TtueCYvxYRMQl1sij4Doimvx0Jih4I9ZsUfPwr6nozeblEJA6IahFSg8ZbiElQamSMDpuE2HzdUeLxK_tBV80th4LHVeYtvzRTm0UjeMZRI2b3XTj7t55WZpe_rFlQBiewmjkpqouXMidgAZ5FQAkC53k_dJb7hK2f0lEhlxpppRdeUMQsXJ6tbKe3rQOKZ1dY/41w/jeCpRSlgTaaWh46OET4HGw/h2/usVS0a3PnJyPP9lYhbUJsrukDDc68SrT99THl3-0ngg)** [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xzr1jdlx6hf-9GfWLihBmrLe932Xa-_X22jtEESfPQHO90S5xzktOCfBihNqSw9KNZRgE7l55I8nU1Vw25kH3NCP7QtZ6OTxyVx4aEHYG07rhsYJtJiQs4tYUnKB1HVDZxJrY6gJ1zOmjj4QZWZqilDsDSKITAUplV__FXaBd90XhAkTDK7pIOo-9_JVJSGQ7oYb0RlUeHKd3g9hCNNcPxeT2QUc6pj9HVDQPqbgiJCZYqIZHBKv-wILkfxlxiG_W1J2lgmGoSw6zT09fkJSYvf87u05__PB2Py9-GCPUNpMu4bdBc5_xgXSvH1Ox23MZxO35OwTXhPttb6N6upunHiAeut2RKKnHfSddGJgDz3OCCfmm1cIFkqVZYgtmfezI/41w/jeCpRSlgTaaWh46OET4HGw/h3/4mwo6SGDq7fY5JdsCut8X8uV54ynf8nX8g-Fj7tx0UE) I drive for Uber, and get to meet so many people and hear their stories.
Oftentimes they sound like mine - working long hours, worrying about paying bills and not having a buffer to weather a financial emergency. That’s just not right.
I am running for California’s 23rd District to champion the right to unionize without fear of penalty and affirm that everyone deserves a livable wage and safe working conditions. It is a fight for justice, equality, and our collective progress.
**Workers deserve elected leaders who stand with them. Now is the time to seize the opportunity to create a system that no longer puts profits over people!**

clean_body: | | | I am proud to be endorsed by the California Labor Federation! They promote and defend the interest of working people and their families to improve California’s communities. Like so many of us, I’ve experienced the underlying anxiety of living paycheck to paycheck. When workers across the country aren’t united, it is easier to exploit us. When we unite and organize, our shared struggle gives us the power to improve our lives, bolster the economy, and strengthen our democracy. My opponent, Rep. Jay Obernolte, voted against the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which will expanded labor protections for working people who want to unionize for dignity and democracy in the workplace. Contributions and solidarity from grassroots supporters like you strengthen our campaign to create a more just and equitable future for working people and their families. I drive for Uber, and get to meet so many people and hear their stories. Oftentimes they sound like mine - working long hours, worrying about paying bills and not having a buffer to weather a financial emergency. That’s just not right. I am running for California’s 23rd District to champion the right to unionize without fear of penalty and affirm that everyone deserves a livable wage and safe working conditions. It is a fight for justice, equality, and our collective progress. Workers deserve elected leaders who stand with them. Now is the time to seize the opportunity to create a system that no longer puts profits over people! ** ****Thanks for your support. Derek Marshall is a Democrat running for Congress in California's 23rd District. He's running to bring the folks of the high desert & mountains together for a more livable life. To donate by check, please mail to: Derek Marshall for Congress P.O. Box 2836 Victorville, CA 92395 | | Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress | | Sent via . Apoorva Ramaswamy

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Tonight, Vivek will take on the Establishment – AGAIN. Will you help him before the debate kicks off? | | Fellow American, Tonight’s the last Republican primary debate, and I have a personal ask of you. This is the final debate of the season – and could be one of the last times voters will hear from Vivek on a national stage before the Iowa Caucus in January. When Vivek started this campaign, he had zero political experience and was polling at 0.0% nationally. He’s proved so many D.C. insiders wrong. They don’t like that he’s disrupting the status quo. The Establishment will be watching our fundraising numbers closely, so we cannot afford to miss the mark tonight. | When Vivek puts his mind to something, he gets it done. I know that will not be any different once he’s elected President of the United States and leads our country toward a national revival. But Vivek and our team need your help. I know it means so much to him to have you in his corner. Thanks, Apoorva Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. 👋 Hi there, friend!
My name is Emily, and I'm Debbie's digital director. It's my job to build out a digital strategy that will send Debbie to the Senate and Rick Scott packing! **Reaching out to you is the number one item on my to-do list.**
As one of Debbie's earliest online supporters, you have incredibly valuable insights about this race, Debbie's campaign, and our digital strategy. Your feedback will be absolutely critical to my work from now all the way through to Election Day. That's why I've put together a special _Fourth Quarter Priorities Survey_ exclusively for top supporters like you.
**Please, will you take a moment to submit your responses before midnight tonight? Here's a personal survey link that I created for you:[surveys.signforgood.com/DMP-Dec-2023-Q4-Priorities-Survey-Email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74697829/442356801/1207837282?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk411-su-nd&refcode=jtk411-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY1MDFjNWEtNmE5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=7xiw215FOI2GxjNHmOTHus6KLeBGLmQZ-Y4rQyi3VTA=&emci=6334c79a-ae93-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=36501c5a-6a94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=3969733)**
If recent elections have proved anything, it's that digital activists are absolutely ESSENTIAL to a winning campaign. You made it possible for Democrats to defend our Senate majority against all the odds, even flipping a seat blue during one of the toughest election cycles in recent memory!
None of our victories in 2022 would have happened without your donations, survey responses, advocacy, and relentless belief in our candidates. Now, as we head into 2024, we'll need your help again.
All of us at Team Debbie understand just how critical you are to this campaign. That's why they hired me, and it's why I'm reaching out to you so early on. Fatima Goss Graves spoke during the hearing on “The Importance of Protecting Female Athletics and Title IX” held by the House Oversight Committee’s Subcommittee on Health Care and Financial Services. “Trans students participate in sports for the same reasons READ MORE [IMAGE] [IMAGE] [IMAGE] [IMAGE] American Briefing625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I want you to help me help Ryan Busse, an avid hunter, outdoorsman, and gun safety advocate, who is running for governor in Montana.

Ryan was a long-time executive at one of the country’s top gun manufacturers until Sandy Hook. After that horror he broke with the NRA and has worked to take them on ever since, calling for comprehensive gun safety legislation.

[So Peter, will you help me out and give to Ryan’s campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74698138/442357835/-1472974563?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_DEC23_1_1_AlFranken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY1NDg1ZTUtNmE5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0UGe52MtD2xIJGSo2dekAY9wfOzz0qZP5x4f_WIwU_E=) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74698139/442357836/-1472974563?source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_DEC23_1_1_AlFranken&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTY1NDg1ZTUtNmE5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0UGe52MtD2xIJGSo2dekAY9wfOzz0qZP5x4f_WIwU_E=)

I first got to know Ryan when he joined me on my podcast. I have never heard a more powerful, commonsense voice about the utter insanity of America’s gun industry. **And I truly believe he has a message that will resonate with Montanans.**

If that all sounds great, wait until I tell you about Greg Gianforte, the guy he’s running to replace...

Gianforte wants to insert himself into the private healthcare decisions of women. He wants to replace our kids’ textbooks with PragerU (not kidding). He wants to raise property taxes by over 40% for hardworking Montanans and their families.

On top of all that he assaulted a journalist during his first campaign for asking an honest question about healthcare policy. **Imagine becoming governor and thinking you can just body-slam people who ask questions you don’t like!**

clean_body: Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Dear Peter, I want you to help me help Ryan Busse, an avid hunter, outdoorsman, and gun safety advocate, who is running for governor in Montana. Ryan was a long-time executive at one of the country’s top gun manufacturers until Sandy Hook. After that horror he broke with the NRA and has worked to take them on ever since, calling for comprehensive gun safety legislation. = | | = I first got to know Ryan when he joined me on my podcast. I have never heard a more powerful, commonsense voice about the utter insanity of America’s gun industry. And I truly believe he has a message that will resonate with Montanans. If that all sounds great, wait until I tell you about Greg Gianforte, the guy he’s running to replace... Gianforte wants to insert himself into the private healthcare decisions of women. He wants to replace our kids’ textbooks with PragerU (not kidding). He wants to raise property taxes by over 40% for hardworking Montanans and their families. On top of all that he assaulted a journalist during his first campaign for asking an honest question about healthcare policy. Imagine becoming governor and thinking you can just body-slam people who ask questions you don’t like! = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = — AI P.S. And let’s send a message to the rest of the country and to the NRA that gun safety is a winning issue. = | | | ---|---|--- = For more than 25 years, Ryan was a successful executive within the gun industry. But he also saw how unchecked extremism could take away American freedoms and even jeopardize our democracy. Ryan sees the same thing happening to Montana: wealthy extremist Greg Gianforte bought his seat with his own millions, and now he’s raising our taxes, making Montana unaffordable, defunding our public schools, locking up our public lands, hijacking our freedoms and rigging the system for the rich. Ryan is running as an advocate for ALL Montanans and as a champion for our Montana way of life.** | = = PAID FOR BY BUSSE FOR MONTANA • DEMOCRAT • PO BOX 8537 • KALISPELL, MT 59904 = Busse for Montana PO Box 8537 Kalispell, MT 59904 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

subject: Sorry, did we miss something?

body:

https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=367d6a6c324edc30f9992dbf4576481c848499deeb8060e0290b2b90ab4de9ab59795927101e27f1bd80829598184fce779d72de8fc6e0a2dd618b7e64ad15812fcf624fc7cbbfed97c0adf670f2d618

Friend,

On this day, Wednesday, December 6th, 2023, it is NOT election day. So why do the elites, the mainstream media, even the moderator on this debate stage keep trying to convince you that this race is over? Because they’re running out of ideas to keep launching meritless attacks against Ron DeSantis.

They’re getting desperate. Ron DeSantis wins. He delivers on his promises. The American people are ready for change—from the top-down, and that’ll start with ushering in accountability and transparency across the board. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate who can single-handedly dismantle the Deep State. That’s why they’re scared.

In less than 12 months, the American people are getting their voice back. The elites do not get to call the shots on November 5th, 2024. And the media doesn’t get to lie about it either. They’ll try to write the story tonight, but the support we earn will outshine it. This is why your contribution matters.

By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=91e60ea5c9e3355f9e2b4714737fe9147508c5cdf282afb238dca5d2f4aac0338c92308b5a7c57ef0e2bf00c4303662487834d7f17f08c38
Rush in $20.24 Now

If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.

The world trusted the polls in 2020, and we all saw how that worked out. The only red wave this country saw was in the race for Governor of Florida: where we saw Ron DeSantis pull off a historic, 20-point victory in a purple state. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=91e60ea5c9e3355fb5faac3df9c2aae03641e6f2e9ed4e5bbd6e62ca2be032a1dde125ff7f76db6b2ea22a9e286eb22d8742ee7101fbe69f

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Today, our campaign attorney will appear before a State Supreme Court as Soros-funded Democrats make a serious attempt to REMOVE my name from the 2024 ballot. These left-wing radicals failed to beat us in a district court. Now, they're appealing to a State Supreme Court in which all 7 judges were appointed by Democrats. This showdown may very well end up at the United States Supreme Court. But as I've said before, I am not the victim in this case. The victim of this despicable witch hunt is YOU. The Soros-funded Democrats are effectively trying to rob half the country of your right to vote. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling in their graves if they could see what's happened to our once Free Republic. 2024 will not just be the most important election of our lifetime. It could be the LAST election we ever have. If we don't win on November 5, 2024, we will never have a free election again. ...And America will not survive. If you 're doing poorly due to the very sinister people who are spending all of our nation's resources trying to disenfranchise half the country, then please do not even think about donating. | Thank you, Donald J. name: Ben Wikler
subject: The Ron Johnson playbook
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We can’t let history repeat itself.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1655%2E35263%2EVThfYA)
[](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1655%2E35263%2EVThfYA) Hi Peter — Tammy told me I should reach out. There’s been a lot written about Tammy’s potential opponents lately, so let me catch you up. Wisconsin’s Senate race looks quiet on the surface, _but that’s exactly what national Republicans want you to think._ **In reality, not one but _two_ right-wing megamillionaires are running secret campaigns to take on Tammy Baldwin** — meeting with Senate Republicans’ campaign arm, hiring top GOP strategists, and even pledging to spend up to $20 million of their own personal wealth to win, all while delaying an official announcement for as long as possible. This is all part of the “Ron Johnson playbook” — Republican Ron Johnson’s winning strategy when he defeated Democratic incumbent Russ Feingold in 2010. Johnson announced late in the cycle to avoid personal financial disclosures for as long as possible, and then fueled his campaign with his own personal fortune. We’re seeing déjà vu with Republicans like Eric Hovde following the same winning playbook, but together we have a chance to make sure history doesn’t repeat itself in 2024. We need to start reaching voters, mobilizing Democrats, and preparing to respond to Republican attacks against Tammy’s record _right now_ — **Tammy and I are counting on your support to make it happen.** **[Will you pitch in a few bucks to Tammy’s reelection campaign to help her keep Wisconsin blue? We can’t fight back against Wisconsin Republicans and their “Ron Johnson playbook” without your help.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-dec23.PriOoE&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1655%2E35263%2EVThfYA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-dec23.4hRD_b&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1655%2E35263%2EVThfYA)

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8QN3Th7owwo8kvfp5CrMXnynOYgVrHHuOO00o2u7xNBtYYk1d_t-RfKyORziGKkA8Z65KQxkl6vGLpgkZm5ayDoKBQTqDf02HRFyH368yyuPFcRRvldFLVuzlKV-LvIpOaMEFgrQLOIapK5KokSIZCkeZSkx9gm7r05SdOPqdP66-MBfcQXW05imcDhbYpE28jnRE0rOpPIUE8Mzwv7h6jbsDg5farSlzhW9CRGbAGZavaIgDDjgbRvyW1gz7AnYPkdRCX-N4LTQIdirQleBhkQnqvqi6_ox-mx4ynbu-JQCPUalyh8xGxq3F417IjJIYg/41w/56B-xmF6QYSpLqUZTumt-A/h0/uUV84ZasqvgV_i6LyDTkCceMgB_8mrAQsiKN5daRof0) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtkBV14nu_pvO-bSOKSB-1cXHS4BP0FY3Brv4bDgJNZdvej40U-HYvkq1yJLq4Zs-8hKhWdeyl-Vv_uF2aAreh_MaK4UsleFDqj2hR6RGqy7qAJFGrCSitaViPhyHVO7f4R4uF6ZjMk77AN6jSzS5lPdxefhMmUZXHWZKi-DmjsOXeS8oZMxU6w5AGUIJev-nr79xiS6GhqD8T1z3RPQtTm71BjHbPrUKK8jx5AjPIj1dVbwDtURfViwj3JfD9Qi60_BYF3yf5yK4XCBc-oPbWqfEo9Gfr6p9A1eKk6JGtUFkiBSpeBkLL_Wvq1rKT_CK6Y/41w/56B-xmF6QYSpLqUZTumt-A/h1/8CHGrHtJdsxWdVosUDut8xFebmM-3_oZVmNljPz9HlA) **“We love you, Barbara. We think you would make a great senator. But Adam Schiff, he just looks like a senator.”**

Peter, I can’t tell you the number of times I’ve heard this on the campaign trail.

And I’ll be honest, it breaks my heart. Like Adam, I have served in Congress for over 20 years. I’ve sponsored over 600 bills. I’ve brought tens of millions of dollars home to California to build affordable housing, create good-paying union jobs, address the climate crisis, and provide housing for the unsheltered.

**The difference? Adam is a white man, and I am a Black woman.**

You see, since 1789 there have only been two African American women elected to the Senate — Vice President Kamala Harris and former Senator Carol Moseley Braun — who, together, served a total of 10 years. Maybe that’s why when people think about what a Senator looks like, they don’t think of a black woman. Well guess what? I think it's past time we change that. So whenever someone tries to tell me that a Black woman with all the experience I bring to the table can't win — I just smile and say, "Watch me."

**We can win this fight, Peter — but it's not going to be easy. Black women candidates on average raise just _one-third_ as much money as white women — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. That's why I'm reaching out: I need to raise another $10,000 by midnight to overcome these hurdles and pull ahead, and I’m counting on your help to get there.**

[If you’re ready to help me win this race so I can become just the third Black woman elected to the Senate and build a progressive future for all of us, will you split a donation between myself and The Collective PAC now?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtkBV14nu_pvO-bSOKSB-1cXHS4BP0FY3Brv4bDgJNZdvej40U-HYvkq1yJLq4Zs-8hKhWdeyl-Vv_uF2aAreh_MQ6s-NJOJQXocXLoAfALclkCy5VxWPI0tmN1Dwud0YMv3kTLHuP8f1uQ9FC0Y_2acwPIWFAvwqFnjBpjr2U7zV8mDVLUxIO-p_awFAz-vPuF0daEIJKg1BDbr1tXzYrCzsxSVMfNfsX7NY4bBhUSAEU-KUvr3sqLfgcKPOMqqai1XwEuxFk41a23N5un9OKkNGbYsx0cDdvgayG1dwF3XtKsa3RK0jkM0p1rpA32SXz8/41w/56B-xmF6QYSpLqUZTumt-A/h2/wTeBz4DGS6jcziGfg8e8feZD2z2Z-7zCOF_epvLflo8)

I have _never_ backed down from a tough fight. Growing up in a world of racism and discrimination, backing down has simply never been an option for me. Because when someone doesn’t give me a seat at the table, I bring a folding chair. Just like I did at only 15 when I worked with the NAACP to integrate my high school cheerleading team and become the school’s first Black cheerleader.

Now, I’m ready to take the fight for justice to the Senate, where my lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless.

**So even if a Black woman isn’t what people think of when they think of a U.S. Senator, you can help change that. Because together, I know we can shatter this glass ceiling. But it's going to take serious resources to spread our progressive message and win, and I’m counting on you to help power this campaign forward.**

[Please, will you rush $10, split between myself and The Collective PAC to help me win in California? Every dollar you give will go directly toward fueling our progressive movement to victory.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z13Gsiw4jYjb8npbjGXirZLt3B3YmMzfTeaUv6D3l9TDms7SZmz4-Gf7x7MJr2CtkBV14nu_pvO-bSOKSB-1cXHS4BP0FY3Brv4bDgJNZdvej40U-HYvkq1yJLq4Zs-8hKhWdeyl-Vv_uF2aAreh_MgEak9o0jCpUz5WskKFAEzYtJfdqOcYRFFebOa_ND_YYkc4EtBFCQAN6-54YcZNe-QIUrfeKr0t74cs6e6HR0hbgEGS4rMRCM0Y-IlflXb-1lFWUqjPUp4q_q5CMV8RmiRwXIaaGkUm9WaYGgbk-6Cg0kMZgovAynBIt-4UU3cSF-U9171DABUh1DDqJEOrhGgeG0y1uyRvjRq3mBaKpl2_XohAXCNtMT5k1aJoLdmlk/41w/56B-xmF6QYSpLqUZTumt-A/h3/atcsbQMhQo64EhD3BcwcB_LRofmf9St3F3xI1wiKbLQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC.

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | “We love you, Barbara. We think you would make a great senator. But Adam Schiff, he just looks like a senator.” Peter, I can’t tell you the number of times I’ve heard this on the campaign trail. And I’ll be honest, it breaks my heart. Like Adam, I have served in Congress for over 20 years. I’ve sponsored over 600 bills. I’ve brought tens of millions of dollars home to California to build affordable housing, create good-paying union jobs, address the climate crisis, and provide housing for the unsheltered. The difference? Adam is a white man, and I am a Black woman. You see, since 1789 there have only been two African American women elected to the Senate — Vice President Kamala Harris and former Senator Carol Moseley Braun — who, together, served a total of 10 years. Maybe that’s why when people think about what a Senator looks like, they don’t think of a black woman. Well guess what? I think it's past time we change that. So whenever someone tries to tell me that a Black woman with all the experience I bring to the table can't win — I just smile and say, "Watch me." We can win this fight, Peter — but it's not going to be easy. Black women candidates on average raise just one-third as much money as white women — a metric that has become painfully clear in the fundraising deficit in this race. That's why I'm reaching out: I need to raise another $10,000 by midnight to overcome these hurdles and pull ahead, and I’m counting on your help to get there. I have never backed down from a tough fight. Growing up in a world of racism and discrimination, backing down has simply never been an option for me. Because when someone doesn’t give me a seat at the table, I bring a folding chair. Just like I did at only 15 when I worked with the NAACP to integrate my high school cheerleading team and become the school’s first Black cheerleader. Now, I’m ready to take the fight for justice to the Senate, where my lived experience as a Black woman making true progressive change for Californians will give a voice to those who are currently voiceless. So even if a Black woman isn’t what people think of when they think of a U.S. Senator, you can help change that. Because together, I know we can shatter this glass ceiling. But it's going to take serious resources to spread our progressive message and win, and I’m counting on you to help power this campaign forward. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thank you for standing with me in this fight. — Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . | | Derek, **Protecting voting rights. Safeguarding reproductive rights and health care access across the country. Protecting Social Security and Medicare.** According to our survey, these were **your** top priorities for Mark to focus on in the Senate as we set a new agenda for the next year following the legislative elections in Virginia. Senator Warner has always been a staunch defender of voting rights, health care access, and Social Security and Medicare. He has pushed for automatic and same-day voter registration, called for a federal standard for voter ID, and fought to make Election Day a holiday. He helped flip the General Assembly to stop the GOP’s planned abortion ban in its tracks and proudly passed the Inflation Reduction Act, which cuts and caps prescription drug costs for Americans. And he’s consistently pushed the Social Security Administration to address delays and improve service for millions of Americans. The thing is, if we want to continue to make progress on these issues – and we mean _real progress_ – like pass the Freedom to Vote Act, codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law, and keep Republicans from putting Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, we need to expand our Democratic Senate majority. __[**Can you contribute today to help us get it done?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699161/442361722/2081321142?refcode=mw_em_231206_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg3YzU0MC02ZTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toCyLQEuahQKDHgFPhNm0NpwyaWVXbqMWif5vKerDdk=)__ We can’t emphasize enough how important it is that you share what issues are top of mind for you with our team. It’s how we set our goals and organize our priorities for the months ahead. It’s what guides Mark’s work in Washington. But what _fuels_ this work is your contribution. Every dollar you donate, no matter what amount, helps Senator Warner send Democrats to Congress next year so we can have the last word on voting rights, health care, and Social Security and Medicare. __[**We’ve seen what’s possible with Democrats in control, so we’re asking: Can you help us continue to make historic progress by donating $5 to expand our Democratic Senate majority in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699162/442361723/2081321142?refcode=mw_em_231206_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg3YzU0MC02ZTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toCyLQEuahQKDHgFPhNm0NpwyaWVXbqMWif5vKerDdk=)__ Thank you, Team Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699163/442361724/2081321142?refcode=mw_em_231206_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTg3YzU0MC02ZTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toCyLQEuahQKDHgFPhNm0NpwyaWVXbqMWif5vKerDdk=)********

As if it weren’t enough that the special interest RINOs and their Deep State-approved puppet candidates were the single biggest advertising spender of the 2024 election (_even more than Crooked Joe and his allies!_)...
Their new final-hour plot of**$400 MILLION** in total against us now marks the LARGEST in-kind contribution _EVER_ to Crooked Joe’s campaign!
But as I’ve always said, _this_ is exactly what we’re up against in 2024.
Because 2024 isn’t any old election, and we’re not _just_ facing Crooked Joe...
_It is the FINAL BATTLE for America, and we’re going up against the Radical Democrats who want to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, the globalist warmongers who hate our country, a villainous Deep State hellbent on maintaining power at all costs, and yes, even the disloyal RINOs who would rather see four more years of Crooked Joe so long as it means keeping the one man who puts YOU first out of the White House._
But today, despite the many forces who seek to stop our incredible movement, I have never been more confident that with YOU at my side, we _WILL_ prevail!
I’m more committed now than _EVER_ , Friend. _Are you_?

name: James Carville
subject: I need your opinion ASAP...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I’m gonna level with you: **This might be the most important email I’ve sent your way in a while.**

See, in my decades working in politics, **I don’t think I’ve ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.**

That's why I'm holding strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- but time’s running out before the interview closes, and **I don't see your response![So please click here to get started right now and take the survey:](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61)
---

I’ll be honest: If we lose the Senate, **Mitch McConnell and his flat-out wacko candidates will grind all President Biden's progress to a halt -- and that’ll just be the beginning!**

Republicans are out there taking away a woman’s right to choose, restricting the right to vote, flat-out denying climate change... **And unless Democrats get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans are gonna control the Senate pretty soon.**

That's where you come in. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political insiders -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you join my interview by completing a quick survey?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewDecember/](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61)
---

Thank you.

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/15878?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61)

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

Derivative of [photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/6153?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61) by JD Lasica. [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20231206-JamesCarville-StrategyInterviewRF-Pros-sl1&akid=12805%2E9716520%2Eh7uy61).

Term Limits
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zEaOCQrHtK5kToUj1aiYPrIqpVobn0U9L-7rEaqutWRyUbmi6ATuq6edSvvYTim6capgTthWPPlzFPnNzLBYrMxIvz4avXPjlG3-c4n8mWLnS0hDb4nH5sXch8UZTWIl0CO7_6GZNamnwBoFJoVihkB4fgg2z2CxcU0vgYZGVrrd2KCQelhE5iHRksz0GuTgNzrpvXaA78qtzrvVO1_DdxPNGfO3goXLsVjE31kedQn7CCUrMjD9Ihjv1vkGq6K1ozcXzhP31SGR8p4Fzm4D_VqKCbXGd83N5lPk4VEO-UWmRes0Yo2xlw==&c=arKVs7PfhiDKAbDs7-mq-fJ_VeUWSQZlftGRu-HRLALFligVGFDBGQ==&ch=5hqzxKuQn0O5fN_XfKSlX3BcQuJfFbpmO7rKwaxCQG2LXh1Zj-cM7g==)

| Peter,
Do you think we need to get rid of these lifetime politicians like Chris Pappas, Nancy Pelosi, Jeanne Shaheen, Maggie Hassan, and Joe Biden?
All three of these "politicians" have been in office for over 100 years combined!
That is why I am PROUD to be the first and only candidate in New Hampshire's first congressional district to [sign the term limits pledge.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zEaOCQrHtK5kToUj1aiYPrIqpVobn0U9L-7rEaqutWRyUbmi6ATuq6edSvvYTim6capgTthWPPlzFPnNzLBYrMxIvz4avXPjlG3-c4n8mWLnS0hDb4nH5sXch8UZTWIl0CO7_6GZNamnwBoFJoVihkB4fgg2z2CxcU0vgYZGVrrd2KCQelhE5iHRksz0GuTgNzrpvXaA78qtzrvVO1_DdxPNGfO3goXLsVjE31kedQn7CCUrMjD9Ihjv1vkGq6K1ozcXzhP31SGR8p4Fzm4D_VqKCbXGd83N5lPk4VEO-UWmRes0Yo2xlw==&c=arKVs7PfhiDKAbDs7-mq-fJ_VeUWSQZlftGRu-HRLALFligVGFDBGQ==&ch=5hqzxKuQn0O5fN_XfKSlX3BcQuJfFbpmO7rKwaxCQG2LXh1Zj-cM7g==)
In my pledge to support term limits legislation, I stated:
"As someone who has spent time as a citizen legislator here in New Hampshire, I understand the vision our Founding Fathers had for Congress. In contrast to how we run things in the Granite State, a status quo of entrenched politicians on Capitol Hill has created a system where powerful elites have made a career out of what should be a public service. I join with a strong number of Americans who span all areas of political ideology in firm support of term limits for Congress. I will always fight for bi-partisan initiatives like these that will help fix a broken Washington, and I am proud to sign this pledge to the residents of NH-01."

| [PrescottforCongress.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zEaOCQrHtK5kToUj1aiYPrIqpVobn0U9L-7rEaqutWRyUbmi6ATuq3ia2qMw_-HAryJnaeUwG4oDgM3U4dsaW-WDyndwD978KBt-o67N5xbLfopRcnaqixudbPNsy294K73AARwRL_l9fKsj-Y0tmqgIgbZ2WkhS&c=arKVs7PfhiDKAbDs7-mq-fJ_VeUWSQZlftGRu-HRLALFligVGFDBGQ==&ch=5hqzxKuQn0O5fN_XfKSlX3BcQuJfFbpmO7rKwaxCQG2LXh1Zj-cM7g==)

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

body:
Make no mistake: Wisconsin’s Senate race is going to be one of our biggest battlegrounds.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699517/442362972/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I3MWYxMy03MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xim8owNSxrUD0VJP6UYEmzXhOsbJhWhf3bk44yZ6oMI=&emci=10b71f13-7094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=13b71f13-7094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=7731215)
---

| | In just a moment, [**I'm going to ask you to split a donation between The Blue Wave Project and Wisconsin Senator Tammy Baldwin's campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699518/442362973/1702471084?refcode=2023-12-06-baldwin&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=13b71f13-7094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I3MWYxMy03MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xim8owNSxrUD0VJP6UYEmzXhOsbJhWhf3bk44yZ6oMI=) But first, I want to explain why your support of Tammy's campaign is so critical today. Senator Joe Manchin's announcement confirmed what I've been saying all year long: that West Virginia is out of reach for us in 2024. Republicans are basically guaranteed to flip West Virginia, meaning they're just one seat away from taking back the Senate majority and installing Mitch McConnell to push through their dangerous right-wing agenda. **This reinforces that we have to win all 7 out of 7 critical races to keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's control.** And make no mistake: Wisconsin's Senate race is going to be one of our biggest battlegrounds. Wisconsin is already home to some of the most expensive and competitive races in our country—especially in a Presidential election year—and Senator Tammy Baldwin is one of Mitch McConnell's top targets to defeat.**He's not only handpicked her opponent, but he's also releasing a flood of dark money to fund a disinformation campaign against Tammy to flip this seat.** **Tammy is one of my most valuable allies in the Senate because she's willing to take on the hard fights against the powerful to protect the rights and interests of regular folks.** She's a fierce champion in the fight for equality, and the stakes are too high to let the GOP take back our Senate majority and push their dangerous MAGA agenda, so I'm asking: [**Can I count on you to split a donation between The Blue Wave Project and Wisconsin Senator Tammy Baldwin's campaign? Any amount will go a long way toward helping us defend Wisconsin's U.S. Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699520/442362974/1702471084?refcode=2023-12-06-baldwin&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=13b71f13-7094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I3MWYxMy03MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xim8owNSxrUD0VJP6UYEmzXhOsbJhWhf3bk44yZ6oMI=) [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699521/442362975/1702471084?refcode=2023-12-06-baldwin&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=13b71f13-7094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I3MWYxMy03MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xim8owNSxrUD0VJP6UYEmzXhOsbJhWhf3bk44yZ6oMI=) Winning this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority won't be easy, but I know the power and determination of this grassroots team can overcome any challenge we face. Onward! _Jeff_ **** | **Express Donate:** **If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and it will be split between The Blue Wave Project and Tammy Baldwin:**
