clean_body: Make no mistake: Wisconsin’s Senate race is going to be one of our biggest battlegrounds. | | | | In just a moment, = But first, I want to explain why your support of Tammy's campaign is so critical today. Senator Joe Manchin's announcement confirmed what I've been saying all year long: that West Virginia is out of reach for us in 2024. Republicans are basically guaranteed to flip West Virginia, meaning they're just one seat away from taking back the Senate majority and installing Mitch McConnell to push through their dangerous right-wing agenda. This reinforces that we have to win all 7 out of 7 critical races to keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's control. And make no mistake: Wisconsin's Senate race is going to be one of our biggest battlegrounds. Wisconsin is already home to some of the most expensive and competitive races in our country—especially in a Presidential election year—and Senator Tammy Baldwin is one of Mitch McConnell's top targets to defeat.He's not only handpicked her opponent, but he's also releasing a flood of dark money to fund a disinformation campaign against Tammy to flip this seat. Tammy is one of my most valuable allies in the Senate because she's willing to take on the hard fights against the powerful to protect the rights and interests of regular folks. She's a fierce champion in the fight for equality, and the stakes are too high to let the GOP take back our Senate majority and push their dangerous MAGA agenda, so I'm asking: = = Winning this race and defending our Democratic Senate majority won't be easy, but I know the power and determination of this grassroots team can overcome any challenge we face. Onward! Jeff ** | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly and it will be split between The Blue Wave Project and Tammy Baldwin: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by ** Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Judicial Watch: Records Show Federal Agency ‘Real-Time Narrative Tracking’ to Take Down Social Media Posts During 2020 Election
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently it received 44 pages of records
in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit from the U.S.
Department of Homeland Security (DHS) that show a close collaboration
between DHS’s Cybersecurity and Information Security Agency (CISA)
and the leftist Election Integrity Partnership (EIP) to engage in
“real-time narrative tracking” on all major social media platforms
in the days leading up to the 2020 election.

body:
Below is an email I’m circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u1uyjqBrLuDqWKbjHUSS3g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla8PPcGW_2pQSUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
Hi Fellow American,

Below is an email I'm circulating to outstanding leaders and principled conservatives like you. I think you may be interested in seeing it.

Please review the message at your earliest convenience and let me know if you would like to participate.

Best wishes,

Riley Gaines

P.S. The deadline is approaching to raise $1.5 million to host my upcoming college campus tour. If you'd like to give online, here's a secure link for you:
**[https://secured.leadershipinstitute.org/rgc-082424/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u1uyjqBrLuDqWKbjHUSS3g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla8PPcGW_2pQSUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

* * *

From: Riley Gaines <rileygaines@email.leadershipinstitute.org>
Send Date: August 9, 2023 9:55 AM
Subject: Did you see my announcement?

Dear Friend,

I hope you saw my announcement on Sean Hannity's show that I've partnered with the Leadership Institute to launch the Riley Gaines Center.

I'm the 12-time All-American swimmer who speaks out against transgender ideology and fights to defend basic truths - that men are men and women are women.

The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute is now the exclusive headquarters of my work to lead conservatives of all types - patriots who will not be silenced by the weight of the left's cultural pressure and who want to learn how to defend America's freedoms.

When the left tries to shout you down profanely, when they viciously attack you - that's when you know you're saying the right things.

For those who are attacked, vilified, and persecuted for their support of America's founding principles and traditional American values, the Riley Gaines Center sends a message that they are not alone - because I will stand bravely with them.

To train as many young people as I can to stand up for conservative principles, I must have the help of strong Leadership Institute supporters like you.

**[Will you help turn young men and women into Leaders for America?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u1uyjqBrLuDqWKbjHUSS3g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla8PPcGW_2pQSUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

The Riley Gaines Center is the exclusive home of my work to lead this crucial cause through:

* Speaking events and media appearances to rally everyday Americans to defend women's identity and uphold vital truths.

* A coalition of women, student athletes, parents, and those who have been harmed by radical transgender ideology, to join me in speaking out across the country.

* A fast-growing team of speakers and grassroots organizers, who will help turn those ready to defend freedom into champions who put their principles into action.

---
Through the Riley Gaines Center, my fellow Leadership Institute colleagues and I will identify, recruit, train, mentor, and empower students, athletes, and parents across the country to become campus, community, and national Leaders for America.

Not only will these young leaders help our country right now. They will stand up for our principles for decades to come.

**[By joining me and the Leadership Institute team with your contribution to this new effort, you make a powerful difference for conservatives across the country, from college campuses to the halls of power.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/u1uyjqBrLuDqWKbjHUSS3g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0SUaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmxlYWRlcnNoaXBpbnN0aXR1dGUub3JnL3JnYy0wODI0MjQvP3V0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1yaWxleV9hcHBlYWwmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVYyLVBBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTIwNlcDc3BjQgpla8PPcGW_2pQSUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

Thank you for your support and dedication to preserving commonsense truths and conservative principles in our country.

Stand bravely with me,

Riley Gaines
The Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute
---
The Leadership Institute, 1101 N. Highland St., Steven P.J. Wood Building, Arlington, VA 22201, United States

---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/IUmqsAflu4LIxZiDN0Sy6w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmVrw89wZb_alBJSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/S4vCn--H9__RYMPcweWLhw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnU3skP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpla8PPcGW_2pQSUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Where we were in 2021 — versus now?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Two years ago, something remarkable happened.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699703/442363797/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmEwM2NhNC03MTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmqwnQF3N_1cCT-I1YUOwAot_mm2nj-EhEp9Ix5TkyM=&emci=bde9bcfa-6194-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=12a03ca4-7194-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Two years after Democrats led a bipartisan coalition to pass the greatest infrastructure and public works legislation of our lifetimes, I think it is important to revisit just how much good has come from this effort.** But first, a reminder of what we were up against as we attempted to get the job done back in 2021: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699704/442363798/1596212816?refcode=2023-12-06-infrastructure&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=12a03ca4-7194-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmEwM2NhNC03MTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmqwnQF3N_1cCT-I1YUOwAot_mm2nj-EhEp9Ix5TkyM=) That was from _Politico_ back in the summer of 2021, and tells just about everything you need to know about the kind of opposition we faced. **We were up against Trump-style scare politics, through and through: threats, lies, and insinuation—with the promise of political repercussions if things did not go the way of Trump. So it is no surprise what came next:** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74699705/442363799/1596212816?refcode=2023-12-06-infrastructure&recurring=&amount=12&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=12a03ca4-7194-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmEwM2NhNC03MTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AmqwnQF3N_1cCT-I1YUOwAot_mm2nj-EhEp9Ix5TkyM=)** That was from _CNN_ _._ Trump went on to say that "All Republicans who voted for Democrat longevity should be ashamed of themselves" and insinuated severe political consequences. Let that sink in: Trump was incensed that Democratic accomplishments and good work would lead to people supporting us on Election Day, and threatened each and every Republican who maybe, just maybe, wanted to be an honest partner in the rebuilding of our great nation. **Because that is exactly what we are doing: rebuilding America, piece by piece. A great nation invests in its own people, in their health, safety, and future. Good, green infrastructure is exactly that, with job creation, modernization of out-of-date roads and bridges, and planning for our future.** There is a lot to cover here. _Stay tuned and keep an eye out for my next message in your inbox._ Because, when someone asks you just what our bipartisan infrastructure law was good for,_you are going to want to have the next email in this series handy._ _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Peter, I’m concerned about our safety...

The Biden administration's failures in addressing the immigration crisis are not only jeopardizing the well-being of our border communities but also affecting every corner of our nation.

I’m ready to address this issue.

But I need your support, Peter.

The policies enacted by the Biden administration have created a situation where illegal immigration is skyrocketing out of control, **turning every community into a border community and every state into a border state.
**
The total lack of border security is incentivizing further waves of illegal immigration, putting a strain on our resources, and compromising the safety of our citizens.

Our communities are feeling the impact of this crisis firsthand.

Overcrowded detention facilities, overwhelmed law enforcement agencies, and an increased burden on public services are just a few of the challenges we are facing.

The strain on our schools, healthcare system, and the job market is becoming more evident every day.

_It’s time to put a stop to this.
_
Join me in demanding a change in our nation's approach to immigration.

We must push for policies that prioritize the safety and security of our citizens.

[_**Will you stand with me in the fight to secure our southern border and protect the American way of life?**_](https://u32713940.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=QaFdQdrHVXbreAiZFK-2FZpoYXAnXuShHmfoKNlT2uNWWOK78rkMnXNr7-2FL-2FOCNu2ZO0ILWwZsrAMDRFAXsbj1gw7GR2sJDjcbEU-2F2VnqE-2F-2FnGQzw3lV61q-2B0FjWY1okpWeOVIunYkeeGVzu1GFGv5U74a8vcCHsTW5IFP2DjFEFGesWaUAp15FyPfefCe5tGDha3yUDCO5vcd-2FsqH-2BEdAtWAdSFWBf0FD5vfTxmwAVkPJ8JexYSHowjUM2DN7qZTUBfNe_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdkLMmWeLnwK0KfPGgXzXHvoIGcfoQrAuI0Zkzwvv9dkHghc1ZFPh4s2VPIB-2BUJPR1ce1MwXOgEsQtpD9Vs-2BDtc4wDzkCh1yUQYFA6-2BkJvtvP8a3Q4B1t-2FkAHdlJgW1nnM-2Bv06h2K7-2Fn1J46cK0rHlpsshYXUL8ksrE2BzQufgmZXVj5LbaLjyEP1EFgDy-2B8VgoEyPrq-2FTYd8G3e94NdWekNC8nl-2BJ4qa4I0wOxekMlcnJn9tzejsGTFm1EQrbOxDyIDX5ay3ZsyX1eRb9WLDBEA9Vtgfy-2Fe4eW3DqDrmp00e7ihAQdrYFSvt6KwQF9330sj2UfUPttKJYi-2FU2NTjonTC9V-2BcInNdoZBLoO-2FEOw2thntTZkwC4qXplbsim4yIn3DfkeAwx4rcIUsgar5If6f-2BEY3ASYCujoSNTraWmCGNzKysdWXkUbBDbAAJ0l48ws2Fj2z-2BZ3iUtS33u3Ywecb7tXnOGSOeg21-2FvBGcrwFncaolZPJkkjpQrNYHx7DmOkn8Ggs1rzk0Du0fzOo1ICliWKTd20q1Ka-2Byxb4WL7oVgXP61LiyGwxY5d-2B-2BTFbKLrQAPSnZYCiYn9-2BbQQAGSdhOJBCHyofQ1X5UWon7Gjl7-2Bf6rsS3Ico4kEalp00wq3UzYWWwoeJCRl4GQ-2Bi4Ag4dBYyjO5jf0OTCr47JM7PY-2BUAw-2FvPQrpdVQUbB5n54hRNHiX-2BGSio1yxLV74euOhPaMoX5U7PamT7psNxjcUNxK6O4MJZWtpWZRj5jMqmfrF6Maw-2F0Z00cC55-2FLC3bvFUqdkoe9IhFIXvNDNpyL-2F6Ms6YryIt80X8yw-2Fb9oGdqoU5HBK5GfgjzbsCXOqdhDicN6gIc8sR354os6ycQXCoRzigUpCwj66d0Sz0w8ePtkLSZIDG2aCLvCqugfi1cpEpRLCysUG-2FTb-2BvYVMOi7J5RHJFCHd8hrI9R7wrYhB6I746gzogbyHsniX7vRHSFSbp9y5lq0628o-2FSXOUCJHyBGU-3D)

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | This Demands Your Support! Peter, I’m concerned about our safety... The Biden administration's failures in addressing the immigration crisis are not only jeopardizing the well-being of our border communities but also affecting every corner of our nation. I’m ready to address this issue. But I need your support, Peter. The policies enacted by the Biden administration have created a situation where illegal immigration is skyrocketing out of control, turning every community into a border community and every state into a border state. The total lack of border security is incentivizing further waves of illegal immigration, putting a strain on our resources, and compromising the safety of our citizens. Our communities are feeling the impact of this crisis firsthand. Overcrowded detention facilities, overwhelmed law enforcement agencies, and an increased burden on public services are just a few of the challenges we are facing. The strain on our schools, healthcare system, and the job market is becoming more evident every day. It’s time to put a stop to this. Join me in demanding a change in our nation's approach to immigration. We must push for policies that prioritize the safety and security of our citizens. | Thank you for your unwavering support. Rep. Roger Williams TX-25 | | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Team Kennedy
subject: Restoring Trust: RFK Jr. Leads the Way
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.

|
---
| | | **A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dark_m_12_5_23_email_2_rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
A democratic government is supposed to be of, by, and for the people.
But government institutions have betrayed our trust.
The intelligence agencies spy on American citizens.
Government and tech platforms conspire to surveil and censor the public.
Regulatory agencies have been captured by those they are supposed to regulate: Wall Street controls the SEC, and polluters and extractive industries dominate the EPA.
Big Pharma controls the CDC, NIH, and FDA.
Big Ag controls the USDA.
Big Tech has captured the FTC.
No wonder trust in government is at an all-time low. It’s time to earn it back.
| |
---
**Here is what Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has pledged to do as President of the United States:**
* RFK Jr. will remake public institutions to serve the public.
* RFK Jr. will roll back the secrecy and make government transparent.
* RFK Jr. will protect whistleblowers and prosecute officials who abuse the public trust.
* RFK Jr. will rein in the lobbyists and slam shut the revolving door that shunts people from government agencies to lucrative positions in the companies they were supposed to regulate, and back again.
* RFK Jr. will get money out of politics.
* RFK Jr. will open our institutions to real citizen involvement.
* RFK Jr. will restore integrity to the government.

|
---
None of the other candidates have made a similar pledge.
None of the other candidates have the experience and know-how to make these concrete promises a reality.
If you agree with RFK Jr.'s vision for restoring integrity in Washington, please donate to his 2024 campaign for President _right now_.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Matthew=20Barton?=
subject: Youth Advisory Council
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=3c5d31b5ad&u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=537c2abf0a)
---
| |
---
| After a competitive application process, we are excited to announce this year's 2023-2024 DeSoto County District Attorney’s Youth Advisory Council – a first for the District Attorney’s Office.

The Council will meet regularly throughout the school year to give Barton’s administration insight into issues affecting our youth and equip students with skills to be successful leaders in the community.

This is the first of many initiatives to come that will show the positive direction our office is headed, resulting in a more successful and safe DeSoto County. The Advisory Council will not only provide our youth with the opportunity to have a voice and learn about the criminal justice system, but will also give our administration insight into the pressures facing our youth.

This year’s inaugural Council will be comprised of students who attend high schools from across DeSoto County and will begin meeting in January. Council members will be exposed to careers in law enforcement, the judicial system, participate in volunteer projects, and share ideas with state and local leaders. Additionally, students will have the opportunity to attend State Supreme Court and Circuit Court proceedings.

Click the link below to see this year's Council members.
---
| [Read the full story here](https://bartonfordesoto.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0289922a9bceb4e2230228a3d&id=e4f83927ae&e=3c5d31b5ad)
---
| | |
---
| Matthew Barton

clean_body: | | | | | | After a competitive application process, we are excited to announce this year's 2023-2024 DeSoto County District Attorney’s Youth Advisory Council – a first for the District Attorney’s Office. The Council will meet regularly throughout the school year to give Barton’s administration insight into issues affecting our youth and equip students with skills to be successful leaders in the community. This is the first of many initiatives to come that will show the positive direction our office is headed, resulting in a more successful and safe DeSoto County. The Advisory Council will not only provide our youth with the opportunity to have a voice and learn about the criminal justice system, but will also give our administration insight into the pressures facing our youth. This year’s inaugural Council will be comprised of students who attend high schools from across DeSoto County and will begin meeting in January. Council members will be exposed to careers in law enforcement, the judicial system, participate in volunteer projects, and share ideas with state and local leaders. Additionally, students will have the opportunity to attend State Supreme Court and Circuit Court proceedings. Click the link below to see this year's Council members. | | | | | Matthew Barton Sent from my iPhone PS: If you believe you’ve received this email message in error - or do not wish to receive future updates from me or my team for any reason - | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © | Matthew Barton for District Attorney | All rights reserved. name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: "not cute enough," doesn't "dress well enough," "nothing about you is attractive enough"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Unfortunately, this is exactly the kind of commentary Minnesotans have come to expect from our conservative challenger — beneath the dignity of any adult, nevermind someone seeking public office
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=783%2E791427%2EnZYjDY)

We wanted to make sure you saw this:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec23.Lgr9Ln&refcode=em231206-1-t2&t=2&akid=783%2E791427%2EnZYjDY)
That's Ilhan's primary opponent — the same guy we defeated last year despite an onslaught of outside spending by AIPAC and other right-wing groups — saying she's _"not cute enough,"_ doesn't _"dress well enough,"_ and that nothing about her is _"attractive enough."_
Disgraceful.
Unfortunately, this is exactly the kind of commentary Minnesotans have come to expect from our conservative challenger — beneath the dignity of any adult, nevermind someone seeking public office.
These remarks are reminiscent of the worst kind of misogynistic nonsense we hear from people like Donald Trump, who think they can say anything they want about women and get away with it.
This is not the kind of thing Minnesota's 5th district or anywhere else should stand for, which is why we need your help to fight back.
**The likes of AIPAC and their GOP megadonors will do and spend whatever it takes to support our opponent and prop up his bigoted attacks against Ilhan, so please:**
[**Can you make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with our campaign today? Sending Ilhan back to Congress is something we cannot do without your support.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-dec23.Lgr9Ln&refcode=em231206-1-t2&t=3&akid=783%2E791427%2EnZYjDY)**

name: Bruna at United We Dream Action
subject: I remember exactly where I was when DACA was announced
body:
When my son is old enough, I'm hopeful that I'll be telling him how we won citizenship for millions. | | | Peter — I remember exactly where I was when DACA was first announced over 11 years ago: I was walking through a museum with my mom and sister in Washington, DC when we got the news about President Obama’s announcement. We didn't know much about the DACA program yet, but as we hugged and celebrated, we could all feel that our lives were about to change. Getting DACA meant that I was able to graduate without the threat of deportation looming over my head and start my career. My sister, who was in high school, was able to apply to college to study hospitality and then start her dream job at Disney. Getting DACA meant that when my husband and I decided to have a baby, I had access to quality healthcare for prenatal and postnatal care. It meant I had 12 weeks of paid maternity leave from my employer. It meant I had access to a therapist to support me through postpartum anxiety, and it meant I could afford childcare when I returned to work. **All of this should be the norm for every person living in this country. But for millions of undocumented people, it's not.** **Peter, United We Dream Action is collecting resources to support our work fighting for the dignity and protection of ALL undocumented people, not just DACA recipients. Will you make a contribution today to support that important work?** __ _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8CyraxqLLfAsc7Mu4MEH22nEZGSLCSm9HgCsMIZhMTf5JtvbEcJclYWsVt1goJvRYHxxASPuadlyuK_cvv4RneeTR4Az96dn4EZFpCKOvkwrvJKBojkXc5YTyuaa0J4bIBRC-L4LcJGUC8fE2QI2W9MU652_Icm_dxgbKhou_c3lXoN8N7XZ0xhOXWwHfkFkh5IuIeDVmaKgwBooZym5jP8cO0o7SCQjMlO6NrAv48BNoOOOvXMNL_E2tLTseV6i1JSE-DlXwqVSmlqP-30JrnZqpvUNJQYDpiFZJ9CCyl-ud5NrJNDFLLzrqXMSQf7GDdWzq2HyYkxTShy12kuf_HOxkoNIZ9hvK-23TczDqSf3FvWcKCXg8tvxZp73-qya9xwTXd4eJ97TUiC5AHuc0Zg0cevSsshda0VcLHh6q6-vG9i05QyIOToWlLFhbyvw2/41w/OrcPgKPoSi2v4j8tLokSrA/h0/RnchxJmuo7ZIVCJgO1i1ai90k3FtADY_i9twJ3DF6xA)

I never took DACA for granted. Since I first heard about DACA, I learned just how hard immigrant youth advocates and allies organized to win the largest immigration protection in over 40 years.
I know how hard we've worked to keep the program in place despite constant Republican attacks — like when we defended DACA at the Supreme Court in 2020 despite endless attacks from the Trump administration.
But the reality is we aren't fighting to protect a program, **we are fighting to protect people.**
The hard truth is that DACA has hundreds of thousands living in limbo. When my son was born, my immigration status meant we could’ve been separated in the future.
The possibility of being separated from your parents is a reality that over 300,000 US-born children live with. **That’s why we need permanent protections now.**
**DACA is temporary, but we are here to stay. That’s why today I’m asking you to make a donation to United We Dream Action to help us secure permanent protections for millions of undocumented people living in this country.**
__

We didn't know much about the DACA program yet, but as we hugged and celebrated, we could all feel that our lives were about to change. Getting DACA meant that I was able to graduate without the threat of deportation looming over my head and start my career. My sister, who was in high school, was able to apply to college to study hospitality and then start her dream job at Disney. Getting DACA meant that when my husband and I decided to have a baby, I had access to quality healthcare for prenatal and postnatal care. It meant I had 12 weeks of paid maternity leave from my employer. It meant I had access to a therapist to support me through postpartum anxiety, and it meant I could afford childcare when I returned to work. All of this should be the norm for every person living in this country. But for millions of undocumented people, it's not. Peter, United We Dream Action is collecting resources to support our work fighting for the dignity and protection of ALL undocumented people, not just DACA recipients. name: Carmen Goers
subject: Support Comprehensive Education on National Special Education Day
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **Support Comprehensive Education on National Special Education Day!****
**
---

Dear Peter,
On Saturday, we observed National Special Education Day. Let’s celebrate the strides we've made in special education and recommit to enhancing learning experiences for all students in Washington's 8th legislative district. Every child, regardless of their learning needs, deserves access to quality education that empowers and inspires.
Our campaign is dedicated to ensuring no student is left behind. We're working tirelessly to secure better resources, training, and support for special education programs. But to make our vision a reality, we need your help.
This National Special Education Day, consider supporting our mission with a donation of $20, $50, or $100.

---
| | | |
---
|
Your contribution will enable us to:

* Advocate for increased funding for special education.
* Support training programs for educators to better meet diverse learning needs.
* Ensure accessibility and inclusion are at the forefront of our education policies.

---
| [ DONATE TODAY! ](https://vgq.soundestlink.com/link/6570d4ce78ffb43e45bf9cc7/6570d4b40f6070e8994b7366/652845d9aa222127cf458b43?signature=be0ba681055afbbe1272d8fc785153da9c906065d09eec6ae295a099bce74037)
---
| | | Together, we can build a more understanding and supportive educational environment for every student in our community.
Thank you for standing with us in this vital cause. Let’s honor National Special Education Day not just in words, but through meaningful action.

Sincerely,

Carmen Goers

---

clean_body: Join the Team | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Support Comprehensive Education on National Special Education Day! Dear Peter, On Saturday, we observed National Special Education Day. Let’s celebrate the strides we've made in special education and recommit to enhancing learning experiences for all students in Washington's 8th legislative district. Every child, regardless of their learning needs, deserves access to quality education that empowers and inspires. Our campaign is dedicated to ensuring no student is left behind. We're working tirelessly to secure better resources, training, and support for special education programs. But to make our vision a reality, we need your help. This National Special Education Day, consider supporting our mission with a donation of $20, $50, or $100. | | | | | Your contribution will enable us to: Advocate for increased funding for special education. Support training programs for educators to better meet diverse learning needs. * Ensure accessibility and inclusion are at the forefront of our education policies. | | | | Together, we can build a more understanding and supportive educational environment for every student in our community. Thank you for standing with us in this vital cause. Let’s honor National Special Education Day not just in words, but through meaningful action. Sincerely, Carmen Goers | | | | | | ---|--- or |

name: Adam Schiff
subject: George Santos just attacked me on… Cameo?

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4680%2E5257348%2ELFsWYs ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — George
Santos has wasted no time finding a new top-notch job after I voted with a
bipartisan majority of our colleagues to expel him from Congress last
week.

He’s been selling “Cameo” videos, where customers pay well-known public
figures to record personalized messages — and he just recorded one
attacking yours truly.

You really cannot make this stuff up.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=dec2023_abs_em.239A57&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=4680%2E5257348%2ELFsWYs ]We have less than 3 months to combat the smears of MAGA crazies like
George Santos (whose former campaign chair is running a super PAC against
me) and reach California voters with the TRUTH before our March 5 primary
election. Will you rush a contribution of $3 or more to help reach our
emergency fundraising goal of generating 5,000 grassroots donations before
midnight so we have the resources to not only reach voters, but also to
respond to this latest desperate attack?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

A House Ethics Committee investigation found that George Santos lied to
voters, stole from his campaign contributors, made up his life story, and
scammed hundreds of thousands of New Yorkers out of a true, reliable
representative in the House.

Which makes his attack all the more cynical:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=4680%2E5257348%2ELFsWYs ]George Santos on Cameo attacking Adam Schiff

“Scum socialist liar Adam Schiff... Adam Schiff should be expelled and removed
from Congress for costing the American taxpayers $16 million in the Russia
hoax...Adam is a threat to our democracy.”

Let’s talk about the actual threat to our democracy: A Republican
Congressman who lied his way into office and not one, but two Speakers of
the House who let him continue to serve and receive top-secret national
security briefings to keep their slim GOP majority. And the Republican
Majority who protected him for far too long.

Republicans can’t stand that I had the guts to stand up to Donald Trump
when our democracy was on the line and they were too scared to act. And
they haven’t stopped seeking retribution against me since.

Santos is a serial liar and fraudster. But many people in the MAGA
movement will pile on to his attacks and share them online, all in an
effort to defeat my Senate campaign in this final three-month sprint.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2023_abs_em.181qVM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4680%2E5257348%2ELFsWYs ]I need your help to stand up to all these attacks and continue my
campaign for U.S. Senate, where I’m fighting for an economy that works for
everyone and a clean environment for our children and grandchildren. Will
you chip in to help me reach tonight’s emergency fundraising goal so we
can withstand the MAGA lies?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| | Patriot,

---
**Reports indicate I will once again take the WITNESS STAND for the fake trial in New York on Monday.**
---
Not since Teddy Roosevelt – over 100 years ago – has a former U.S. President taken the witness stand.
---
_Teddy was defending himself from what he called an**“alliance of corruption”** between the political machines that had seized control of both the Republicans and the Democrats._
---
_...Sound familiar, Patriot?_
---
Much like Teddy, I am a relentless fighter and a “happy warrior” in our mission to buck the political machine and put the _American people_ first.
---
It’s no surprise Teddy earned a spot on Mount Rushmore alongside Washington, Lincoln, and Jefferson.
---
Who knows, maybe one day, we will have to make a slight modification to Mount Rushmore...
---

Your chance to vote for a Washington, a Lincoln, a Jefferson, a Teddy Roosevelt only comes every once in a lifetime.
---
_And in 2024, you have the chance to cast a historic, once-in-a-lifetime vote to save our country and Make America Great Again!_
---
I’m committed now more than ever to save America. Are you?
---

clean_body: Reports indicate I will take the witness stand on Monday...| | | | | Patriot, Reports indicate I will once again take the WITNESS STAND for the fake trial in New York on Monday. Not since Teddy Roosevelt – over 100 years ago – has a former U.S. President taken the witness stand. Teddy was defending himself from what he called an“alliance of corruption” between the political machines that had seized control of both the Republicans and the Democrats. ...Sound familiar, Patriot? Much like Teddy, I am a relentless fighter and a “happy warrior” in our mission to buck the political machine and put the American people first. It’s no surprise Teddy earned a spot on Mount Rushmore alongside Washington, Lincoln, and Jefferson. Who knows, maybe one day, we will have to make a slight modification to Mount Rushmore... Your chance to vote for a Washington, a Lincoln, a Jefferson, a Teddy Roosevelt only comes every once in a lifetime. And in 2024, you have the chance to cast a historic, once-in-a-lifetime vote to save our country and Make America Great Again! I’m committed now more than ever to save America. Are you? Of course, if you are doing poorly due to the very sinister people running our country right now, please don’t even think about donating. I sincerely mean it! | | Thank you, Donald J. I'll be real honest with you

| |

---
| | | Folks - this is John Kennedy.

I'll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they're **WAY OFF TRACK** to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it'd be a complete disaster if they missed it.

To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office **PERMANENTLY.**

_They 're even attacking our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson, for being a Christian!!!_

_**[That's why I'm teaming up with my brother from the bayou - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. How dire is the situation? Well, just about every poll shows Republicans and Democrats in a **STATISTICAL TIE** for control of the House... and election experts just downgraded Republicans in a half-dozen key races.

The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I'm like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory **FULLY RELIES** on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help.

That's why I really need your help right now. We don't have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win!

_**[I'm personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfc428c2b13a4075846d5e3a5da22ebd&_e=rLfE2ADu7IEa9sr6veCeui4FbesfnawwvheDPLhKGUeuSkIHdzR6txf-Oemoaq_AbNMuzCCYftXiw6Xw7__3qdC78LETPPtuGZG6_DoWOGqMDxsDhG7za4rUB6hj8VAaPcMNzuPfGgemDYAWhijJj-Hhdhh6nkhFa9lNbhaqUknavMC1ks3FOrqak682UCbtaHccDkntjgdRdotkGfOjxUhEf_w9jI0VN5QyWan6lKnW73dqzu5S-3eqT94gHRvAG9HCK3N4JdB8A86bEg9vjTE3oX2z_7dICxNS7c2-oP8H4Co-R2Yb7WMxHtrOVeqD69JHQI_1x7dnAp8nICK4TBUR3CpPnKNEzP1HhZRiosWnwvRGCwkZDb1rRiDU33NhntS9lTOM9RAt-5PZzUg0Y5evxyXL8FntnGewoNMIw5E6gVguIJ-yxOemMIr9j_DzxMpeESIR_pJdW3tfaL21Dg%3D%3D "I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all.")**_

clean_body: I'll be real honest with you | | | | | Folks - this is John Kennedy. I'll be real honest with you: My friends over in the House have a huge deadline coming up, and I just got word they're WAY OFF TRACK to hit their goal. Let me tell you - it'd be a complete disaster if they missed it. To make matters even worse, Liberals are firing up the Democrat Machine to smear every last Conservative in the House and kick them out of office PERMANENTLY. They 're even attacking our new House Speaker, Mike Johnson, for being a Christian!!! "That’s why I’m teaming up with my brother from the bayou – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to raise $500,000 before December is over and done with. So with all the respect in the world, I’m personally asking you to kick in a few bucks and help save the day." | | | "Contribute Ten Bucks Now >>" | | | "Contribute Thirty Bucks \(Most Folks Give This Much\ >>") | | | "Contribute Fifty Bucks Now >>" | | | "Contribute More Now >>" How dire is the situation? Well, just about every poll shows Republicans and Democrats in a STATISTICAL TIE for control of the House... and election experts just downgraded Republicans in a half-dozen key races. The Democrat Machine is flush with cash and the pressure is on. I'm worried. I'm like a cat on a hot-tin roof - we urgently need your help because our path to victory FULLY RELIES on strong Conservatives like you agreeing to help. That's why I really need your help right now. We don't have time to sit and wait - not if we want to win! "I’m personally asking you for a few bucks by tonight to help save our Conservative friends and defeat the Democrat Machine once and for all." God bless you, John Kennedy | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY"** at your earliest convenience. It's important. What would you like me to keep in mind when I'm taking on the Radical Democrats? | | | "BEGIN YOUR SURVEY >>" | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. name: Hill Harper for Senate
subject: Choose your path
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILL HARPER FOR MICHIGAN
body:
We’re letting you choose *exactly* what your contribution supports.Together we’re going to defeat the establishment’s mega donors that want to support the status-quo.
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20231206&t=1&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)
**Peter, you’ve been a great supporter of our campaign and we’re so so so grateful for that.**
We hope you know that we really mean it when we say this is _our_ grassroots campaign to send Hill Harper to the Senate. And that’s why we always strive to be transparent, honest, and straight up with you — this is a partnership, and we’re in this race to represent your wants and needs in Washington.
That’s why today, we’re going to go above and beyond just telling you where your donations go.
**We’re going to let you choose exactly what aspect of our campaign you want to support with your contribution. YOU have the freedom to determine exactly what you want to support today.**
We hope you feel empowered knowing that not only will your contribution go towards a critical area of our campaign, but you get to direct your funds to what you’re most excited to support!
**So, if you’re able to, please take a moment to click one of the buttons below to chip in to one of our most pressing campaign expenses today!**
**[Donate $5 to support volunteer recruitment and training »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/381?amount=5&refcode=em20231206-671&t=2&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
**[Donate $5 to support canvassing »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/382?amount=5&refcode=em20231206-671&t=3&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
**[Donate $5 to support transportation »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/383?amount=5&refcode=em20231206-671&t=4&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
**[Donate $5 to keep our ads running online »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/384?amount=5&refcode=em20231206-671&t=5&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
**[Donate $5 to to help us afford campaign materials »](https://act.hillharper.com/go/385?amount=5&refcode=em20231206-671&t=6&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
Thank you so much,
Team Hill
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20231206&t=7&refcode2=671_62735_Wb4X7z&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=671%2E62735%2EWb4X7z)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

Fellow Conservative,

On Thursday, **national political forecasters** moved my U.S. Senate race from Lean Democrat to TOSSUP.

This race rating change should help convey to every conservative - and liberal - in America what we’ve been saying for months:**The Senate majority runs through Montana.**

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP9p3HtNmMEa-ZYRO1UXvRzIppXIREKffqpRJqN99OWvy7geFBNnBdaeyCw_0t2c6OwaTco88ZQ0iUs6HdT5LBwX8cSoHWsJ6fxRkJBE7hAbZPZg-Op2MpmTZoWk06H8hSaFH6-tSPAkagrmBRoxs91e8K6xKEqQLi68Nxy-BB17q8%3D)

While this rating change will signal to conservatives that this is the race to watch in 2024, it will also put Democrats on _**HIGH ALERT.**_****

Now is the perfect time to**[invest in my race](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP9irx-oM6sGDpaoD-cuYjtiZxzoVzqMD_tDXROVgeUVWJYMdCqpmQsf4kaKkbNx9bTiWuE1JoFE-2vap-V59USxuSV77AilJ-igoavUk9gIRBERpQW-9E4ahAUjTW23vCniKtzIWxn8Fqgom1oaWTL9M9v704NO1SBeVKbjWVYB8Q%3D)** ; I know that Democrats will be sending tens of thousands of dollars to my opponent’s campaign today following this news.

[**CHIP IN
FILL TIM'S MAJORITY FUND->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP97Sa7KP4j1sYO688UiMsuvCa3KEkbmo-gQDi7TbA5b89_YgDJAJCXGFALipOvbqems_sFdTrIS1gnx-6eM5J_WR769npC4U96QS3IliLKk84XVHdZQJdVx-0XcsCPhLGrI2M_-CeAa7k0kpLflQlFKOu_jdTJezfQmGIZ6KFuhbo%3D)

From the beginning of the cycle, we knew the race for the Senate majority would always come down to three key races: **Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.** But now that we’re approaching the end of 2023, the state of play is coming into focus.

First, Joe Manchin announced his retirement from the U.S. Senate, effectively ceding that Senate seat to the Republican Party.

**Now, Montana’s Senate seat is rated as a TOSSUP.**

Jon Tester is part of a dying breed – a Democrat representing a conservative state at the federal level. He’s one of just two left. Today’s announcement serves to show that this race is going to be a battle to the finish. **For Democrats to retain their razor-thin majority, they’ll have to convince voters in DEEP RED Montana that a man who votes with Joe Biden 91% of the time is worth reelecting.**

**And you can bet your bottom dollar they’ll pump several hundred million dollars into Montana to get the job done. The Democrats will make this the most expensive race in Montana history.**

I need your help to spoil their plans and save our country. **[Please consider sending me a gift of $5, $10, $15 – or whatever you can afford](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP9rDwPGZ8qRR6grfJ4hNhK1SpX3Q7_BA3CmdvNjxVuPViaC6J9ZS23GM43oHe4m5FmUruRLh3Kt-ryy6k3RUprJ4-wCFpqQrSUwBVO7ErhFfaZtSXVbQbQx2UatNHevdCccOCjFL5FkJQaVI1W4pk_zwh_qDqhLqZbSY-T8eFpJxY%3D)** – to help retire Jon Tester, and take back the Senate for the Republican Party.

[**CHIP IN
FILL TIM'S MAJORITY FUND->** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP9bSRsCL_hGx0-Bv0el0jMbAX4mOhaMj7vcsPu5X1hjp7b0GCD6bZRwBM2tBpyw5hPaigYa8z4QygYwbIYCI02sq58UTY_Y6zrU-qRnoSTodwwmQPzHqhpTALRx2hhXU-7t8Fzzjs3O0SPqqamvDqRhyrzBE5dUtdyyBYr3JclsMM%3D)

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

|
* * *

"
"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32xrzJCcfHB525pFIcas4WceikGX1SvRhTmOnq_2MibI-pa6X_CaBPHGzAqgDUKrtWTnqaOVGtdb9oSSmE1nHifj6ag2Hht3WGDvz_lsCDvDX3QAD3ocpogP6rdL9mLmjnN8fAy4gbtvynfTDXxELLTYwNxGGdZAWoWNV8iALWvU4PAOXL7uaZ_LD65f0GGiSrqPTEd-EUeVG_Qm-M-XBAd8FpLxwXMMUbXBZaTl4PvP97xNZhcngNxQfPFZXZioVGNgEZCOvj3k4EtcfZNqEro6MLmr0vykRadfdgZa9GgsVws0_6entgtbbRUAKxKNZQ40GowojdfkygDlmJUp7kqk9SzZ9EqEqYv-HHpeM0SNM7zRSi0Kw_TQ27ZSIXdoVLLZ4Vdepaw3LleK1dP2D4KQ%3D)

* * *

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW329pm7_89YGp2sFoGVZBktkK6QUVXnDU2EQEUQJHgBPfUHoKlC3nrA7CJXYcu4tCR9d5NHPJcEHJ8-qAUFy6NgdxroYzj8_Vyk0DkLfGoGWvb0yrLFHJZ1gDb9Fny4nwMu-TjjCwRhLoUXFbkRlTl1HpXNAXjAK1fMAUD4woIxfh9PrpANI0Dpgk32mvZn1IvMg%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW326yfpOvkcRkjSE2R73VZGHXp8e00nuL6Cmp9jGNu4qW2YL0fcxsmHdW0OCwVLQvI5Nvw3Kq3c9QR0lSFAWuZI7gDNS-xc22a3rWxTk4h4MGyegIvR6vtSbM4s9Wee9OnxOZZz31jxzig11gScpD6e8s_LuEmfSArWkcB8eBcDLHcq22NXrcJNaxjVtDAYU3o0w%3D%3D) [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=70534b60d81a458c9870dc17b28af215&_e=JeEOdAfOeaA2Jn8_XkW32-ZBb64B_pat04FQOznaqIewNeGaRaxPi4Cq6-oM9ym_0cK_XoIcAIVINA_4wmdgphEDDOHf1eccr-Xs09aesjd2Tocffo57mg0QJzGMa5Mhl9LPNNwhF_jIijO5N_AAbAFsBF9VjVg8auIpGTwIe2zzoDqdcl7nnG6hBRLDy3JOljgXOta6noWA99CYsJ6eOhqCYdPXl0FfGjcAO1trhVc%3D)

For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This week's Let Us Worship podcast is once again focused on Israel and the Middle East. The conversation is from our second Night of Hope for Israel worship night. I am once again joined by my friends, musicians Yair Levi and Carine Bassili and Pastors Michael Miller of Upperroom Dallas and Kyle Martin of Time to Revive.

Together we discuss how the Church should view Israel and how God sees Israel. We also talk about if what is happening is a prophetic moment in history, and what the Bible says about all of this! You won't want to miss this!

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, This week's Let Us Worship podcast is once again focused on Israel and the Middle East. The conversation is from our second Night of Hope for Israel worship night. I am once again joined by my friends, musicians Yair Levi and Carine Bassili and Pastors Michael Miller of Upperroom Dallas and Kyle Martin of Time to Revive. Together we discuss how the Church should view Israel and how God sees Israel. We also talk about if what is happening is a prophetic moment in history, and what the Bible says about all of this! You won't want to miss this! 🎧LISTEN ON ITUNES⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ 💻WATCH ON YOUTUBE⬇︎⬇︎⬇︎ My heart is to see the next generation of leaders stand strong and stand tall. As always, listen, subscribe, rate, review, and share! | | Till all hear, | | | | | Sean Feucht P.S. —While this was recorded a few weeks ago, Israeli musician and IDF captain Yair Levi, is currently on the battlefield right now!! name: Team DeSantis
subject: There IS an escape to the vicious cycle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6fad3a6c79e4dcb91fc3a50469b32de12dfc7ac14c13280b40354de2b4f665923913df38ce383144fc6e00d0f565b31974b8774e6b855523c6b75628c964c64555fcd84f5f9e422f5344adb5ed0eb1ff

Friend,

See Ron DeSantis up on that debate stage? When he says he’s fighting for the American people, he actually means it. When Donald Trump ran on the platform of repealing Obamacare so that Americans could have access to high-quality, affordable healthcare, he didn’t deliver. After Joe Biden got on his liberal high horse about providing affordable healthcare, he went on to personally avoid paying over a $100,000 in Affordable Care Act taxes through a loophole for the wealthy.

We’re tired of it. We cannot afford another 4 years of broken promises or the manipulation of Americans. Our current healthcare system is a DISASTER for everyday, working citizens just trying to receive adequate services. Ron DeSantis is the only candidate that understands how to take care of the American people. And if you’re listening to the GOP debate RIGHT NOW, you’re hearing a leader lay out a PLAN (the likes of which we haven’t heard a President declare in years.)

Help Ron DeSantis stand up for working Americans by donating before he gets off that stage! Send in $5, $10, or $25 here >>
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1f3283a2744562a604960b4d5c6f538b9a70b687860a91c2a1c3a6977ab416b94b8ffdce2d464885211213a9fd7c62bba5c898dea06d35b17
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1a53fdea2847815af993cf9dd7ac877311377a85e3d063187a6e44ff27d52a6d0e7780d1b1eb54bee746489059c665aa4cc1d8bd92ef8c3c7

Affordable healthcare should never be a breaking point in saving lives. The WORLD is watching us fail citizens by letting horrible policies saddle Americans young and old in debt. This nation is crying out for a President with a solid plan to finally put Americans first. It’s more clear than ever: we need Ron DeSantis and we need him now. But it won’t happen if we don’t step up today! Our campaign is counting on your support to help us hit our $50,000 debate grassroots fundraising goal!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1f3283a2744562a604960b4d5c6f538b9a70b687860a91c2a1c3a6977ab416b94b8ffdce2d464885211213a9fd7c62bba5c898dea06d35b17
CHIP IN BEFORE MIDNIGHT!

Rush in $5, $10, or $25 or whatever you can before the night is out!

Team DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1f3283a2744562a604960b4d5c6f538b9a70b687860a91c2a1c3a6977ab416b94b8ffdce2d464885211213a9fd7c62bba5c898dea06d35b17

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1bb1a21e9f9cfab06bfb5fbfe175a95362ba0e7abb435d2a6c5f937dcdf1826df59277726ac922b5cdbf6efa2aeb768c8283cd48524b98da3
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1f3283a2744562a604960b4d5c6f538b9a70b687860a91c2a1c3a6977ab416b94b8ffdce2d464885211213a9fd7c62bba5c898dea06d35b17

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=8364995e81617cf1f3283a2744562a604960b4d5c6f538b9a70b687860a91c2a1c3a6977ab416b94b8ffdce2d464885211213a9fd7c62bba5c898dea06d35b17

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Sign The Petition: Polar bear cubs crushed to death by Big Oil machinery
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177417?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Big Oil’s drilling machines are running over and killing mama polar bears and cubs in their dens — and even burying them alive under snow!**[_**Take urgent action now! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177418?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) _Friend, the oil and gas industry is destroying the Arctic with out of control drilling and fracking._ The region is already **warming 2x as fast** as the rest of the Earth, and the precious wildlife there is suffering the worst impacts of human-driven climate change. **Walruses and polar bears are watching their ice habitat melt away so rapidly that experts believe the entire Arctic region could be ice-free within the next 31 years!** And while these animals are clinging to survival, the fossil fuel industry continues to exploit the Arctic for profit. Drilling and fracking are not only terrible for the environment and increasing the rate of global warming, but they're bringing in massive amounts of pollutants to the area and putting vulnerable polar bears at risk of being run over or buried in snow by giant drilling machines. If we’re going to _**STOP the fossil fuel industry from decimating what’s left of the Arctic**_ and defend the voiceless wildlife — like walruses and polar bears — who call the region home, we need to demand accountability NOW. [_**Will you take urgent action today by adding your name to our petition calling for an END to increased oil and gas activity in the Arctic?**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177419?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177420?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
There are currently laws in place that require Big Oil to avoid known polar bear denning sites by at least one mile when drilling in the Arctic. But recent studies have shown _**MAJOR ERRORS**_ in the accuracy of the technology that’s used to detect these dens — where mama polar bears and cubs often burrow well beneath the snow’s surface.
The failure to properly detect denning sites puts innocent polar bears inside their dens at **HIGH RISK** of being _**RUN OVER and KILLED**_ by industrial-sized drilling machines — and even being **_BURIED ALIVE_** under mounds of snow, _CRUSHING these helpless animals to death._
We need the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) to _REJECT_ increased drilling activity if we’re going to protect the Arctic and all who live there. But the agency isn’t going to act unless we demonstrate strong public support from environmentalists like you, so we’re asking for your urgent help today, Friend. Helpless polar bears _desperately_ need us to speak up for them before they are **_WIPED OUT_** by Big Oil’s reckless drilling and fracking. Please help us get **2,823 more signatures by MIDNIGHT** to help _**SAVE endangered polar bears and protect the Arctic from Big Oil’s corporate greed.**_[_**Sign the petition and share with other activists NOW! >>**_](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177421?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2177420?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thanks for stepping up,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | == ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Big Oil’s drilling machines are running over and killing mama polar bears and cubs in their dens — and even burying them alive under snow!== Friend, the oil and gas industry is destroying the Arctic with out of control drilling and fracking. The region is already warming 2x as fast as the rest of the Earth, and the precious wildlife there is suffering the worst impacts of human-driven climate change. Walruses and polar bears are watching their ice habitat melt away so rapidly that experts believe the entire Arctic region could be ice-free within the next 31 years! And while these animals are clinging to survival, the fossil fuel industry continues to exploit the Arctic for profit. Drilling and fracking are not only terrible for the environment and increasing the rate of global warming, but they're bringing in massive amounts of pollutants to the area and putting vulnerable polar bears at risk of being run over or buried in snow by giant drilling machines. If we’re going to STOP the fossil fuel industry from decimating what’s left of the Arctic and defend the voiceless wildlife — like walruses and polar bears — who call the region home, we need to demand accountability NOW. == | == There are currently laws in place that require Big Oil to avoid known polar bear denning sites by at least one mile when drilling in the Arctic. But recent studies have shown MAJOR ERRORS in the accuracy of the technology that’s used to detect these dens — where mama polar bears and cubs often burrow well beneath the snow’s surface. The failure to properly detect denning sites puts innocent polar bears inside their dens at HIGH RISK of being RUN OVER and KILLED by industrial-sized drilling machines — and even being BURIED ALIVE under mounds of snow, CRUSHING these helpless animals to death. We need the U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service (FWS) to REJECT increased drilling activity if we’re going to protect the Arctic and all who live there. But the agency isn’t going to act unless we demonstrate strong public support from environmentalists like you, so we’re asking for your urgent help today, Friend. Helpless polar bears desperately need us to speak up for them before they are WIPED OUT by Big Oil’s reckless drilling and fracking. Please help us get 2,823 more signatures by MIDNIGHT to help SAVE endangered polar bears and protect the Arctic from Big Oil’s corporate greed.== == Thanks for stepping up, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687 foe.org/about-us/contact/

body:
#
Peter,
The next big test for our campaign — our last end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline of 2023 — is coming up on December 31st.
Before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount to help our campaign stay on track through the end of this month,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39608?refcode=em20231206-4326&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4326%2E614464%2EYZxmrs) will you please let us share more about what this deadline means for our movement here in Missouri?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39608?refcode=em20231206-4326&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4326%2E614464%2EYZxmrs)**
Every three months, the Federal Election Commission requires every candidate running for federal office to submit the full report of their campaign’s fundraising numbers into the public record — everything from how much we’ve raised, how many donations we’ve received, and who we’ve received those donations from.
These quarterly reports are an important measure of transparency. They give the public an opportunity to look under the hood of our grassroots movement and hold us accountable. But everyday people aren’t the only ones paying attention.
GOP insiders, members of the media, and even Josh Hawley himself will have access to all this information too — and they’ll use it to make all kinds of judgments about the strength of our campaign. So here’s the reality:
**We outraised Hawley’s campaign over the first nine months of this year, but we can’t take that granted this quarter** — ESPECIALLY since national Republicans and corporate mega-donors have already shown their willingness to spend millions to make Hawley look strong and fund attacks against Lucas.
So we need all hands on deck this month, Peter. We need this grassroots team to show up, and when we submit our report after December 31st, we need your name to be on it.
**That’s why we’re asking earlier than normal:[Will you help our campaign stay on track to have another record-breaking fundraising quarter by adding a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you think is best today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors in this race, so we’re counting on working people like you every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39608?refcode=em20231206-4326&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4326%2E614464%2EYZxmrs)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Tonight, Vivek will take on the Establishment – AGAIN. Will you help him before the debate kicks off? | | Fellow American, Tonight’s the last Republican primary debate, and I have a personal ask of you. This is the final debate of the season – and could be one of the last times voters will hear from Vivek on a national stage before the Iowa Caucus in January. When Vivek started this campaign, he had zero political experience and was polling at 0.0% nationally. He’s proved so many D.C. insiders wrong. They don’t like that he’s disrupting the status quo. The Establishment will be watching our fundraising numbers closely, so we cannot afford to miss the mark tonight. | When Vivek puts his mind to something, he gets it done. I know that will not be any different once he’s elected President of the United States and leads our country toward a national revival. But Vivek and our team need your help. I know it means so much to him to have you in his corner. Thanks, Apoorva Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Stop The Presses (via Courier Newsroom)
subject: The sudden media enthusiasm around Nikki Haley
body:
Haley isn’t Trump — but she’s no moderate either.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74702567/442374332/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNDU2NjctN2E5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aBSg5ot8FYx1XiT92AlCiQFJvCFgmvk4COQCu3cw4V0=&emci=182a40fb-5e94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=4c045667-7a94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
In recent weeks, as the GOP presidential candidate field has narrowed, mainstream media outlets are desperately trying to convince the public that Nikki Haley is having an “it moment” and could challenge Donald Trump.
**This is despite Trump’s significant lead in every single poll in every single state.**
So what gives?
We’ll explain exactly what’s going on in a moment, but if you’d like to support honest journalism that _doesn’t_ gloss over the GOP’s extremism, [**please make a $5 contribution now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74702568/442374334/-2108642285?refcode=em20231206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNDU2NjctN2E5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aBSg5ot8FYx1XiT92AlCiQFJvCFgmvk4COQCu3cw4V0=)
So, let’s talk about the reasons behind the desperate attempt by the media to get us to believe in Haley’s so-called surge:
1. Mainstream media outlets like _The New York Times_ need clicks and eyeballs to make money, and creating the impression that there is a "horse race" in the 2024 election helps with that.
2. Most dangerously, many in the political press are feeling nostalgic for what they considered the “good old days” — when the media treated Democrats and Republicans as ethical equals, and everyone got along.

**The last point could not be further from the truth, Peter. Here are just some of Haley's positions on the issues:**
* In addition to stating that she’d vote for Trump — even with a felony conviction, Haley also said she’s “inclined in favor” of pardoning Trump should she ever get elected.
* While campaigning for Herschel Walker — an extremist himself, Haley called for the deportation of his then-opponent Sen. Raphael Warnock, who was born in Georgia.
* Haley has attempted to depict herself as a moderate on abortion — and many journalists have played into this — even as she recently called for a six-week abortion ban.
* Haley likes to brag that she took the Confederate flag down at the South Carolina State House — only after a white supremacist murdered nine Black people at a Charleston church in 2015. Before 2015, Haley repeatedly defended the flying of the flag.

**Peter, the truth is that Haley, like her former boss Donald Trump, is no moderate. The fact that the mainstream media is ignoring that fact should raise alarm bells for anyone concerned that the media will repeat the same mistakes it made in the last two presidential elections.**
That’s why we’re committed to providing high-quality journalism that prioritizes the truth — not profits or ratings or knowingly misleading the public in search of an outdated “both sides” worldview that ignores right-wing extremism and the ongoing threat it poses to our democracy.
But unlike mainstream news organizations, we don’t rely on a paywall or subscription to power this important work, we rely on you to make our work freely available in the communities that need it most.
[**So can you pitch in $5 right now to support Democracy's Newsroom?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74702569/442374336/-2108642285?refcode=em20231206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNDU2NjctN2E5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aBSg5ot8FYx1XiT92AlCiQFJvCFgmvk4COQCu3cw4V0=)
**[Pitch in $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74702572/442374337/-2108642285?refcode=em20231206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMwNDU2NjctN2E5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=aBSg5ot8FYx1XiT92AlCiQFJvCFgmvk4COQCu3cw4V0=)**
As always, thank you for reading.

body:
Tonight, we'll be taking the stage at the GOP debate one last time before election year. One last chance to prove our strength against the field. I'm looking to you.
