Fellow American, it's Ron DeSantis. Tonight is the last time we'll be taking the debate stage for the year. After that, our team is racing to the Iowa caucuses! **I'm ready to finish out the first stage of this race and keep moving forward at a record pace, but to succeed, I'm going to need your help tonight.**
---
| | [Send in $20.24](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a859e2458b74712b86cf7bdb1d21ce4&_e=J4dDJ2Ytma9VjuHLlVvanpjzWZVCHZ7B7QZHwfwpfpdjhkfIFl9cnsRk8d03f1HhQZm7Z3NKo9YJyRFjjm-U-QXeoBVOAvULPRF8Wufh1ZZ2Sk0qoBCci31dwWNeayQ889GmtbGHFCo7NRTjKlKTsU1BtpAwOJlyL6vCEtdbWKquT-bmqS9q7fq8hZyuLljjPNvn7aA0iFfdE4fMFXIBm-xRN29eGzW2mAcQTgHG66-DDXNngomhQABzjmUH2kT2Pp1vr2RGsYpDel41X3rkuQ1lcOTlZHW6MB28PH70CSyfS1ZZ07UC3RuLSVpsumTW8QBaWK6KnWEHmnqs1x1qbw5mSbXOBppWtVBClldBSL0amRMf9crJQf5xpMvbR0UP2AzdUY6dxfEO0pEnRFyZoxmG7Js3JBH01uHL23bhw3oo_l9k16T_eLfa_N0V3wVa)
---
The stakes have never been higher. This election is our last chance to get America back on track before Joe Biden and the liberal elite make America unrecognizable. We have a chance to make sure this never becomes our reality, but only if the Republican party comes together NOW. On that stage, you WON'T see a former President who thinks you owe him your vote, but you will see a CCP empathizer who idolizes Hillary Clinton. And you'll see me: rising above the fray, fighting for YOU, winning for us, and leading the Republican party toward our American comeback. **[I am counting on you tonight.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a859e2458b74712b86cf7bdb1d21ce4&_e=J4dDJ2Ytma9VjuHLlVvanpjzWZVCHZ7B7QZHwfwpfpdjhkfIFl9cnsRk8d03f1HhQZm7Z3NKo9YJyRFjjm-U-QXeoBVOAvULPRF8Wufh1ZZ2Sk0qoBCci31dwWNeayQ889GmtbGHFCo7NRTjKlKTsU1BtpAwOJlyL6vCEtdbWKquT-bmqS9q7fq8hZyuLljjPNvn7aA0iFfdE4fMFXIBm-xRN29eGzW2mAcQTgHG66-DDXNngomhQABzjmUH2kT2Pp1vr2RGsYpDel41X3rkuYSHmRsAYiPihMsptigFNXkLKqKQRKB9FEIUA38VEYsOBOuhuZiukHlonbrPAvC6QYNmAkxKOQYAOep2tgJgLOrmJuXq17IFOKyaAuNGMTwX7Mb0sDvZal-9vq48ZQEy5agH1rae1aD-UkBzKCPyObBG9DoD31b4zBPrCaQzF-Ng)** We have what it takes and it's time to show it. I'm ready to fight, win, and lead.

| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a859e2458b74712b86cf7bdb1d21ce4&_e=J4dDJ2Ytma9VjuHLlVvanpjzWZVCHZ7B7QZHwfwpfpdjhkfIFl9cnsRk8d03f1HhQZm7Z3NKo9YJyRFjjm-U-QXeoBVOAvULPRF8Wufh1ZZ2Sk0qoBCci31dwWNeayQ889GmtbGHFCo7NRTjKlKTsU1BtpAwOJlyL6vCEtdbWKquT-bmqS9q7fq8hZyuLljjPNvn7aA0iFfdE4fMFXIBm-xRN29eGzW2mAcQTgHG66-DDXNngomhQABzjmUH2kT2Pp1vr2RGsYpDel41X3rkuV-1RJaYxF6fru3xSW_8Tb3qXBHrMsUkQTmSBcYUbdklnWGVr1sHQGOpB6Yc_fLyilpX1WTg1XfFmBFqcw-KHXxedsAceZmdEsnD-d8cmXkrviCJd6T3leGQ2V1zjfOFQB-wxTdm9otEthROHAfn8DC_37r3EUERQVVMaU9crYi8)

Ron DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a859e2458b74712b86cf7bdb1d21ce4&_e=J4dDJ2Ytma9VjuHLlVvanpjzWZVCHZ7B7QZHwfwpfpdjhkfIFl9cnsRk8d03f1HhQZm7Z3NKo9YJyRFjjm-U-QXeoBVOAvULPRF8Wufh1ZZ2Sk0qoBCci31dwWNeayQ889GmtbGHFCo7NRTjKlKTsU1BtpAwOJlyL6vCEtdbWKquT-bmqS9q7fq8hZyuLljjPNvn7aA0iFfdE4fMFXIBm-xRN29eGzW2mAcQTgHG66-DDXNngomhQABzjmUH2kT2Pp1vr2RGsYpDel41X3rkuZy8V3hRZ5gYLSzLgDof15Z3uKfw_sJ5C9MEjcEFjplPsDyhrUvcOcqmQlVL2piOHRJzBzBWTgbUA324ZE3fgxx34ueo6S2qh1gG97grCPXWhYHdHKVMMaDxFVnrTpuuPF7exFZLm38eZuZe-CD0KkZdfcqspwswNgOvNMvlQ0Oh)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=9a859e2458b74712b86cf7bdb1d21ce4&_e=J4dDJ2Ytma9VjuHLlVvanpjzWZVCHZ7B7QZHwfwpfpdjhkfIFl9cnsRk8d03f1HhQZm7Z3NKo9YJyRFjjm-U-QXeoBVOAvULPRF8Wufh1ZZ2Sk0qoBCci31dwWNeayQ889GmtbGHFCo7NRTjKlKTsU1BtpAwOJlyL6vCEtdbWKquT-bmqS9q7fq8hZyuLljjPNvn7aA0iFfdE4fMFXIBm-xRN29eGzW2mAcQTgHG66-DDXNngomhQABzjmUH2kT2Pp1vr2RGsYpDel41X3rkuVxqcPIUBcIsUT9mh2K9pT4qbn9NlstpLdPyHQtq1HftqrzVd8Vs4MGJc6LLONTM4U-moqKziqiS9EgEvTOmItM_MhzL5tFFUqqq2QAr5gPS2nfPTwTSQb-BvgXbnwiZC7IJM4x-M0hdShpeqfDJ399tKPKTrVSqwJQEcNOS913B)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---

I'm looking to you. | | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, it's Ron DeSantis. Tonight is the last time we'll be taking the debate stage for the year. After that, our team is racing to the Iowa caucuses! I'm ready to finish out the first stage of this race and keep moving forward at a record pace, but to succeed, I'm going to need your help tonight. | | The stakes have never been higher. This election is our last chance to get America back on track before Joe Biden and the liberal elite make America unrecognizable. We have a chance to make sure this never becomes our reality, but only if the Republican party comes together NOW. body:
You’re one of 200 local Democrats selected to sign:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57892?t=6&akid=11968%2E878179%2EDW7pMT) **The MAGA mob’s sham impeachment would RUIN Biden’s reelection chances!** [**You’ve been hand-selected as one of 200 local Democrats to tell President Biden we still have his back. Secure your signature spot before midnight! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57893?t=7&akid=11968%2E878179%2EDW7pMT) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57893?t=8&akid=11968%2E878179%2EDW7pMT)
---
TO: President Biden
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: I stand with you.

**Dear President Biden,

_I’m so proud to call you our President!_**

Over the last two and a half years, you’ve fought TIRELESSLY for the American people — defending abortion rights, confirming an incredible Supreme Court Justice, saving Social Security from GOP cuts, and creating millions of jobs.

**Republicans will go to ANY extreme to kick you out of office and reinstate Donald Trump. Even threatening to IMPEACH you!**

So I wanted to let you know that you’re not alone in this fight — Democrats across the nation stand with you and your amazing agenda!

[**That’s why I’m signing this letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my gratitude and to keep electing Democrats all over the country who will protect our democracy from MAGA extremism »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57894?t=9&akid=11968%2E878179%2EDW7pMT) | [SPACE RUNNING OUT: Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/57894?t=10&akid=11968%2E878179%2EDW7pMT)
---
**_X A PROUD DEMOCRAT_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74703424/442377541/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM1NTg4My03Yzk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MGEHCCUPfVapIiCNU2g7BBxRbS-Ts-yY7KvKh-IPXq0=)
Friend,
Republican Speaker Mike Johnson just announced a floor vote to authorize a formal impeachment inquiry against President Biden, despite not having any evidence.
This groundless and unjustifiable investigation has been underway for months, yet Republicans have failed to provide any incriminating evidence of their baseless claims that Biden accepted bribes.
Now, launching a formal impeachment inquiry against the president is their latest ploy.
This is simply an abuse of power. Speaker Johnson should be bringing impactful legislation to the floor, legislation that will help the lives of Americans. But he fails to do so under the pressure of his party and extremist colleagues.
Hear more of what I had to say about this groundless impeachment inquiry on MSNBC below:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74703425/442377542/1009090997?refcode=em231206-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM1NTg4My03Yzk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MGEHCCUPfVapIiCNU2g7BBxRbS-Ts-yY7KvKh-IPXq0=&emci=71fb0c67-7894-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=5ec55883-7c94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=16877361)
**[If you agree that Republicans should not have the power to launch unnecessary and unjustified investigations against the president and Democrats, please contribute $3 to my campaign today to help us take back the House majority and the speakership.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74703426/442377543/-801280688?refcode2=5ec55883-7c94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&refcode=em231206-1-t2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWM1NTg4My03Yzk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MGEHCCUPfVapIiCNU2g7BBxRbS-Ts-yY7KvKh-IPXq0=)**
Thank you,
Robert

**The NDRC’s work is powered by grassroots supporters like you – and we’re getting real results!** Ahead of the 2022 elections, we helped secure the fairest congressional map in a generation.

body:
RE: liberty bash |
---
| | If you're near Nampa, Idaho, or can swing by...

Circle Thursday, January 4th, at 7 PM on your calendar because I'm hosting an epic fundraiser.

Get in on the action with a gun raffle, snag a top-notch fishing reel, a box of fine cigars, select wines/whiskey, and more—all up for grabs with just a $20 raffle ticket.

As you know...

I'm up against **BIG** money, **BIG** lies, and **BIG** government.

That's why your participation is crucial in this clash against the Idaho establishment as I run for re-election to the Idaho State Senate.

Idaho GOP standout Brent Reagan will be hitting the stage, along with other surprise guests too.

Come for the appetizers, stay for the camaraderie, and if you're feeling generous, bring your checkbook.

Can't wait to see you there.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** Invite your conservative friends (just FWD this email)

**P.P.S.** Thursday, January 4th, 7 PM MST, at 1406 E. Lewis Ln, Nampa... go mark your calendar now!

Get in on the action with a gun raffle, snag a top-notch fishing reel, a box of fine cigars, select wines/whiskey, and more—all up for grabs with just a $20 raffle ticket. As you know... I'm up against BIG money, BIG lies, and BIG government. That's why your participation is crucial in this clash against the Idaho establishment as I run for re-election to the Idaho State Senate. Idaho GOP standout Brent Reagan will be hitting the stage, along with other surprise guests too. Come for the appetizers, stay for the camaraderie, and if you're feeling generous, bring your checkbook. Can't wait to see you there. Cheers, Brian P.S. name: Katie Porter
subject: right to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A super PAC supporting one of my opponents has already spent $1M on ads.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)
Derek, I’m keeping this race update super quick:
**The bad**
* A super PAC supporting one of my opponents has already spent $1M on ads.
* Another one of my opponents, Adam Schiff, has three times more cash on hand than we had as of the latest Federal Election Commission filing. _**(He has more money than any Democrat, including President Biden’s campaign!).**_ He’s been able to outraise us thanks to big check donations and decades of collecting corporate PAC money.

**The good**
* Even with fewer dollars to spend, polling has shown us either _ahead_ of Adam by a point or two, or just narrowly trailing him.
* Polling also shows that when voters learn about my priorities and history of standing up to corruption and holding power to account, we gain a clear advantage. Candidly, that’s why we’re leading in most parts of Southern California but lagging in the Bay Area.

**[With about a third of voters still undecided about who they’ll support, we need your help today to build our momentum and run digital ads, get up on TV, and connect with voters across the state. Can you chip in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231206-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_LIS_20231206_V1_F&refcode2=34326_3422442_jz5rg2&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231206-1?refcode=EMAO23_1_LIS_20231206_V1_F&refcode2=34326_3422442_jz5rg2&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)
Thanks so much for considering,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAO23_1_LIS_20231206_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=34326_3422442_jz5rg2&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=34326%2E3422442%2Ejz5rg2)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Billy
subject: FWD: I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and express my sincere gratitude for your support of Speaker Johnson. It has been a whirlwind but I am so excited to take part in Speaker Johnson’s vision of moving the ball forward for Americans. |

---
Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and express my sincere gratitude for your support of Speaker Johnson. It has been a whirlwind but I am so excited to take part in Speaker Johnson’s vision of moving the ball forward for Americans.

Which is why I am reaching out to you today. The Speaker is adamant about hearing opinions from the people he works for: _**you.**_

He’s asked me to ensure you take a moment and fill out the [**_**Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey**_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3512abff8f854a4db5bea87d56747152&_e=b3GU7AB8wHXJth1LW9pWU3BwDmgjzclbaFXnxU2WvPeY0WbqmaGebtLCFJvqSIk0Pky9ITrblqeveSIHqmSw697Y8R2z3Qyxwms6qOtQenTO666Itj5EeEPlZRF4rXN9IL29JPwTWwQrVVhhmCyn33-ASNYT428Tim_UBjLYqS1EJp5XRuOJvDjCO2B0u91QaYckO1VMqmnUZL_lRo8ftL9zjFL8JNgPBwrsAZrJ8fxrTGUfR0dvdnbxpebOcxpBJXsXBSCLs6e91Nx4S2miBZDZKPw5lPWzp2_wZEm8OlNPaMPoDLmN2DNubOT9xRq3Q0tIaJ5jj1jemT151A_ZxMyqM1rsDXlIUL2sMvtt77qqAOwU4Yn0zT6OxSDchCC8sBJTgh1OH9R6ntQcUAfe6P5xPpBKriaaFOqR9z_aFkK0IqFTRpnArHFyXR6qHECALFZWnwgNB_PJo6U6Yx1FqLwY2XCAW91nG5RcM801bc8%3D) so we can gather as many responses from real American patriots.

Would you take a moment and read his below email and share your thoughts?

Thanks so much and I look forward to working with you in the future.

Sincerely,
Billy
_**Campaign Manager**_

**_\-----------Begin Forwarded Email----------_**

* * *
**From:** Speaker Mike Johnson
**Date:** Monday, December 4, 2023 at 2:49 PM
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Subject:** Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey

[ ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3512abff8f854a4db5bea87d56747152&_e=b3GU7AB8wHXJth1LW9pWU3BwDmgjzclbaFXnxU2WvPeY0WbqmaGebtLCFJvqSIk0Pky9ITrblqeveSIHqmSw697Y8R2z3Qyxwms6qOtQenTO666Itj5EeEPlZRF4rXN9IL29JPwTWwQrVVhhmCyn33-ASNYT428Tim_UBjLYqS1EJp5XRuOJvDjCO2B0u91QaYckO1VMqmnUZL_lRo8ftL9zjFL8JNgPBwrsAZrJ8fxrTGUfR0dvdnbxpebOcxpBJXsXBSCLs6e91Nx4S2miBZDZKPw5lPWzp2_wZEm8OlNPaMPoDLmN2DNubOT9xRq3Q0tIaJ5jj1jemT151A_ZxKX5LtXrVzB0zne_z39DiDgxPpwiQhyc-Gj4rVnzql48OKoHt7XaNlpkayrewMfvvZyJpaJbp7KSLN5dmqRdsCCF8PZqUxzPPh5sJYYPv2q0_sHzdEDYr3awc-7j060soqKfMLkbtAGs8EPG5qeaEfg%3D)

Peter - I have a lot of competing priorities that come across my desk each and every day.

**But at the forefront of my responsibilities, I am a public servant.**

I work for you, _I serve your interests,_ not the interests of the establishment, lobbyists, or anyone else.

**_I work for the American people._**

This is why it is _**so important**_ that I am constantly hearing from you about what your top priorities are.

Today, I’m looking for your opinion – [**would you take a moment to launch my _**Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey?**_**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3512abff8f854a4db5bea87d56747152&_e=b3GU7AB8wHXJth1LW9pWU3BwDmgjzclbaFXnxU2WvPeY0WbqmaGebtLCFJvqSIk0Pky9ITrblqeveSIHqmSw697Y8R2z3Qyxwms6qOtQenTO666Itj5EeEPlZRF4rXN9IL29JPwTWwQrVVhhmCyn33-ASNYT428Tim_UBjLYqS1EJp5XRuOJvDjCO2B0u91QaYckO1VMqmnUZL_lRo8ftL9zjFL8JNgPBwrsAZrJ8fxrTGUfR0dvdnbxpebOcxpBJXsXBSCLs6e91Nx4S2miBZDZKPw5lPWzp2_wZEm8OlNPaMPoDLmN2DNubOT9xRq3Q0tIaJ5jj1jemT151A_ZxNZXcVYU6uUZ0L7TX190If0u4X3k5vyRaq7FSo5G4TsYRF3AKopW13WxFo_ZjX-6ykUH2xjB-M2CQXGgPcDN1qzXaFcKdXjs0vy30GCxJJ5AHjWg0Ecv0rQqtXXfC35nMrskx6DVCHAmaO_suoCvxLU%3D)

Your input is absolutely critical to ensuring that I move the ball forward for America.

Together, I know we will advance a comprehensive conservative policy agenda, combat the harmful policies of the Biden administration, and support our allies abroad – and we will restore sanity to a government desperately in need of it.

[**Please, let me hear from you today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3512abff8f854a4db5bea87d56747152&_e=b3GU7AB8wHXJth1LW9pWU3BwDmgjzclbaFXnxU2WvPeY0WbqmaGebtLCFJvqSIk0Pky9ITrblqeveSIHqmSw697Y8R2z3Qyxwms6qOtQenTO666Itj5EeEPlZRF4rXN9IL29JPwTWwQrVVhhmCyn33-ASNYT428Tim_UBjLYqS1EJp5XRuOJvDjCO2B0u91QaYckO1VMqmnUZL_lRo8ftL9zjFL8JNgPBwrsAZrJ8fxrTGUfR0dvdnbxpebOcxpBJXsXBSCLs6e91Nx4S2miBZDZKPw5lPWzp2_wZEm8OlNPaMPoDLmN2DNubOT9xRq3Q0tIaJ5jj1jemT151A_ZxBwt6gabvETVXXQEZa5OaDfViF5uPOlYzMypwDUPVbRYoVti9Or7-LW7KdTX8TEMgKCM8aHlITE7cdhDVL_Vla0xco2-R5Mz_nBmrAG4cpqCjQf1hPWaFYzySPg6pA0vWJmhmMd_B0SQUYzrJMK7P4I%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

clean_body: I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and express my sincere gratitude for your support of Speaker Johnson. It has been a whirlwind but I am so excited to take part in Speaker Johnson’s vision of moving the ball forward for Americans. | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself and express my sincere gratitude for your support of Speaker Johnson. It has been a whirlwind but I am so excited to take part in Speaker Johnson’s vision of moving the ball forward for Americans. Which is why I am reaching out to you today. The Speaker is adamant about hearing opinions from the people he works for: you. He’s asked me to ensure you take a moment and fill out the so we can gather as many responses from real American patriots. Would you take a moment and read his below email and share your thoughts? Thanks so much and I look forward to working with you in the future. Sincerely, Billy Campaign Manager \-----------Begin Forwarded Email---------- From: Speaker Mike Johnson Date: Monday, December 4, 2023 at 2:49 PM To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Subject: Official Team Johnson Speaker’s Survey Peter - I have a lot of competing priorities that come across my desk each and every day. But at the forefront of my responsibilities, I am a public servant. I work for you, I serve your interests, not the interests of the establishment, lobbyists, or anyone else. I work for the American people. This is why it is so important that I am constantly hearing from you about what your top priorities are. Today, I’m looking for your opinion – Your input is absolutely critical to ensuring that I move the ball forward for America. Together, I know we will advance a comprehensive conservative policy agenda, combat the harmful policies of the Biden administration, and support our allies abroad – and we will restore sanity to a government desperately in need of it. I appreciate your feedback greatly. God bless, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House Are you looking to rock some We’ve got you covered! | | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON * Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? quick fix |
---
| | Argh...

The original flyer had a typo, here's the correct version if you want to share it:

_______________________________________________________

**ORIGINAL MESSAGE:**

If you're near Nampa, Idaho, or can swing by...

Circle Thursday, January 4th, at 7 PM on your calendar because I'm hosting an epic fundraiser.

Get in on the action with a gun raffle, snag a top-notch fishing reel, a box of fine cigars, select wines/whiskey, and more—all up for grabs with just a $20 raffle ticket.

As you know...

I'm up against **BIG** money, **BIG** lies, and **BIG** government.

That's why your participation is crucial in this clash against the Idaho establishment as I run for re-election to the Idaho State Senate.

Idaho GOP standout Brent Reagan will be hitting the stage, along with other surprise guests too.

Come for the appetizers, stay for the camaraderie, and if you're feeling generous, bring your checkbook.

Can't wait to see you there.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** Invite your conservative friends (just FWD this email)

**P.P.S.** Thursday, January 4th, 7 PM MST, at 1406 E. Lewis Ln, Nampa... go mark your calendar now!

\---

1) To make sure you keep getting these emails, please add [blforidaho@gmail.com](mailto:blforidaho@gmail.com) to your address book or whitelist me.

3) My postal address: PO Box 3753, Nampa, ID 83653-3753

name: Rick Coplen
subject: A crisis of trust
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen

|

In the past half century, the confidence of the American people in their Congress reached its highest point – 42% having “a great deal” or “quite a lot” of confidence – exactly 50 years ago, according to Gallop.

Today, public confidence in Congress stands at _**8%**_.

A Congress that does not have the confidence of the American people is a danger to our republic. And that makes it imperative to elect members of Congress we can trust.

[When I’m in Congress, you can trust that I will uphold our values and deliver results. Help me defeat Scott Perry by making a donation of any amount:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74704367/442380474/-2112306580?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231206_1_1&refcode2=e2924d72-7f94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=M5r+++sTKKkhWcncmqglpjvSOp2patquyke6syBE8E/EPGgp4tI2C5CZryElHayU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjkyNGQ3Mi03Zjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VZuMzBOzZgF1MiXXkCUZzC2F_oOetC79GYP_fauGoE=) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately._ | | **[DONATE $5 NOW »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74704368/442380475/-2112306580?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode2=e2924d72-7f94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231206_1_1&contactdata=M5r+++sTKKkhWcncmqglpjvSOp2patquyke6syBE8E/EPGgp4tI2C5CZryElHayU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjkyNGQ3Mi03Zjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VZuMzBOzZgF1MiXXkCUZzC2F_oOetC79GYP_fauGoE=)**

There are many reasons for the public’s lack of trust in Congress.

Extreme gerrymandering that results in extreme members of Congress who think compromise is a four-letter word. Scandals. Unpopular wars. Policies that help the rich at the expense of the middle class, expanding poverty and threatening our social safety net for seniors and veterans. Problems such as gun violence, immigration, health care, and climate change that fester and never get solved. **The list is long.**

**It’s time we elect a leader who will follow through on their promises, on these issues and more.**

[I have the experience and dedication PA-10 needs in its next representative. With your help, I’ll defeat Scott Perry and restore trust in our elected officials. Please donate any amount to power our campaign through the work ahead.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74704374/442380481/-2112306580?amount=10&source=RC_EM_FR_WL_231206_1_1&refcode2=e2924d72-7f94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&contactdata=M5r+++sTKKkhWcncmqglpjvSOp2patquyke6syBE8E/EPGgp4tI2C5CZryElHayU&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjkyNGQ3Mi03Zjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VZuMzBOzZgF1MiXXkCUZzC2F_oOetC79GYP_fauGoE=)

Thanks for all you do.

More to come,
Rick

---
**Peter, without the protection of _Roe v. Wade_ , reproductive rights are going to be on the ballot **_**every single year.**_

Before June 24, 2022, abortion was legal in all 50 states. In the year and a half since, _15 states have enacted near-total abortion bans,_ and two states have imposed six-week limits. Several other states kicked the issue of abortion to the voters – where there has so far been _overwhelming_ support for reproductive rights.

In 2022, voters in Kansas, Kentucky, and Montana rejected attempts to further restrict abortion, while voters in Michigan passed a law overturning the state's existing abortion ban. And this past November, voters in Ohio voted to protect abortion and voters in Virginia voted to keep anti-choice candidates out of their state legislature.

**Peter, voters have made their stance clear: Reproductive rights are _non-negotiable. _But that isn't going to stop far-right extremists from continuing to attack these fundamental rights.**
That's why I vow to never stop fighting for reproductive freedom in New York and beyond – but I need to know how many people are in this fight with me.
**I need at least 736 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results, so please tell me ASAP.**
**Are you a pro-choice voter?**

clean_body: | | | | | Please update your record ASAP: Are you a pro-choice voter? | | | | Peter, without the protection of Roe v. Wade , reproductive rights are going to be on the ballot every single year. Before June 24, 2022, abortion was legal in all 50 states. In the year and a half since, 15 states have enacted near-total abortion bans, and two states have imposed six-week limits. Several other states kicked the issue of abortion to the voters – where there has so far been overwhelming support for reproductive rights. In 2022, voters in Kansas, Kentucky, and Montana rejected attempts to further restrict abortion, while voters in Michigan passed a law overturning the state's existing abortion ban. And this past November, voters in Ohio voted to protect abortion and voters in Virginia voted to keep anti-choice candidates out of their state legislature. Peter, voters have made their stance clear: Reproductive rights are non-negotiable. But that isn't going to stop far-right extremists from continuing to attack these fundamental rights. That's why I vow to never stop fighting for reproductive freedom in New York and beyond – but I need to know how many people are in this fight with me. I need at least 736 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results, so please tell me ASAP. Are you a pro-choice voter? | | | | | | Thank you for responding, Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: That couldn’t have gone any better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Last night’s volunteer kickoff could not have gone any better.

Over 13,000 volunteers signed up to help us register Texas voters ahead of
the 2024 elections. That means that over the coming year, we’ll be able to
bring hundreds of thousands of new, eligible Democrats onto the rolls.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231206.hlQsS_&refcode=ema20231206-235960&t=1001&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ][IMG]

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231206.hlQsS_&refcode=ema20231206-235960&t=1002&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]I hope you’ll support this work with a donation. Every dollar goes to
registering and staying in touch with new Democratic voters who will help
decide critical elections across the state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231206.hlQsS_&refcode=ema20231206-235960&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]DONATE $3

In a state with no online or automatic voter registration — a state that
in fact makes it harder to register to vote than any other — we will help
those Texans who’ve been the targets of voter suppression to register and
cast their ballots.

There are over three million eligible but unregistered Democrats in Texas.
Can you imagine what this state would be like if even a fraction of them
were off the sidelines and in the game?

We would win important local races — school board, city council,
commissioners court — as well as the big ones up the ballot, like state
representative, U.S. Congress, and important judicial positions.

And then there are the statewide opportunities. Ted Cruz is among the most
vulnerable Republican incumbents in the Senate. Texas is already moving
faster into the Democratic column for President than any other state. If
we register and turn out enough Democrats in the months ahead, we will at
a minimum speed up that process and make Texas a key presidential swing
state, ultimately ensuring a Democrat can win it.

Once that happens — once we deliver Texas’ 40 Electoral College votes to
the Democratic nominee for President for the first time since 1976 — it
will forever change what is possible and what we can get done in this
country.

If you care about abortion rights, gun violence, climate change, voting
rights, immigration, or any other major national issue, then you care
about Texas and making sure we win big elections here.

That explains why so many people joined last night’s volunteer kickoff.
Why folks all across the country signed up to help us mail, text, call,
and start relationships with eligible but unregistered Democrats. Why so
many of those in Texas signed up to become Volunteer Deputy Registrars to
bring these folks off the sidelines and into our elections by registering
them to vote.

In 2020, Powered by People registered over 200,000 Texas Democrats. That
was just the start. With last night’s very strong showing of committed
volunteers, I am confident that we are going to greatly exceed any
previous voter registration effort in our state.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231206.hlQsS_&refcode=ema20231206-235960&t=1022&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]So please, chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help support
this important work.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231206.hlQsS_&refcode=ema20231206-235960&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1041&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]DONATE $3

Thank you for being a part of this historic effort for our state and our
country.

— Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60396?t=1042&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]JOIN US ON SLACK!

Want to volunteer but missed last night’s training? That’s okay!

The most important thing you can do is [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60396?t=1043&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]join us on Slack — the
application we use to communicate with volunteers and answer your
questions in real time.

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/60396?t=1044&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]Download Slack on your phone, tablet, or computer — and follow the
prompts on your screen to join our volunteer workspace.

* [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/44717?t=1045&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu ]Click here for instructions on how to turn on your Slack
notifications and ensure you never miss a message about volunteer
opportunities!

If you have any trouble joining Slack, email us at info@poweredxpeople.org
and we’ll help get you set up.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1046&akid=235960%2E444211%2EulqTdu

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

body:
Who are you rooting for? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a22a39d1a440/showdown-tonight-5pm-pt?e=54a81bd33c)
---
| | [ ](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=1cf379b33b&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| Peter,
---
| | Stepping into the debate ring TONIGHT at 5PM Pacific!

We've got Vivek Ramaswamy, Chris Christie, Ron DeSantis, and Nikki Haley.

While our champion (and who I am supporting) President Trump won’t be there, it will be interesting to see what the participants have to say.

I've been really intrigued by some of the fresh ideas Vivek's been bringing to the table. It's always great to hear new perspectives that challenge the status quo and spark meaningful conversations within our party. As Christmas approaches, I am grateful to live in America where ideas are freely discussed

Of course, our main man President Trump is the one I am rooting for to take on Joe Biden. His leadership has been a game-changer for us, and we're all in for seeing him lead the charge once again.

But hey, it's always good to keep an ear to the ground and see what others are saying, right?

[So, are you planning to watch the debate tonight? Who are you rooting for?](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=de83ae0ec0&e=54a81bd33c)
---
| [VIVEK RAMASWAMY](https://elizabethfornv.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8092551f57aee37054250c5&id=faa5592d78&e=54a81bd33c "VIVEK RAMASWAMY")

body:
Did you see this email from John? We’ll leave it below for you to read, but with just 11 months until election day, we must build a campaign that can defeat the extremist Republicans who have jumped into the race.
__ | | | Did you see this email from John? We’ll leave it below for you to read, but with just 11 months until election day, we must build a campaign that can defeat the extremist Republicans who have jumped into the race. [**Rush a donation to John’s campaign today to help get us there.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f448e78c4f84463b88c3eb127b168811&_e=OiSB8ldtsk6SaRLymkSZSxCk9r8-b3by0_laHRmokfzIDITIpMWGi5PwUtk2NR22gfQqijDGZFkR3P7Vx31TwyisCrYeqSIh4JmVenz_xQa_qQPvxPlxORN6KgTWv6XLU0LYO05ZWW-GgMPXqJBHSMbBpwHu9XbbE8M2JfSFznJ-3MglRG1wo1KyqYbBEXBZTdfa0sBitBLHPrL16SURuWnepF1IhO0PPqLmgxT_vtSWk2e7MqaZTTwHlfnsNx7tVn-0hLcLm_dAqp0OuuW1r7r6d7gwehxVxwVsNTSkKKF6YMskV-h-4UGDpx-8NPVgDxdlLZVGcF-so6q2vbLk_kW6EUMV_ky-gorPaPApmbt69lwbemZro8e7wG8xjf9hfm6XoXGLRofxeADR9_3osA%3D%3D) All the best, Padora HQ \-------- Begin original message -------- [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f448e78c4f84463b88c3eb127b168811&_e=OiSB8ldtsk6SaRLymkSZSxCk9r8-b3by0_laHRmokfzIDITIpMWGi5PwUtk2NR22gfQqijDGZFkR3P7Vx31TwyisCrYeqSIh4JmVenz_xQa_qQPvxPlxORN6KgTWv6XLU0LYO05ZWW-GgMPXqJBHSMbBpwHu9XbbE8M2JfSFznJ-3MglRG1wo1KyqYbBEXBZTdfa0sBitBLHPrL16SURuWnepF1IhO0PPqLmgxT_vtSWk2e7MqaZTTwHlfnsNx7tj_BfvfaoFdYyGLW9xU3fO-Rl3jjBHMukvRPBl2YiUXCOKNRqptg7qqw36BMmGo7N90HrkaOy2cn8KgleXHRHdFtDCwrxRKjH2Yg8Nav9VXdKkLsEzJmEk5ixy61we67QxQXoRIv-yR4zaQJakhN9yQ%3D%3D) Hey there, friends, **Can you believe we’re just 11 months from election day 2024??** Since we marked a year out just one month ago, Ken Buck has announced his intention to retire and multiple extremist candidates have jumped into the race on the Republican side. Time is flying, and the election will be here before we know it. But we can’t afford to let these nut jobs win and act as another Lauren Boebert in Washington. We’ve seen that experiment once before and it’s NOT GOOD. [**So if you can, please chip in $11 to my campaign to help propel us to victory next year.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=f448e78c4f84463b88c3eb127b168811&_e=OiSB8ldtsk6SaRLymkSZSxCk9r8-b3by0_laHRmokfzIDITIpMWGi5PwUtk2NR22gfQqijDGZFkR3P7Vx31TwyisCrYeqSIh4JmVenz_xQa_qQPvxPlxORN6KgTWv6XLU0LYO05ZWW-GgMPXqJBHSMbBpwHu9XbbE8M2JfSFznJ-3MglRG1wo1KyqYbBEXBZTdfa0sBitBLHPrL16SURuWnepF1IhO0PPqLmgxT_vtRKgO6yZRY8548JRsJY4Mq2XMWu6Df67cwOKXYFGa8jqdUC40qrE7q3r5uY7hCR_5KiYjPqCGCNkyvdOjUMh2mWd7X8xt1peDUpRuevoZ20S_G2bWLK0FlwHU2-77Xy92ncDeCxuSzuIp8Gdw-eMndFHgiQH3PeiuOdg2uvgX5WgaU9LYdA-4mhC8Nwg4Ct-vo%3D) I couldn’t do this without you. – John I'm John Padora. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight]
“Raquel is someone who has fierce loyalty among volunteers, activists, and other elected officials, from her years of work in the community and in politics...She’s someone who does the work.”
Peter, that’s what a top official on the Biden 2020 campaign recently had to say about Raquel Terán and the movement we’re building. Help us continue the momentum by donating $10 today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight&amount=10]
Raquel has held many titles throughout her career, from a Community Organizer to a State Senator and Arizona Democratic Party Chair. One thing has been consistent – she’s an advocate and a fighter for the folks in our community who need it most, like immigrants, women, LGBTQ folks, and working families.
She mobilized in the fight against SB 1070, the infamous “show me your papers” law, helped recall conservative lawmakers like Joe Arpaio, and worked to defeat MAGA Republicans like Kari Lake. Now, she’s ready to take the fight and our movement to Congress.
Like our previous fights, Raquel can’t win without all of us coming together. Can you support our grassroots campaign by chipping in whatever you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight]
A ganar,
Team Terán
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona.
For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children.
She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake.
Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_120623_ourfight]
Terán for Congress
PO Box 1041
Glendale, AZ 85311

clean_body: [] “Raquel is someone who has fierce loyalty among volunteers, activists, and other elected officials, from her years of work in the community and in politics...She’s someone who does the work.” Peter, that’s what a top official on the Biden 2020 campaign recently had to say about Raquel Terán and the movement we’re building. Help us continue the momentum by donating $10 today! [] Raquel has held many titles throughout her career, from a Community Organizer to a State Senator and Arizona Democratic Party Chair. One thing has been consistent – she’s an advocate and a fighter for the folks in our community who need it most, like immigrants, women, LGBTQ folks, and working families. She mobilized in the fight against SB 1070, the infamous “show me your papers” law, helped recall conservative lawmakers like Joe Arpaio, and worked to defeat MAGA Republicans like Kari Lake. Now, she’s ready to take the fight and our movement to Congress. Like our previous fights, Raquel can’t win without all of us coming together. Can you support our grassroots campaign by chipping in whatever you can today? [] DONATE [] A ganar, Team Terán [] Raquel Terán is running to represent Arizona's 3rd Congressional District as the first Latina congresswoman from Arizona. For nearly 20 years, she's been fighting for higher wages for workers, healthcare for all, and better schools for our children. She's helped build broad and diverse coalitions that have beaten Republicans like Donald Trump, Joe Arpaio, and Kari Lake. Now she's ready to take the fight to Congress, but we'll need your support to win. Chip in today! [] Terán for Congress PO Box 1041 Glendale, AZ 85311 United States Paid for by Terán for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: Secure America's border FIRST 🇺🇸
body:
No Ukraine funding until we secure our own border.

Peter- did you see the news from Washington yesterday?

Speaker Mike Johnson just drew a line in the sand and said Congress won't vote on Biden's Ukraine funding bill until Democrats approve "transformative" border security changes at our own southern border.

I absolutely agree.

Why should Congress allow Biden to send billions in taxpayer dollars to Ukraine while he completely abandons his constitutional duty to keep his own country safe and allowed our border to be completely overrun?
DONATE (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/border-security-contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Ukraine_Border&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=ac57b3a1a3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
You and I have both seen the stats. The number of illegal immigrants entering our country has broken records. Hundreds of those apprehended are on terrorist watch lists, and that's just who we know about. Fentanyl smugglers and human traffickers cross over everyday.

Our border patrol desperately needs more resources. They need more personnel, more equipment, and more technology. They need us to fix our weak immigration laws. They need us to FINISH THE WALL.

This isn't hard. Our leaders have to start putting America First. Securing our own border must be our top priority. If President Biden and the Democrats refuse to do it, then Republicans need to fight.

This is the kind of bold leadership I plan to fight for in Washington. If we don't have a secure border, we don't have a country.

This crisis is solvable...we just need to elect leaders who have what it takes to solve it and won't back down. (https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/border-security-contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=Ukraine_Border&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=ac57b3a1a3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

I hope I earn your vote,

Max Ukropina
https://secure.anedot.com/max-ukropina-for-congress-2024/flipca47red_contribute?utm_medium=Email&utm_source=Ukropina&utm_campaign=ukraine_border&utm_source=Max+for+OC+Supporters&utm_campaign=ac57b3a1a3-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_24_03_09_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f436e3f042-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Hi Friend, my name is Daniel, and I'm the Polling Director here at House Republican HQ!

The leadership team has asked me to conduct a survey of our top supporters this year to make sure things are on the right track, and I need your input.

The Results of this Survey will help us decide the direction Republicans take in 2024! We know it seems early for an end-of-year survey Friend, but if we want to get next year right, we need to start planning ASAP!

So much of the polling done by the Radical Left and the mainstream media is flat out wrong!

**That 's why, to ensure 100% accuracy, we need to hear from true conservatives like you. **
You can access your secure link to our survey here:
**[https://act.thenrcc.org/end-of-year/](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=d3da9ef009d0480b9c8c9c4f77557abd&_e=v3qXdA2sSufZ8uTEwgG3f83SYj7jyKQ3wPXrWcMVmZJQ8LvehxfRKqViI_d0pJNtVxVRokZ98v9adTOzrkaHidnIRor1rnwVAjSV3OBiNlmg3vYRvGVkaGg5lLJLsupb0JkSkqyl0XYnIb_FrH3D6zuIvkrdK3IrhGURJ6qQdxnAhL1BHo4veG5AwwHd4X2pulKK1S7HiuKyiRavLGWjb4ztOFbyQlJhtFhpYj81SgYQ64cPrJ5x5cvc3FXLv0DQ7GL01eH7GUToFf2Xh-MrzlIYftTLGjescU2sq8I35gcJEvAexBPD3zA-rn-d4r59H-O5wPy5acoFRQyK404pgF_dhAV3QDzpPAiASqj2KBADMzpj7k0_ImE0OcMCzSmL "https://act.thenrcc.org/end-of-year/")**

Thank you,

Daniel
House Republican Polling Director

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Faulconer?=
subject: Kevin Faulconer Endorses Sunbreak Ranch as a Compassionate Solution to Get People Off the Streets and Turn Their Lives Around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Supervisor 2024 - FPPC ID 1461674**
body:
Kevin Faulconer joins prominent figures to endorse the establishment of Sunbreak Ranch. | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/11d0fd87198f/news-associated-general-contractors-of-san-diego-endorses-kevin-faulconer-for-supervisor-12661925?e=784f78234b)
---
| |
---
| |
# FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
DECEMBER 6, 2023
CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com

**Kevin Faulconer Endorses Sunbreak Ranch as a Compassionate Solution to Get People Off the Streets and Turn Their Lives Around**
SAN DIEGO, CA -- Kevin Faulconer, former Mayor of San Diego and current candidate for Supervisor in District 3, joins prominent figures around the San Diego region in endorsing the establishment of Sunbreak Ranch to reduce homelessness and increase resources for people who are struggling. “We need bold and creative ideas to reduce homelessness in our region. Sunbreak Ranch is one of those creative ideas. I’m endorsing this concept as a way to get people off the streets and giving them the help they need to turn their lives around,” **said Kevin Faulconer, former Mayor of San Diego and candidate for Supervisor**. “That’s exactly what we did when I was Mayor. We put up shelters across the City with the proper wrap-around services that helped reduce homelessness by double digits. Millions of dollars are being spent by the county on one-off temporary locations; it’s time we put our resources into a permanent location. I’m endorsing Sunbreak Ranch because it’s part of a solution to the lack of action from politicians like Terra Lawson-Remer who continue to be asleep at the switch when it comes to our region’s most pressing problem.” Sunbreak Ranch is a bold idea that addresses the root of the homeless crisis in the San Diego region. The idea proposes on-site wrap-around services and a partnership with county and city authorities that would help people access safe housing. This concept is endorsed by a growing list of local San Diego County residents, current and former elected officials, and philanthropical leaders. Since Mayor Faulconer’s departure from City Hall after serving two successful terms as Mayor of San Diego, the City has experienced a dramatic increase in homelessness. During Faulconer’s last term, homelessness dropped 7% as a result of his firm but compassionate approach. From 2022 to 2023, homelessness in the region increased 14% with more than 10,000 people now experiencing homelessness living in harmful and unsafe conditions. He joins other important figures in endorsing the Sunbreak Ranch idea as a possible solution to reducing homelessness and getting people the help needed to turn their lives around.
_Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer is a proven leader with a proven record of enacting commonsense solutions to some of the region’s most significant issues, including housing, homelessness, and public safety._
###

clean_body: Kevin Faulconer joins prominent figures to endorse the establishment of Sunbreak Ranch. | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE DECEMBER 6, 2023 CONTACT: press@kevinfaulconer.com Kevin Faulconer Endorses Sunbreak Ranch as a Compassionate Solution to Get People Off the Streets and Turn Their Lives Around SAN DIEGO, CA -- Kevin Faulconer, former Mayor of San Diego and current candidate for Supervisor in District 3, joins prominent figures around the San Diego region in endorsing the establishment of Sunbreak Ranch to reduce homelessness and increase resources for people who are struggling. “We need bold and creative ideas to reduce homelessness in our region. Sunbreak Ranch is one of those creative ideas. I’m endorsing this concept as a way to get people off the streets and giving them the help they need to turn their lives around,” said Kevin Faulconer, former Mayor of San Diego and candidate for Supervisor. “That’s exactly what we did when I was Mayor. We put up shelters across the City with the proper wrap-around services that helped reduce homelessness by double digits. Millions of dollars are being spent by the county on one-off temporary locations; it’s time we put our resources into a permanent location. I’m endorsing Sunbreak Ranch because it’s part of a solution to the lack of action from politicians like Terra Lawson-Remer who continue to be asleep at the switch when it comes to our region’s most pressing problem.” Sunbreak Ranch is a bold idea that addresses the root of the homeless crisis in the San Diego region. The idea proposes on-site wrap-around services and a partnership with county and city authorities that would help people access safe housing. This concept is endorsed by a growing list of local San Diego County residents, current and former elected officials, and philanthropical leaders. Since Mayor Faulconer’s departure from City Hall after serving two successful terms as Mayor of San Diego, the City has experienced a dramatic increase in homelessness. During Faulconer’s last term, homelessness dropped 7% as a result of his firm but compassionate approach. From 2022 to 2023, homelessness in the region increased 14% with more than 10,000 people now experiencing homelessness living in harmful and unsafe conditions. He joins other important figures in endorsing the Sunbreak Ranch idea as a possible solution to reducing homelessness and getting people the help needed to turn their lives around. Former San Diego Mayor Kevin Faulconer is a proven leader with a proven record of enacting commonsense solutions to some of the region’s most significant issues, including housing, homelessness, and public safety. | | | | | Paid for by Faulconer for Supervisor 2024 - FPPC ID 1461674 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

body:

Friend,

_Someone on my team must be confused as a goat on Astroturf._

_They told me you declined to support the GOP._

I said that must be some sort of mistake. I know you're smart as a whip, Friend.

Peter,

Adam “Schiff-Stain” wants you to support his promotion from the House of Representatives to the United States Senate.

He thinks we are either stupid or not paying attention. Rather than passing legislation that helps his country or even his district, he is constantly engaged in some smear campaign, attacking Pres. Trump and conservatives.

**I find it exhausting.** He abuses his power in committees and wastes taxpayer resources on politically motivated witch hunts that we all know are BOGUS.

Both you and I remember how crazed he was during President Trump’s time in the White House. It seemed every week, he cooked up some crazy new scheme to try to destroy a duly elected President.

And now he’s complaining that we are poking a little fun at his name, by calling him “Schiff-Stain” or “BullSchiff.” I don’t have much patience for people who dish it out but can’t take it.

His behavior is just more of the same BullSchiff; he believes in rules for you and me but none for him and his leftist supporters.

And he is a RADICAL liberal who stands with Joe Biden and the Democrat party 100% of the time, while California’s middle-class is being decimated by policies Schiff supports.

**Schiff-Stain is a failed legislator and expert problem-causer who thinks his divisive partisan behavior in the House is worthy of a promotion.** I'm afraid I have to disagree. His time in Washington is over.

# ABOUT ERIC EARLY

Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. **Not a career politician.** Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. And now he’s complaining that we are poking a little fun at his name, by calling him “Schiff-Stain” or “BullSchiff.” I don’t have much patience for people who dish it out but can’t take it. His behavior is just more of the same BullSchiff; he believes in rules for you and me but none for him and his leftist supporters. And he is a RADICAL liberal who stands with Joe Biden and the Democrat party 100% of the time, while California’s middle-class is being decimated by policies Schiff supports. Schiff-Stain is a failed legislator and expert problem-causer who thinks his divisive partisan behavior in the House is worthy of a promotion. I'm afraid I have to disagree. His time in Washington is over. I need your help to keep spreading the truth to voters about his record of failure and corruption in Congress and ensure that Adam Schiff’s Stain on our country NEVER gets elevated from the House of Representatives to the United States Senate. Thank you, Eric Early Conservative for Senate | | ABOUT ERIC EARLY Eric Early is a husband, father, attorney, businessman and son of a Marine. Not a career politician. Eric was raised to believe in America’s founding principles of limited government and free markets. He believes that every American should be given the opportunity to fulfill their American Dream, and his parents inspired Eric to achieve his personal goals. As the co-owner and Managing Partner of a nationally recognized law firm, Eric understands how difficult it is to start and run a successful business. As your next US Senator, Eric will work to cut overly-burdensome regulations that get in the way of entrepreneurship and job creation. Eric will stand-up to the Socialist woke interests that control Washington, DC, fight to preserve and protect our Democracy, and fight for ordinary Californians who are being left behind. Follow Eric On Social Media P.O. Box 730, Hilmar, CA 95324 | | Paid for by Eric Early for US Senate 2024 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

The moment I endorsed Donald J. Trump for President, liberals in Washington doubled down and viscously attacked my campaign. Now I'm hanging on by a thread.

Biden & the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.

And at this point, I'm at the end of my wits, Friend.

If I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**This is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump's Secretary of the Interior and I was Ground Forces Commander for SEAL Team 6.**
**Now I 'm endorsing Trump in 2024. And if President Trump can't win Montana, nobody can.**
I'm running for Congress in the most important race in America.

I led the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm the toughest Republican in Washington D.C.
**Biden hates me because I 'm Trump's friend and close ally. And if he can destroy a Trump Patriot like me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**

body:

---
Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember before tonight’s Republican debate. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. clean_body: Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016? | | | Peter -- We want you to remember something. Really remember before tonight’s Republican debate. Remember that feeling you felt the day after Donald Trump was elected president in 2016. Remember walking around in disbelief and fear of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was elected president in 2020. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Whether it’s him or any other Republican...we can’t go back. It may be wild to think, but you have a role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is quite literally funded by people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. Now we don’t expect you to donate every day, but with President Biden facing millions in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day you donate. So, please: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you. You are securing the future of our country with your support. That’s the truth. Team Joe

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Unlike the GOP, Democrats have real solutions.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
As champions for change, Democrats must stand firm in our mission for comprehensive foreign aid and a humane immigration system.
#
Peter,
When extreme MAGA Republicans see an opportunity to destroy the immigration system, **we stand firm and stop them.**
Right now in Congress, Republicans are trying to trade destruction of the asylum system for aid for Ukraine. It’s completely outrageous.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/immigration-reform-20231206/?source=em20231206-3245&t=1&akid=3245%2E420207%2Ed2qjTS)
I am standing firm. We must reject this ploy and force Republicans to vote against this critical aid if that’s where they want to be.
**Unlike the GOP, Democrats have real solutions.** From funding asylum officers to establishing legal pathways to citizenship, we know that compassionate and holistic legislation is the strongest way to make an impact.
As champions for change, Democrats must stand firm in our mission for a humane immigration system. [**Please add your name to our petition to urge Congress to prioritize immigration policies based on humanity and dignity, and not further strengthen the GOP’s racist and anti-democratic legislation.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/immigration-reform-20231206/?source=em20231206-3245&t=2&akid=3245%2E420207%2Ed2qjTS)
**[Add your name ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/immigration-reform-20231206/?source=em20231206-3245&t=3&akid=3245%2E420207%2Ed2qjTS)**
Together,
Pramila Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20231206-3245-footer&t=4&refcode2=3245_420207_d2qjTS&akid=3245%2E420207%2Ed2qjTS)**

| | Friend, We emailed you last week about George Santos _finally_ being expelled from Congress. He was a fraud who’s indicted on 23 charges of money laundering, theft of public funds, and wire fraud. He’s also spent donor money on Botox and porn.Since he left, he has continued to defend his inexcusable behavior and make an absolute mockery of this very serious situation. His story was a comical example of everything that we all hate about Congress.**[If you’re also sick of corrupt politicians, can you chip in $10 to support our work to clean up Washington?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74706088/442386520/-2072560913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwODE2MmI2LTg2OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lpi7XvxYffClRNOmurbB20CuAzQHp496FV_cdtmnDWM=)** We all care about corruption in our government–it rots our institutions and the public’s trust. And in this moment when our democracy is on the brink, it couldn’t be more important to stand up against this corruption. Getting George Santos out of Congress was a step in the right direction, but we’ve dealt with rampant corruption in all branches of government in just the past few years. **[If this bothers you — and it should — we need you on board. We’re working hard to rid our government of corruption, but we can’t do it without you. If you’re with us, please contribute $10 so we can keep working to clean up Washington. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74706089/442386521/-2072560913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwODE2MmI2LTg2OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lpi7XvxYffClRNOmurbB20CuAzQHp496FV_cdtmnDWM=)** This culture of corruption in our government is why we need to pass legislation with real teeth. With Clarence Thomas still on the Supreme Court, that starts with the _Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act_. Neither Clarence Thomas nor any other Justice should be above the law for their corruption. This law would create an enforceable code of conduct for the Court, improve financial disclosures, and strengthen recusal requirements. It’s exactly what we need during a time when democracy is at risk because of corruption. [**We need Congress to pass the**** _SCERT Act_****, but we can’t do it alone. The**** _SCERT Act_****is necessary to stop the corruption that is running rampant in our government. Can you please chip in $10 so we can keep working to end corruption and strengthen trust in our government?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/74706090/442386522/-2072560913?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEwODE2MmI2LTg2OTQtZWUxMS04OTI1LTAwMjI0ODIyM2YzNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lpi7XvxYffClRNOmurbB20CuAzQHp496FV_cdtmnDWM=) Thank you,Team ECU/LAV Action

He was a fraud who’s indicted on 23 charges of money laundering, theft of public funds, and wire fraud. He’s also spent donor money on Botox and porn.Since he left, he has continued to defend his inexcusable behavior and make an absolute mockery of this very serious situation. His story was a comical example of everything that we all hate about Congress.= We all care about corruption in our government–it rots our institutions and the public’s trust. And in this moment when our democracy is on the brink, it couldn’t be more important to stand up against this corruption. Getting George Santos out of Congress was a step in the right direction, but we’ve dealt with rampant corruption in all branches of government in just the past few years. = This culture of corruption in our government is why we need to pass legislation with real teeth. With Clarence Thomas still on the Supreme Court, that starts with the Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act. Neither Clarence Thomas nor any other Justice should be above the law for their corruption. This law would create an enforceable code of conduct for the Court, improve financial disclosures, and strengthen recusal requirements. It’s exactly what we need during a time when democracy is at risk because of corruption. = Thank you,Team ECU/LAV Action | | | | | | | | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund 100 M Street SE Suite 1050 Washington, DC 20003 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Fiscally irresponsible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Here’s a comment we hear a lot: ‘I agree with progressives on a lot of issues, but I don’t believe in wasteful government spending.’
Well, neither do we. **Progressives believe in making investments that actually have returns.**
It means **investing in education** , so that people are actually able to participate in an economy that will pay higher wages — **which in turn yields higher revenues** — rather than making 80% cuts to the Dept. of Education for low-income schools.
It also means taxing the rich. **Because there are billionaires out there who are not paying the bill.** What they _are_ doing is taking Supreme Court Justices on private jets in order to facilitate rulings that further aggregate their wealth.
Taxing the rich is where we’re going to find the budget so that kids can go to good schools and so that we can make progress on policies like guaranteed healthcare in the United States of America.
[If you’d like to help power our movement this year, can you chip in $5 or anything you can right now to keep us pushing forward? Every dollar goes to our campaign for systemic change for working people in this country.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231206.rtu7b-&refcode=em20231206-5433-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5433%2E2526796%2Eoqy8cC)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20231206.rtu7b-&refcode=em20231206-5433-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=5433%2E2526796%2Eoqy8cC)**
Yours in service,
Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20231206?refcode=em20231206-5433-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=5433_2526796_oqy8cC&akid=5433%2E2526796%2Eoqy8cC)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20231206-5433-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=5433%2E2526796%2Eoqy8cC)**

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: Nikki and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, I want to share a little background with you about my journey to Congress. When I was three years old, my parents and I moved to Naperville by way of Cleveland. This was in 1990, at a time when the population of our community was growing quickly. As a kid, I believed that public service was cool and understood that it was to be taken seriously. It’s true — just ask my parents! I wanted the best for my community and took on opportunities to help my neighbors by joining the Girl Scouts. I knew then that public service was an excellent way to have an impact. Believe it or not, in high school I served on our local fair housing commission. Thinking back to my early days, it may seem like my path was leading me directly toward public service — but I didn’t have my sights set on running for office at the time. After I graduated from college, I began my career as a registered nurse and worked to implement the Affordable Care Act (ACA), ensuring that millions of Americans, including folks like me with pre-existing conditions, could receive access to high-quality care — some for the first time ever. But in 2017, things took a turn. The Republican House majority was gearing up to repeal the ACA. So I decided to go to the only town hall our former Congressman held that year and hear him out. So here I am, a nurse who worked to expand affordable health care, who has a pre-existing condition of her own, and when our former Congressman said he’d ensure protections were still in place for folks like me, _I believed him_. But just two weeks later, he voted for an ACA repeal bill in Washington that was anything but that — promising to make health care less accessible and more expensive for millions of Americans. **It was then and there that I knew I was going to do something about it. And I decided to run for Congress.** Folks like you supported me and in 2018, this incredible team helped me make history by becoming the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, flipping IL-14 from red to blue when critics said it was impossible. This team came together in 2022 to defy all odds, flipping IL-13 blue for the first time in _three decades_ and electing Nikki Budzinski to Congress against a self-funded opponent with deep pockets. Nikki made history as the first Democratic woman to serve her district. Since then, we’ve been putting our all into helping our communities. We’ve come a long way, and we have a lot to be proud of, friends. None of it would have been possible without your support over the last few years. Now as you know, our work isn’t finished. Nikki and I are running for reelection because we’re ready to roll up our sleeves and continue our work to make life better for our working families. Some of our shared priorities include protecting the right to vote, reforming a deeply unequal health care system, bringing federal funding back to Illinois to repair our roads and bridges, and protecting a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions. But we can’t do any of it without you. **[So today, if you want the best for our communities like we do, I’m asking for your support as Nikki Budzinski and I run for reelection by splitting a $10 donation between our campaigns today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74706159/442387069/-176478005?amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzczN2JmZC04Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ps8McBHNVmhBAA3cJRoKBk0JpfVbfSqk0lf4QNsOcls=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Nikki Budzinski and Lauren Underwood will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74706160/442387071/-176478005?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzczN2JmZC04Njk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ps8McBHNVmhBAA3cJRoKBk0JpfVbfSqk0lf4QNsOcls=)

clean_body: | Friends, I want to share a little background with you about my journey to Congress. When I was three years old, my parents and I moved to Naperville by way of Cleveland. This was in 1990, at a time when the population of our community was growing quickly. As a kid, I believed that public service was cool and understood that it was to be taken seriously. It’s true — just ask my parents! I wanted the best for my community and took on opportunities to help my neighbors by joining the Girl Scouts. I knew then that public service was an excellent way to have an impact. Believe it or not, in high school I served on our local fair housing commission. Thinking back to my early days, it may seem like my path was leading me directly toward public service — but I didn’t have my sights set on running for office at the time. After I graduated from college, I began my career as a registered nurse and worked to implement the Affordable Care Act (ACA), ensuring that millions of Americans, including folks like me with pre-existing conditions, could receive access to high-quality care — some for the first time ever. But in 2017, things took a turn. The Republican House majority was gearing up to repeal the ACA. So I decided to go to the only town hall our former Congressman held that year and hear him out. So here I am, a nurse who worked to expand affordable health care, who has a pre-existing condition of her own, and when our former Congressman said he’d ensure protections were still in place for folks like me, I believed him. But just two weeks later, he voted for an ACA repeal bill in Washington that was anything but that — promising to make health care less accessible and more expensive for millions of Americans. It was then and there that I knew I was going to do something about it. And I decided to run for Congress. Folks like you supported me and in 2018, this incredible team helped me make history by becoming the youngest Black woman ever elected to Congress, flipping IL-14 from red to blue when critics said it was impossible. This team came together in 2022 to defy all odds, flipping IL-13 blue for the first time in three decades and electing Nikki Budzinski to Congress against a self-funded opponent with deep pockets. Nikki made history as the first Democratic woman to serve her district. Since then, we’ve been putting our all into helping our communities. We’ve come a long way, and we have a lot to be proud of, friends. None of it would have been possible without your support over the last few years. Now as you know, our work isn’t finished. Nikki and I are running for reelection because we’re ready to roll up our sleeves and continue our work to make life better for our working families. Some of our shared priorities include protecting the right to vote, reforming a deeply unequal health care system, bringing federal funding back to Illinois to repair our roads and bridges, and protecting a woman’s right to make her own healthcare decisions. But we can’t do any of it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Nikki Budzinski and Lauren Underwood will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = This team is unmatched, and we can accomplish anything when we work together. Warmly, Lauren = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States ** | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| |
Friend,

Please join me TONIGHT for the New Congressional Landscape fundraiser in support of my campaign against Jim Costa in the 21st District.

We will be announcing a MAJOR NATIONAL ENDORSEMENT! You don't want to miss this!

**WHEN:** December 6th @ 6 PM
**WHERE:** FIVE Restaurant in Fresno
1110 E Champlain Drive
Fresno, CA 93720
---
| [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=73ee484cae&e=1722d05e10)
---
| **Claim your spot!** This unique opportunity will give you a chance to meet some of our special out-of-district VIPs! Hosted by Valley Business Leaders Gary Cocola and James G. Parker, this fundraiser promises an inspiring discussion. I will be sharing specifics about what is on the horizon for our Valley and Nation for the very first time! Don't miss out!

To [RSVP](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=2e5ce97a2f&e=1722d05e10), please click the button or reach out to Susan at [SusanKraemer@michaelmaher.com](mailto:SusanKraemer@michaelmaher.com?subject=RSVP) or 559-250-9419.

---
| Your presence and contribution will shape the future of our community. Let's rally behind a new voice: a veteran who wants to serve our community! Please help send me to Congress!

Sincerely,
---
|

| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress

body:

Every year my Wrapped rudely reminds me of that song I listened to on repeat so much that I’m in the top 0.01% of listeners worldwide. It reminds me how predictable my sad-girl indie tastes are. And that all of my most-listened to songs were by Taylor Swift (and to my fellow Swifties, there is nothing embarrassing about that). But it also reminds me of some of my favorite memories — personally and professionally — from throughout 2023.
**My 2023 music tastes might be a tad emo (short for emotional for all you non-Millennials), but I’m feeling energized for 2024.**
Working to earn the support of Delawareans in every corner of the state has been an honor.
And whether I shake, shake, shake, shake, shake it off for an impromptu (yet safe) car dance party while driving to a community meeting or wind down to some Summertime Sadness (oh, oh-oh, oh-oh) after an event, I love nothing more than meeting you out and about.
