clean_body: sad girl indie | = If it’s the end of the year, then it must be time for those annual countdowns that recap the year in review! And when everyone on social media started sharing their own Spotify Wrapped, chronicling their 2023 most-listened to music, Team McBride reached out to me with one big question: “Sarah, what’s your 2023 Spotify Wrapped?!” I immediately turned red because, every year, my Spotify Wrapped tells me what I already know about myself: my music-listening habits are mildly embarrassing. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Okay... 🥁 drumroll please 🥁. Here’s my Top 5: = Every year my Wrapped rudely reminds me of that song I listened to on repeat so much that I’m in the top 0.01% of listeners worldwide. It reminds me how predictable my sad-girl indie tastes are. And that all of my most-listened to songs were by Taylor Swift (and to my fellow Swifties, there is nothing embarrassing about that). But it also reminds me of some of my favorite memories — personally and professionally — from throughout 2023. My 2023 music tastes might be a tad emo (short for emotional for all you non-Millennials), but I’m feeling energized for 2024. Working to earn the support of Delawareans in every corner of the state has been an honor. And whether I shake, shake, shake, shake, shake it off for an impromptu (yet safe) car dance party while driving to a community meeting or wind down to some Summertime Sadness (oh, oh-oh, oh-oh) after an event, I love nothing more than meeting you out and about. = ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks for everything. You (and sad indie girl music) keep me going! — Sarah = | Sarah McBride serves her home state in the Delaware State Senate, where she has passed historic paid leave, gun safety, and nondiscrimination laws. If elected, Sarah will be the first openly trans member of Congress, which means extremists are lining up to attack her. She needs our help to stand up to their hatred. = | = = = = = | Paid for by McBride for Delaware P.O. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

I’m trusting that you'll want to be a part of a select group of Patriots who assist me and the GOP in DEFEATING Joe Biden. You can help us immediately by completing our I promise it will only take a minute or less. As a proud Republican,you have no greater duty to your Party than to help us TAKE BACK the White House and retain our House majority in 2024. For liberty, Jim Jordan Representative OH-4 | About Jim Jordan: Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. here in Pennsylvania, we’re protecting the right to vote

Derek, here in Pennsylvania, we’re protecting the right to vote and making it easier for legal voters to cast their ballots — all while making our elections even more safe and secure. [_**If you believe we need to continue _protecting_ voting rights, not restrict them, will you chip in to help us keep up the fight here in Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74706736/442388935/396869819?refcode=email_120623_Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTQwZjExMy04OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aTcr1Pz5bfhadf3NOT_3WU-ztrxZAvkoNWlQTIWcYc=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74706737/442388936/396869819?refcode=email_120623_Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTQwZjExMy04OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aTcr1Pz5bfhadf3NOT_3WU-ztrxZAvkoNWlQTIWcYc=)

Earlier this year, we introduced Automatic Voter Registration across the Commonwealth. By streamlining the verification processes of voter registration and DMV registration, we’re saving Pennsylvanians’ time _and_ money, while also enhancing the accuracy and security of our voter rolls.
**This is a win-win program** that secures our elections _and_ makes it easier for every eligible Pennsylvania voter to make their voice heard.
Automatic voter registration is just one of the many steps forward we’ve taken this year. And with your support, I know we’ll continue to bring real freedom and real opportunity to all Pennsylvanians.
[_**Our work isn’t finished. I’m rolling up my sleeves every day to continue defending our democracy in Pennsylvania, and I’d be so grateful to have your support in this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74706738/442388937/396869819?refcode=email_120623_Voting&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTQwZjExMy04OTk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5aTcr1Pz5bfhadf3NOT_3WU-ztrxZAvkoNWlQTIWcYc=)

subject: Hate to Say.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
We're about to miss...

|
---
Friend,

I hate to say this - but we're about to miss one of our upcoming fundraising deadlines.

This was one of the biggest pushes we've had so far this year -- and it is troubling to tell you we're about to miss it. We are SO CLOSE to being able to show the Democrats that we are READY for them in 2024. After the results of the recent elections -- we need this boost more than ever.

I'm letting you know how close we are to reaching our goal. In fact -- we are only $250 away...

We can't step off the gas so close to the finish line. **[If you and nine other patriots contributed $25, we could make up lost ground and finish this deadline with a BANG.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=72b9c40aa4464119a82f010798eb8022&_e=-FtH0p66Hzu4OIcUdr4r-wEimb2-MGnEhBWn6zc_Xpzdlb4YMK1D7sonOIOqZ88diEFettPMmWqF_rn-twXBdETKtnEtOvVvOxJdl_9QGN5RJxnyDQ-Dfu8DnwbU_bwc30TLcJBF3EQorgxcal9WW0hR0pWlbYON20VFSasNJE6kLlT0MCm4P2OxfEUmZM7FHlviRiF_FrhkIWH2bu3-ZKaZuXLtMRaodna5TN2orHXaieB1bEeRBCOMk_YrEpIC_nd8b7PeCYLD4STkvBm-lAM4Jf9xlcAdZPbF4WsQdYR7cm3CovyXVesM2YdH0flBGGsYPM3UmRCm6-EyBu4OUuTRAh1ji3569w9vWA9vuYokZhAvVZkm_fumbBWfH47N)**

**[RUSH $25 TO MAKE THE DEADLINE](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=72b9c40aa4464119a82f010798eb8022&_e=-FtH0p66Hzu4OIcUdr4r-wEimb2-MGnEhBWn6zc_Xpzdlb4YMK1D7sonOIOqZ88diEFettPMmWqF_rn-twXBdETKtnEtOvVvOxJdl_9QGN5RJxnyDQ-Dfu8DnwbU_bwc30TLcJBF3EQorgxcal9WW0hR0pWlbYON20VFSasNJE6kLlT0MCm4P2OxfEUmZM7FHlviRiF_FrhkIWH2bu3-ZKaZuXLtMRaodna5TN2orHUaqZL6_LPJYUdn9J4wOcCT7XTQI028m1pXv3_WegN4shQDda_RM-s_kmUAeG6XNPndkVN82IXclSTdBuPL0yuMZxRXX1zYpk2KUMyhQ71N1TPtBK47etPnnUS4w14hR23snSOd8Qum4CJ8rTko8sPS)

** With your support, we can hold our heads high, knowing that when the Democrats come after us, they'll run straight into a solid wall of PATRIOTS ready to stop them from increasing their stranglehold on this nation.

If you could chip in ANYTHING, I would appreciate it sincerely.

Thank you, and God Bless,

Chuck Grassley

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Hi Friend, my name is Daniel, and I'm the Polling Director here at House Republican HQ!

The leadership team has asked me to conduct a survey of our top supporters this year to make sure things are on the right track, and I need your input.

The Results of this Survey will help us decide the direction Republicans take in 2024! We know it seems early for an end-of-year survey Friend, but if we want to get next year right, we need to start planning ASAP!

So much of the polling done by the Radical Left and the mainstream media is flat out wrong!

**That 's why, to ensure 100% accuracy, we need to hear from true conservatives like you. **
You can access your secure link to our survey here:
**[https://act.thenrcc.org/end-of-year/](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=92cff6638ea641de8c8e9d9f409359dd&_e=-F4k7ifQkSmhBdAAhoKXBleQaNj53jHJY0GouPtSdt-_QMB3yD3C_5rsGJCzs3YS_S7-1-P7xXZnVvWRarESY6akAvH7cpdpcg-_n0PWoxCG8dJaTAWRuves7VnS--1Khguu-8xM9g2ddUszL0tKqR0DrEznpd4jdHtAGK1Yf4NNnxQ3t7MMoyFr72oFW3bCA2EhBvP5S9WjKlQleCbbnwWVlomRbjSqzmh2QDxrgD3-aXTRXCz3Yp0RjoeZsI0HwwVwhx0mIRT1FDUS902G-_fN1Q0yAPX8hgMoQeqd0paV3L67ZJ_DA_4y0zEqQ-m6GzihGz7s_l-nmaxexjtBsfODq-Kvnm_W2zzdMKT6MPnEcJUUcqEUqZQhsA1hjYuQ "https://act.thenrcc.org/end-of-year/")**

Thank you,

Daniel

name: Team URD
subject: FWD: New Biden rural poll
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
We wanted to make sure you saw this.

| |
---
Peter, NBC recently conducted a new poll of how rural voters are thinking about the 2024 election ahead of the new year. This is critical data – we needed to make sure you saw this. Team URD \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rural Dems Update**
Date: Mon, Dec 4, 2023 at 3:42 PM
Subject: NEW POLL: Biden in rural America [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74707867/442393045/1646350971?refcode=urd-em-231206-forward&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU3MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzlmYThmZGItOGM5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=sJIC341OANEM40o0Bf37nIZFYdEPnJoyesUfBrsVmJU=) Hey Peter, We wanted to send you an update on some recent rural polling. NBC just released a poll showing Biden with a strong 51% approval rating among urban voters. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Three complaints filed against Sinema in 2023
body:
The accusations against Sinema raise “serious ethical questions.” | | | Peter – Who has not one, not two, but THREE pending ethics and campaign finance complaints against them? name: VoteVets.org
subject: Ukraine needs support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
The GOP is playing political games while our friends dodge bullets.
#
Derek,
More than 400 officers are taking their leadership positions now that we forced Tommy Tuberville and the GOP to stand down and unfreeze their promotions.
But fresh off of one manufactured crisis, the GOP is ready to push us into another.
The people of Ukraine are fighting off a murderous dictator. They are holding the line for democracy — not just in their country, but for all of Europe. America has supported Ukraine every step of the way.
Until now.
**[Watch our new video, “Waiting,” and then contribute to help us eviscerate the GOP for politicizing aid for Ukraine.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-waiting.mfIbUF&refcode=em231206-1-30&t=1&akid=21288%2E3013755%2E1LwhGO)
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-waiting.mfIbUF&refcode=em231206-1-30&t=2&akid=21288%2E3013755%2E1LwhGO)
Republicans in the House and Senate have held up critical aid for Ukraine.
The GOP is playing political games while our friends dodge bullets.
The American people still support Ukraine. Victory in Ukraine is still critical to our National Security and critical to ending Putin’s expansionist aims. And our aid has never been more important to them than it is now.
But the Republican Party, from the top down, is worse than AWOL — they’re actively opposing it.
We **_will**_ hold the GOP accountable for this, and VoteVets gets results.
**[Please, chip in whatever you can to help VoteVets pressure Republicans in Congress and the Senate. Help us get this aid moving, before it’s too late.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec23-waiting.mfIbUF&refcode=em231206-1-30&t=3&akid=21288%2E3013755%2E1LwhGO)

name: Geoff Simpson
subject: Nikki Haley mega-donors are funding the fight against the Squad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

More money from millionaires and billionaires is infiltrating our
elections to undermine our progressive movement,
Peter.

This week, Democratic mega-donor and billionaire co-founder of LinkedIn,
Reid Hoffman, just donated $250,000 to a super PAC supporting Republican
presidential candidate Nikki Haley.

This is the same guy funding Mainstream Democrats PAC, which is recruiting
candidates to challenge Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib in their Democratic
primaries for standing up for Palestinians’ human rights.

Jan Koum, co-founder of WhatsApp, also gave Haley’s super PAC $5 million
this week. In the 2022 cycle, he donated $2 million and was the largest
individual donor to AIPAC, the group that endorsed more than one hundred
Republican insurrectionists and plans to spend $100 million against the
Squad in 2024.

We shouldn’t allow these GOP mega-donors to have a say in our Democratic
primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231206-2.rmBmaK&refcode=em20231206-32212&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1001&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij ]Chip in $3 or whatever you can today to help Justice
Democrats prepare to go up against the Republican- and millionaire-funded
super PACs trying to unseat the Squad →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20231206-2.rmBmaK&refcode=em20231206-32212&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1020&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij ]Contribute $3

We elected our Squad of young, working-class, Black and brown progressives
through grassroots donations from folks like you, and that’s how we’re
going to defend them from these attacks next year.

Thank you,

Geoff Simpson
Campaigns Director

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1021&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1022&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20231206-32212-footer&t=1023&refcode2=32212_1203867_JPM1Ij&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=32212%2E1203867%2EJPM1Ij

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

clean_body: | | | Peter, Time is running out to send FREE holiday postcards this season! Your holiday postcards only take a few minutes to set up, and are a great way to send cheer to your loved ones as we head into 2024 — as well as give them a physical reminder to take action in the new year. Supporters like you have already gotten over 10,000 holiday postcards ready to send. There are two ways to get your postcards done before the Sunday deadline: All that you need to send your Deliver Delight and Democracy holiday postcards is your phone and a selfie or group photo you want to feature. Not sure of everyone’s address? No problem! Our easy app will connect your phone contacts to the voter file to make it quick and easy to match. And once you’re done, Working Families Power will print and mail your postcards for you, postage and shipping on us. All you have to do is wait for the compliments to come in! Don’t miss your chance to send free holiday postcards. or In solidarity, Working Families Power Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. Want to learn more about Working Families Power? Help us build the movement power to win a democracy for the many — not the wealthy and powerful few. Paid for by Working Families Power (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Here’s what we know about the current mifepristone case, Peter: Most recently, a federal court ruled that access to the abortion drug mifepristone must be restricted, pending further Supreme Court action. To be clear: **Mifepristone remains available for now.** But this ruling to restrict is now going to go before the Supreme Court — the same Court that voted to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ last year. If the Court upholds this decision, mifepristone will no longer be available by mail, and will only be available in the first seven weeks of pregnancy — _including in states where abortion remains legal. _ [_**We still have time to fight back and make our demands known to the Court. We’re counting on you, FirstName, to chip in any amount today to help us protect abortion medication access:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708269/442394433/1214735454?recurring=on&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGUzMmU2ZWYtOGU5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0_vB7hrdxRHeATxFTfMDknr14Kg4qLDVwCh9y4oQbSs=) _Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | [CHIP IN $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708271/442394435/1214735454?recurring=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20231206_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGUzMmU2ZWYtOGU5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0_vB7hrdxRHeATxFTfMDknr14Kg4qLDVwCh9y4oQbSs=)

clean_body: | = Here’s what we know about the current mifepristone case, Peter: Most recently, a federal court ruled that access to the abortion drug mifepristone must be restricted, pending further Supreme Court action. To be clear: Mifepristone remains available for now. But this ruling to restrict is now going to go before the Supreme Court — the same Court that voted to overturn Roe v. Wade last year. If the Court upholds this decision, mifepristone will no longer be available by mail, and will only be available in the first seven weeks of pregnancy — including in states where abortion remains legal. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. | | = = | = = | = = Thanks, HER Time HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4cfd2c42943043cfaa0ba22dc9791760&_e=YmfSnnjpnp9xpBE7zUUbRN3K4ypB-kS13fDUqV1Hbv6iF_87E7lnd05rX4vZYhFgAJkzLdG48naTfF4J83ZRoCdJF9Kb3jTkkdjYwvNgfZPlkkSzBt-5azpIEc-eyFQWBxL3fuGo4qk7qFfS5yAl2SyVxX3Oi5TNtFf9MkejZaTRkpvEGpz86p-uOu0RUnzad_hWZ8-SHZruxGuLbv-dRH7_QKoFjokPnKomZsEIhhuP2kj5enrzjbURyVZroJ6Fmb_woZlqC9PEKaXywHfEwD-1lqg7gNsIVS0XtsWHCJ03Gvdzu7R9p-n6eYakszpAZqS8k3IxgCC2IrKblK20TeqMEmZDDot-XILUez8P0-5Ocl43kLabPvJjtME_XxxSVBjxTEnPVbyWxS7YaEXSW0KcoIapFPHZFbXB8lKXFR84UJN2sC6IRDDHRfP0tM7z0VU7lG9QXFmx3I-Su_InoygIUaYudHYCWAItWschCS7iDXm5MBmVtD9tLQdsv0RZ2OPivcnLm3m-ZmGYHE5py12cWRvIGaK3LDMCc4nvDr3-6xeROh4SbtK7XRcsRPieuSYLaGk4HF-F2E4SoVb5WGIZwbiz3Q1T2gyb_a38J3w%3D "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Will you join my exclusive Ambassador's Circle? | | | | | | Friend, I wanted to reach out to you with an exciting opportunity. Our team is currently running a membership drive until December 6, leading up to my fourth presidential debate. We're working hard to bring in new members for my "Ambassador’s Circle membership", and I sincerely believe you'd be a fantastic addition to my team. "Will you please show your support ahead of the debate by becoming a member of my Ambassador’s Circle?" | | | Friend, you've demonstrated a commitment to our nation's freedom, and that's precisely the kind of individual I want by my side as we head into the FOURTH presidential debate. "That’s why it’s important you join my Ambassador’s Circle by December 6. Can I count on you to confirm your support today? >>" As an Ambassador 's Circle Member, you'll gain access to a variety of exclusive benefits, including: 🔘 Personalized membership card 🔘 Exclusive news and updates 🔘 Discounted merchandise offers 🔘 Behind-the-scenes footage on the campaign trail 🔘 AND MORE ... | | Friend, I'm eager to have you on my team. I hope to see you on the list of my newest members. My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in community.

| Hi, it’s Ritchie. It’s been a while since I introduced myself to you, Peter.

[If you’ve been on Team Ritchie from day 1, you can click here to skip my story and support our grassroots movement »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708501/442395247/-1359812268?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20231206_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0NTc1Zi04Zjk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VkSDMchS9IdusDhsYCovlb_J0lkSRMhncg0yr0ie568=)

**_Here’s a little bit about me:_**

📍 I was born and raised in the Bronx.

🏠 Growing up with a single mom, public housing was a lifeline for my family — so I’ve dedicated my career to fighting for affordable housing and building social safety nets to eliminate poverty.

🏳️🌈 I’m the first openly LGBTQ+ Afro-Latino man in Congress. My lived experience as a gay Black man motivates me to fight _every day_ until we are fully equal in the eyes of the law.

👊🏽 I’m a tireless advocate for Social Security and Medicare. I believe proper health care cannot be limited to physical health, and I’ll continue to advocate tirelessly for access to mental health care.

**_And here’s why my story matters for you:_**

When you invest in this campaign, you’re investing in _community._

From fighting for affordable housing to community initiatives to Medicare and more, I know this grassroots movement is capable of _changing the game_ for the Bronx.

**I’ve got your back, Peter, and I’m hoping you’ve got mine:[Will you chip in $3, or whatever you can afford, to help me continue fighting for you? Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

name: Doug Lindner, LCV
subject: Right-wing judges are GUTTING the right to vote. Demand Congress act today.
body:
We need your help to deliver 5,000 signatures to Capitol Hill TODAY. |
---
| | **
Stand Up for Voting Rights: Tell Congress to Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act**
A federal court dominated by Republican-appointed, far-right judges has just gutted citizens' ability to sue for their rights under the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

If it stands, this ruling would be a disaster for the right to vote -- effectively allowing far-right legislators to pass racist voter suppression laws and gerrymanders with virtually no legal challenges when their allies hold the White House. [Congress must act to protect the right to vote -- tell your representatives to support the updated John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act without delay.](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION NOW**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
Peter -- last month, a right-wing majority on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit issued a ruling that _eliminates_ the ability of individuals and groups to bring lawsuits under the Voting Rights Act of 1965.

This horrific ruling flies in the face of decades of judicial precedent. If it's allowed to stand, this ruling will eviscerate the ability of minority voters to defend their right to vote in states that continue to suppress those rights.

Worse yet, the appeals court's ruling says that only the US Department of Justice can enforce the Voting Rights Act... meaning that far-right insurrectionist presidents like Donald Trump could abuse the power of the presidency to greenlight _rampant_ voter suppression and gerrymandering.

We can't let this stand, Peter. [Congress has the power to secure the right to vote. Tell your representatives to support the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act right now. Help us deliver 5,000 signatures to legislators on Capitol Hill demanding action TODAY >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

The updated John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act was created to honor the legacy of the late civil rights icon Congressman John Lewis and continue his vital mission to protect the right to vote for communities of color and all Americans. This bill would serve as a safeguard against the far-right's attacks on voting rights by:
* Preventing racial discrimination in voting and redistricting;
* Updating and modernizing the framework for ensuring states and localities with histories of voting discrimination have their voting policy changes approved by the US Department of Justice or a federal court;
* Instructing courts to block discriminatory election policies; and
* Undoing the harmful impacts of far-right judges' attacks on voting rights.

**This is about stopping the White supremacy tactic of voter disenfranchisement.** When our courts greenlight state and local policies such as restrictive voter ID laws, closing polling places in communities of color, redrawing district maps to dilute the power of voters of color, and barriers like denial of food and water on voting lines, marginalized voters are deprived of their fundamental right to an equal say in our democracy.

[We can beat these attacks from the extreme MAGA right and restore the right to vote to all Americans... but we need your help. Tell your representatives to support the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for standing with us.

Onward,

Doug Lindner
Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy
League of Conservation Voters |

---

clean_body: We need your help to deliver 5,000 signatures to Capitol Hill TODAY. | | | Stand Up for Voting Rights: Tell Congress to Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act A federal court dominated by Republican-appointed, far-right judges has just gutted citizens' ability to sue for their rights under the Voting Rights Act of 1965. If it stands, this ruling would be a disaster for the right to vote -- effectively allowing far-right legislators to pass racist voter suppression laws and gerrymanders with virtually no legal challenges when their allies hold the White House. | | Peter -- last month, a right-wing majority on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Eighth Circuit issued a ruling that eliminates the ability of individuals and groups to bring lawsuits under the Voting Rights Act of 1965. This horrific ruling flies in the face of decades of judicial precedent. If it's allowed to stand, this ruling will eviscerate the ability of minority voters to defend their right to vote in states that continue to suppress those rights. Worse yet, the appeals court's ruling says that only the US Department of Justice can enforce the Voting Rights Act... meaning that far-right insurrectionist presidents like Donald Trump could abuse the power of the presidency to greenlight rampant voter suppression and gerrymandering. We can't let this stand, Peter. The updated John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act was created to honor the legacy of the late civil rights icon Congressman John Lewis and continue his vital mission to protect the right to vote for communities of color and all Americans. This bill would serve as a safeguard against the far-right's attacks on voting rights by: Preventing racial discrimination in voting and redistricting; Updating and modernizing the framework for ensuring states and localities with histories of voting discrimination have their voting policy changes approved by the US Department of Justice or a federal court; Instructing courts to block discriminatory election policies; and Undoing the harmful impacts of far-right judges' attacks on voting rights. This is about stopping the White supremacy tactic of voter disenfranchisement. When our courts greenlight state and local policies such as restrictive voter ID laws, closing polling places in communities of color, redrawing district maps to dilute the power of voters of color, and barriers like denial of food and water on voting lines, marginalized voters are deprived of their fundamental right to an equal say in our democracy. Thank you for standing with us. Onward, Doug Lindner Senior Director of Judiciary & Democracy League of Conservation Voters | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We won the Senate majority before. Let’s do it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708759/442396136/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTMwOTk1OS05MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qc-I6qX5oxjw14I8nlYwZfW8HHz_m9Dj72DPhPMijo=&emci=693d9df1-4c94-ee11-8925-002248223f36&emdi=ce309959-9094-ee11-8925-002248223f36&ceid=43566853)

| | One year ago today, Peter, we made history – again.

Thanks to the support of folks like you on this people-powered team, we defied all the odds, proving the political pundits and naysayers wrong, to win our runoff election. We kept Georgia blue and secured the Senate majority for Democrats.

I’ll never lose sight of what that victory felt like. What it _meant._ As a kid who grew up in public housing – with 11 brothers and sisters and parents who were short on money but long on love and faith – I could only ever dream of becoming Georgia’s first Black senator. Thank you.

But I’m also reaching out today because you understand well the urgency of our elections. Our razor-thin Senate majority is once again on the line, with just about every election expert out there calling Democrats’ path to _holding_ the Senate the most difficult it’s ever been.

Well, they said that about Georgia. They said it would be near impossible for us to flip it blue. But we did because people like you never stopped believing and never stopped fighting – chipping in $15 or $25 because you believed change was possible. **So today, I’m coming to you again because I promised the GA Dems that I’d help them raise $25,000 before midnight so they can keep Georgia Blue.**

**I’ve counted on you before, Peter. Can the GA Dems and I count on you again to keep Georgia blue?** [**_Please, split a donation of $25 or whatever you can spare between our teams so that we can keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708761/442396139/1583625711?refcode=20231104.2_RW_11I&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTMwOTk1OS05MDk0LWVlMTEtODkyNS0wMDIyNDgyMjNmMzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8qc-I6qX5oxjw14I8nlYwZfW8HHz_m9Dj72DPhPMijo=)**_

As somebody who fought and won a battleground race, I know this fundraising goal to help the Georgia Dems win is essential. I appreciate you helping out and donating whatever you can.

Rev. Raphael Warnock
---
|
---

name: Our Revolution
subject: Barbara Lee and Bernie Sanders have a plan to hold the Pentagon accountable for waste, fraud, and abuse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

On Monday, Our Revolution held an Economic Justice Town Hall with progressive leaders, including our endorsed candidate in the California Senate primary, progressive champion Congresswoman Barbara Lee.

On the call, she drew attention to the $150-$200 billion in waste, fraud, and abuse in the Pentagon's budget — an outrageous figure with many working people struggling to afford rent and feed their families.

That's why Congresswoman Lee joined Our Revolution's founder, Bernie Sanders, and a Republican to introduce the bipartisan Audit the Pentagon Act.

Barbara's bill requires the Pentagon to pass an independent audit of its budget or return part of its massive funding to the Treasury. Can we count on you to sign on and support this critical bill to stop extreme Pentagon waste? (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12986?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231206_PT_pentagonwaste_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_pentagonwaste&t=1011&akid=4970%2E5885482%2EnHqDE8)

STOP PENTAGON WASTE (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12986?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231206_PT_pentagonwaste_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_pentagonwaste&t=1012&akid=4970%2E5885482%2EnHqDE8)

Every agency in the government is required to pass an audit, but until Congresswoman Lee's bill is passed, the Pentagon will remain the lone exception — despite recently failing its 6th (!) consecutive audit.

We could easily spend these billions of wasted dollars on affordable housing, healthcare, transportation, fighting the climate crisis, and other vital priorities.

Instead, millions of our neighbors remain stuck in poverty, and wealth inequality has risen to levels worse than the Gilded Age a century ago.

As Barbara said on the call, "The contractors and the millionaires and billionaires are scamming the system and scamming taxpayers, and taxpayers are paying excessive taxes. Low and middle-income families are fueling the Pentagon budget."

Add your name here to stand with Barbara Lee and Bernie Sanders against immoral, wasteful spending at the Pentagon while so many of our neighbors struggle. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/12986?source=EM_NBI_OR_20231206_PT_pentagonwaste_0_6MO_ourrevolution_na_na_pentagonwaste&t=1013&akid=4970%2E5885482%2EnHqDE8)

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: John Ammon
subject: GREAT READ: Our Dysfunctional Press

There was a blatant episode recently that exemplifies how deteriorated our press has become. The immediate disclosure to the world that the Hamas propaganda machine blamed Israelis for a hospital bombing in Gaza – in reality, the hospital parking lot — and the killing of 500 people – which was actually 50.

These irresponsible reports spread a blood libel that gave justification for riots throughout the world and the cancellation of meetings with President Biden. But that is just a small sample of the distortion done on a regular basis by the legacy media.

| | Hey Peter, Yesterday I filed my candidate statement with the Secretary of State — a huge step forward in our race to represent California's 30th. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708825/442396466/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-06-filing&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aa63226-9394-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhNjMyMjYtOTM5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giWECyb0O4hiM7BxZTtlZ9MCEB8E2U9ESdirwNags_g=) As I started drafting my statement, I reflected on the road that led me here. Looking back at my time as LAUSD teacher, then — because of the impact of those very students — a civil rights advocate, attorney, nonprofit director, and school board member. As a teacher in Watts, I saw how poor leadership and structural inequity were holding back my students — and I knew I needed to fight back. I took on the school district and state on their behalf and won more funding for under-resourced schools. But there was still so much more to be done, so I ran for the school board, and fought to improve transparency, accountability, and budgets to help families and students. **Now, I am running for Congress to bring a new generation of leadership that will take on the failed status quo and deliver for our communities.**[**Can you pitch in $14 toward our filing day goal of $5,000 to support our GOTV efforts? Your support will help us get this message out and win on March 5th.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708826/442396467/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-06-filing&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aa63226-9394-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhNjMyMjYtOTM5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giWECyb0O4hiM7BxZTtlZ9MCEB8E2U9ESdirwNags_g=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Right now, people nationwide are facing an affordability crisis — and our district is no exception. These struggles are _political_ problems and they can be resolved with the right leadership.
During the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic, I oversaw the distribution of over 140 million meals through the largest school-based food bank program in the country, and the expansion of childcare for working families.
I've delivered real progress as a school board member — including championing the country's highest minimum wage for workers at schools, helping students and families find housing by building thousands of new homes for those who work at local schools, and adding vocational programs that open the door to middle-class jobs. Now, I'm ready to bring that same energy to Congress.
Too many families are struggling and our communities cannot afford to wait on the empty promises of politicians who have been in office for _decades_. **I am ready to work with leaders of different viewpoints and across the aisle to expand affordable housing, lower prescription costs, establish universal preschool, and end big money in politics.**[**Will you help me get there with a contribution of $14 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74708832/442396473/1183499175?refcode=2023-12-06-filing&recurring=&amount=14&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=3aa63226-9394-ee11-8925-002248223f36&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2FhNjMyMjYtOTM5NC1lZTExLTg5MjUtMDAyMjQ4MjIzZjM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=giWECyb0O4hiM7BxZTtlZ9MCEB8E2U9ESdirwNags_g=)
Our movement is part of a new, bold generation of leadership that voters want to see in Congress. Leadership that is ready to get to work and get things done.
Thanks for standing with us,
_Nick_

clean_body: Another step towards victory on March 5th. | | | | Hey Peter, Yesterday I filed my candidate statement with the Secretary of State — a huge step forward in our race to represent California's 30th. = As I started drafting my statement, I reflected on the road that led me here. Looking back at my time as LAUSD teacher, then — because of the impact of those very students — a civil rights advocate, attorney, nonprofit director, and school board member. As a teacher in Watts, I saw how poor leadership and structural inequity were holding back my students — and I knew I needed to fight back. I took on the school district and state on their behalf and won more funding for under-resourced schools. But there was still so much more to be done, so I ran for the school board, and fought to improve transparency, accountability, and budgets to help families and students. Now, I am running for Congress to bring a new generation of leadership that will take on the failed status quo and deliver for our communities.= Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Right now, people nationwide are facing an affordability crisis — and our district is no exception. These struggles are political problems and they can be resolved with the right leadership. During the peak of the COVID-19 pandemic, I oversaw the distribution of over 140 million meals through the largest school-based food bank program in the country, and the expansion of childcare for working families. I've delivered real progress as a school board member — including championing the country's highest minimum wage for workers at schools, helping students and families find housing by building thousands of new homes for those who work at local schools, and adding vocational programs that open the door to middle-class jobs. Now, I'm ready to bring that same energy to Congress. Too many families are struggling and our communities cannot afford to wait on the empty promises of politicians who have been in office for decades. I am ready to work with leaders of different viewpoints and across the aisle to expand affordable housing, lower prescription costs, establish universal preschool, and end big money in politics.= Our movement is part of a new, bold generation of leadership that voters want to see in Congress. Leadership that is ready to get to work and get things done. Thanks for standing with us, Nick = | | | Paid for by Nick Melvoin for Congress - FEC ID #C00831289 |

name: =?utf-8?Q?JAMES=20JUDGE?=
subject: Putting Bibles back in public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Judge for Congress
body:
I’m hosting a Bible drive fundraising campaign to put Bibles in the hands of public school children here in FL-12... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/63cbe1cc75cc/running-for-congress-in-my-hometown-13693165?e=00028e5542)
---
[**Help me donate Bibles to public school children this Christmas**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=d3348350ec&e=00028e5542)
Good afternoon fellow conservative,
As you may know, the Bible was America’s very first public school textbook.
But today, the political left has our children reading anti-American, anti-Christian and even pornographic materials in our schools.
I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 12th Congressional District to restore America’s Christian, conservative values, and that starts with teaching our children about God.
That’s why I’m hosting a [**Bible drive fundraising campaign**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=a4fb777e86&e=00028e5542) to put Bibles in the hands of public school children here in FL-12, and eventually throughout Florida and the rest of the United States.
Here’s how it works:
For the first $25 donated to the Bible drive campaign, which runs through the month of December, we will donate two Bibles for public school students. Larger donations will result in more Bibles being donated to public school students:
**●**[**$25 donation - Bibles for 2 Students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=3323c5d375&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$100 donation - Bibles for 10 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=ecde6ab8bb&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$250 donation - Bibles for 30 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=f8c5a4f785&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$500 donation - Bibles for 65 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=3cb5487a99&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$1,000 donation - Bibles for 140 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=24000d73e4&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$3,300 donation - Bibles for 475 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=4439c609b2&e=00028e5542)**●**[**$6,600 donation - Bibles for 1,000 students**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=16bc19178d&e=00028e5542)
I’m the only Congressional candidate bold enough to run a donation campaign of this kind, and I need your support today!
My goal is to raise enough money to donate more than 120,000 bibles – one for each public school student in these districts – before the end of December.
During this giving season, please help me give a child the most important gift he or she can receive, the word of God.
[**Spread the word by chipping in today**](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=9549b9446e&e=00028e5542)**!**
Thank you in advance for your generous support!
For God and Country,
James P. Judge
[Republican for U.S. Congress, FL-12](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=95dc6e4614&e=00028e5542)
_“Without God, there could be no American form of Government, nor an American way of life. Recognition of the Supreme Being is the first–the most basic–expression of Americanism. Thus the Founding Fathers saw it, and thus, with God’s help, it will continue to be.”_ – Dwight D. Eisenhower
| [DONATE NOW](https://judgeforcongress.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1f416ce0ac5ddfd320ec0ff6b&id=7e83e76628&e=00028e5542)
